## 🎯 **Executive Summary**
Dokumen ini adalah blueprint lengkap untuk pengembangan SaaS Koperasi Harian yang menggabungkan:
- **Super App Architecture** dengan 3 interface (Admin, Mantri, Nasabah)
- **Advanced Fraud Prevention** dengan geofencing dan family mapping
- **Complete Database Schema** dengan Row-Level Security
- **Thermal Receipt Security** dengan anti-fraud features
- **Comprehensive Business Strategy** dengan monetization model

**Target Market**: Koperasi Harian di Indonesia dengan 50-1000 anggota
**Timeline Implementation**: 6 bulan dari development hingga production
**Expected ROI**: 12-18 bulan dengan revenue model SaaS subscription

---

## Ringkasan Proyek
Repositori ini berisi aplikasi web PHP untuk mengelola operasi koperasi simpan pinjam (KSP) harian, dengan fokus pada pengelolaan anggota, pinjaman, formulir surat, dan pengembangan bisnis. Aplikasi dirancang untuk shared hosting, menggunakan MySQL sebagai database, dengan fitur Ajax untuk UX yang lebih baik.

## 📊 **Status Saat Ini**
- **Teknologi**: PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap, jQuery, Ajax
- **Fitur Dasar**: Kelola anggota, pinjaman, formulir surat (permohonan anggota, pinjaman, lamaran kerja, kesepakatan)
- **Hosting**: Siap untuk shared hosting dengan PHP dan MySQL
- **Gap**: Kurang autentikasi penuh, manajemen simpanan, workflow pinjaman, laporan, dan fitur bisnis lanjutan
- **Ready for Enhancement**: Foundation code sudah ada, perlu upgrade ke SaaS architecture

## 🎯 **Fitur yang Direkomendasikan untuk Implementasi**

### 🔥 High Priority (Critical for MVP)
- **Sistem Autentikasi dan Role-Based Access**: Foundation untuk security
- **Manajemen Simpanan (Savings)**: Core financial operation
- **Workflow Persetujuan Pinjaman**: Business process automation
- **Fraud Detection System**: Unique selling proposition

### 📈 Medium Priority (Growth Features)
- **Pelacakan Pembayaran Pinjaman**: Collection optimization
- **Laporan Keuangan dan Akuntansi**: Compliance & reporting
- **Portal Anggota Online**: Self-service capabilities
- **Mobile Apps**: Field operations support

### 🚀 Low Priority (Advanced Features)
- **Notifikasi dan Komunikasi**: Customer engagement
- **Manajemen Suku Bunga**: Financial flexibility
- **AI Integration**: Advanced analytics
- **Multi-Cabang Support**: Scalability

## 💼 **Strategi Pengembangan Bisnis**

### 🎯 **Strategi Utama**
1. **Pengembangan Modal**: Ajukan LPDB, tingkatkan simpanan sukarela, reinvestasi laba
2. **Akuisisi Anggota Baru**: Promosi, referral, targeting komunitas
3. **Peningkatan Layanan dan Digitalisasi**: PWA, payment gateway, otomatisasi
4. **Manajemen Risiko**: Scoring kredit, monitoring NPL
5. **Diversifikasi Produk**: Tabungan berjangka, asuransi
6. **Kemitraan dan Jaringan**: Kolaborasi bank, pemerintah
7. **Pemasaran dan Branding**: Kampanye media sosial, testimoni
8. **Efisiensi Operasional dan SDM**: Pelatihan, rotasi tugas

### 📈 **Target Metrics**
- **Pertumbuhan Anggota**: 10-20% per bulan
- **Rasio Pinjaman/Simpanan**: 70-80%
- **ROA**: 5-10%
- **NPL**: <5%
- **Productivitas Mantri**: 20 kunjungan/hari

---

## 💳 **Fitur Manajemen Keuangan Dashboard Pemilik Koperasi**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Dashboard keuangan comprehensive yang memberikan real-time visibility dan control penuh atas kesehatan finansial koperasi. Dirancang khusus untuk pemilik koperasi yang ingin peace of mind dan kontrol penuh tanpa harus berada di kantor.

---

### 📊 **1. Fitur Cashflow Monitoring (Arus Kas Real-time)**

#### **💰 Real-time Cash Flow Overview**
```python
# Real-time cash flow monitoring system
class CashFlowMonitoring:
    """
    Real-time cash flow monitoring untuk complete financial visibility
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.real_time_data = True
        self.update_interval = 30  # seconds
        self.alert_thresholds = {
            'cash_shortage': 1000000,  # Rp1JT
            'collection_shortfall': 0.8,  # 80% of target
            'field_cash_limit': 5000000  # Rp5JT per mantri
        }
    
    def get_real_time_cash_position(self) -> dict:
        """
        Get real-time cash position dari semua sources
        """
        
        return {
            'total_cash_in_field': self._calculate_field_cash(),
            'bank_balance': self._get_bank_balance(),
            'office_cash': self._get_office_cash(),
            'total_liquid_assets': self._calculate_total_liquid(),
            'last_updated': datetime.now().isoformat(),
            'cash_distribution': {
                'mantri_a': 2500000,
                'mantri_b': 1800000,
                'mantri_c': 3200000,
                'office_safe': 5000000,
                'bank_account': 15000000
            }
        }
    
    def get_target_vs_realization(self, date: str = None) -> dict:
        """
        Compare target vs actual collection harian
        """
        
        if not date:
            date = datetime.now().date()
        
        # Calculate daily target
        daily_target = self._calculate_daily_target(date)
        
        # Get actual collections
        actual_collections = self._get_actual_collections(date)
        
        # Calculate variance
        variance = actual_collections - daily_target
        variance_percentage = (variance / daily_target) * 100
        
        return {
            'date': date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            'target_amount': daily_target,
            'actual_amount': actual_collections,
            'variance': variance,
            'variance_percentage': variance_percentage,
            'status': 'positive' if variance >= 0 else 'negative',
            'collection_breakdown': {
                'setoran_pokok': actual_collections * 0.1,
                'setoran_wajib': actual_collections * 0.3,
                'angsuran_pokok': actual_collections * 0.4,
                'angsuran_bunga': actual_collections * 0.2
            },
            'hourly_progress': self._get_hourly_collection_progress(date)
        }
    
    def get_cash_receipts_summary(self, date: str = None) -> dict:
        """
        Rekapitulasi penerimaan kas harian
        """
        
        if not date:
            date = datetime.now().date()
        
        receipts = self._get_cash_receipts(date)
        
        return {
            'date': date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            'total_receipts': len(receipts),
            'total_amount': sum(r['amount'] for r in receipts),
            'receipts_by_type': {
                'setoran_pokok': {
                    'count': len([r for r in receipts if r['type'] == 'setoran_pokok']),
                    'amount': sum(r['amount'] for r in receipts if r['type'] == 'setoran_pokok')
                },
                'setoran_wajib': {
                    'count': len([r for r in receipts if r['type'] == 'setoran_wajib']),
                    'amount': sum(r['amount'] for r in receipts if r['type'] == 'setoran_wajib'])
                },
                'angsuran_harian': {
                    'count': len([r for r in receipts if r['type'] == 'angsuran']),
                    'amount': sum(r['amount'] for r in receipts if r['type'] == 'angsuran'])
                }
            },
            'receipts_by_mantri': self._group_receipts_by_mantri(receipts),
            'peak_hours': self._identify_peak_collection_hours(receipts),
            'collection_efficiency': self._calculate_collection_efficiency(receipts)
        }
    
    def _calculate_field_cash(self) -> int:
        """Calculate total cash yang dibawa mantri di lapangan"""
        
        field_cash = 0
        active_mantris = self._get_active_mantris()
        
        for mantri in active_mantris:
            # Get cash yang dibawa mantri hari ini
            morning_cash = mantri.get('morning_cash', 0)
            collections_today = self._get_mantri_collections_today(mantri['id'])
            expenses_today = self._get_mantri_expenses_today(mantri['id'])
            
            field_cash += morning_cash + collections_today - expenses_today
        
        return field_cash
    
    def _get_hourly_collection_progress(self, date: str) -> list:
        """Get hourly collection progress untuk real-time monitoring"""
        
        hourly_data = []
        for hour in range(8, 18):  # 8 AM to 6 PM
            hour_collections = self._get_collections_by_hour(date, hour)
            hourly_data.append({
                'hour': f"{hour:02d}:00",
                'collections': hour_collections,
                'cumulative': sum(d['collections'] for d in hourly_data) + hour_collections
            })
        
        return hourly_data
```

### ⚕️ **2. Fitur Health Check & Manajemen Risiko (NPL)**

#### **🏥 NPL Monitoring System**
```python
# NPL dan health check system
class NPLHealthMonitor:
    """
    Comprehensive NPL monitoring dan financial health check
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.npl_thresholds = {
            'healthy': 0.05,      # 5%
            'warning': 0.10,       # 10%
            'critical': 0.15      # 15%
        }
        self.overdue_days = {
            'watchlist': 3,       # 3 hari overdue
            'npl_start': 30,      # 30 hari overdue
            'critical': 90         # 90 hari overdue
        }
    
    def get_npl_report(self, as_of_date: str = None) -> dict:
        """
        Generate comprehensive NPL report
        """
        
        if not as_of_date:
            as_of_date = datetime.now().date()
        
        # Calculate NPL ratios
        total_loans = self._get_total_outstanding_loans(as_of_date)
        npl_amount = self._get_npl_amount(as_of_date)
        npl_ratio = npl_amount / total_loans if total_loans > 0 else 0
        
        # Determine health status
        if npl_ratio <= self.npl_thresholds['healthy']:
            health_status = 'healthy'
            status_color = 'green'
            alert_level = 'normal'
        elif npl_ratio <= self.npl_thresholds['warning']:
            health_status = 'warning'
            status_color = 'yellow'
            alert_level = 'medium'
        else:
            health_status = 'critical'
            status_color = 'red'
            alert_level = 'high'
        
        return {
            'as_of_date': as_of_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            'total_outstanding_loans': total_loans,
            'npl_amount': npl_amount,
            'npl_ratio': npl_ratio,
            'npl_percentage': npl_ratio * 100,
            'health_status': health_status,
            'status_color': status_color,
            'alert_level': alert_level,
            'npl_breakdown': {
                'performing': total_loans - npl_amount,
                'substandard': self._get_substandard_loans(as_of_date),
                'doubtful': self._get_doubtful_loans(as_of_date),
                'loss': self._get_loss_loans(as_of_date)
            },
            'trend_analysis': self._get_npl_trend(as_of_date),
            'sector_analysis': self._get_npl_by_sector(as_of_date),
            'recommendations': self._generate_npl_recommendations(npl_ratio, health_status)
        }
    
    def get_watchlist_members(self, days_overdue: int = 3) -> list:
        """
        Get daftar nasabah yang perlu di-watchlist
        """
        
        overdue_members = self._get_overdue_members(days_overdue)
        
        watchlist = []
        for member in overdue_members:
            overdue_days = self._calculate_overdue_days(member['loan_id'])
            overdue_amount = self._calculate_overdue_amount(member['loan_id'])
            
            # Determine urgency level
            if overdue_days >= 7:
                urgency = 'high'
                action_required = 'Immediate supervisor visit'
            elif overdue_days >= 5:
                urgency = 'medium'
                action_required = 'Mantri follow-up required'
            else:
                urgency = 'low'
                action_required = 'Monitor closely'
            
            watchlist.append({
                'member_id': member['id'],
                'member_name': member['name'],
                'loan_id': member['loan_id'],
                'overdue_days': overdue_days,
                'overdue_amount': overdue_amount,
                'last_payment_date': member['last_payment_date'],
                'assigned_mantri': member['assigned_mantri'],
                'contact_info': member['phone'],
                'address': member['address'],
                'urgency_level': urgency,
                'action_required': action_required,
                'payment_history': self._get_recent_payment_history(member['loan_id'], 5),
                'risk_score': self._calculate_member_risk_score(member['id'])
            })
        
        # Sort by overdue days (descending)
        watchlist.sort(key=lambda x: x['overdue_days'], reverse=True)
        
        return watchlist
    
    def predict_collection_timeline(self) -> dict:
        """
        Prediksi kapan modal koperasi akan kembali (Break Even Point)
        """
        
        current_data = self._get_current_financial_data()
        historical_data = self._get_historical_collection_data()
        
        # Calculate collection velocity
        avg_daily_collection = self._calculate_avg_daily_collection(historical_data)
        collection_trend = self._calculate_collection_trend(historical_data)
        
        # Calculate outstanding loans
        total_outstanding = current_data['total_outstanding_loans']
        
        # Predict based on current velocity
        if collection_trend > 0:
            # Improving trend
            days_to_recover = total_outstanding / (avg_daily_collection * 1.1)
        elif collection_trend < 0:
            # Declining trend
            days_to_recover = total_outstanding / (avg_daily_collection * 0.9)
        else:
            # Stable trend
            days_to_recover = total_outstanding / avg_daily_collection
        
        recovery_date = datetime.now() + timedelta(days=days_to_recover)
        
        return {
            'current_outstanding': total_outstanding,
            'avg_daily_collection': avg_daily_collection,
            'collection_trend': collection_trend,
            'predicted_days_to_recover': days_to_recover,
            'predicted_recovery_date': recovery_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            'confidence_level': self._calculate_prediction_confidence(historical_data),
            'scenario_analysis': {
                'best_case': total_outstanding / (avg_daily_collection * 1.2),
                'realistic_case': days_to_recover,
                'worst_case': total_outstanding / (avg_daily_collection * 0.8)
            },
            'recommendations': self._generate_recovery_recommendations(days_to_recover, collection_trend)
        }
    
    def _generate_npl_recommendations(self, npl_ratio: float, health_status: str) -> list:
        """Generate recommendations berdasarkan NPL status"""
        
        recommendations = []
        
        if health_status == 'healthy':
            recommendations.extend([
                'Maintain current collection practices',
                'Continue regular member monitoring',
                'Consider expanding to new areas'
            ])
        elif health_status == 'warning':
            recommendations.extend([
                'Increase collection frequency untuk overdue accounts',
                'Implement reminder system untuk payments',
                'Review underwriting criteria untuk new loans',
                'Consider temporary reduction dalam new loan disbursement'
            ])
        else:  # critical
            recommendations.extend([
                'Immediate action required untuk high-risk accounts',
                'Consider restructuring untuk viable loans',
                'Implement stricter collection procedures',
                'Reduce new loan disbursement immediately',
                'Consider professional collection agency assistance'
            ])
        
        return recommendations
```

### 🏆 **3. Fitur Pembagian SHU (Sisa Hasil Usaha) Otomatis**

#### **💰 SHU Calculation Engine**
```python
# SHU calculation dan distribution system
class SHUCalculationEngine:
    """
    Otomatisasi perhitungan dan pembagian SHU sesuai UU Perkoperasian
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.shu_allocation_rules = {
            'jasa_anggota': 0.40,      # 40% untuk jasa anggota
            'modal_dasar': 0.10,      # 10% untuk modal dasar
            'pendidikan': 0.05,        # 5% untuk pendidikan
            'sosial': 0.05,           # 5% untuk sosial
            'cadangan': 0.15,         # 15% untuk cadangan
            'pengurus': 0.10,         # 10% untuk pengurus
            'karyawan': 0.10,         # 10% untuk karyawan
            'lain_lain': 0.05         # 5% untuk lain-lain
        }
    
    def calculate_annual_shu(self, fiscal_year: int) -> dict:
        """
        Hitung SHU tahunan berdasarkan laporan keuangan
        """
        
        # Get financial data untuk fiscal year
        financial_data = self._get_financial_data(fiscal_year)
        
        # Calculate SHU
        total_revenue = financial_data['total_revenue']
        total_expenses = financial_data['total_expenses']
        shu_before_allocation = total_revenue - total_expenses
        
        # Calculate allocations
        allocations = {}
        for allocation_type, percentage in self.shu_allocation_rules.items():
            allocations[allocation_type] = shu_before_allocation * percentage
        
        return {
            'fiscal_year': fiscal_year,
            'total_revenue': total_revenue,
            'total_expenses': total_expenses,
            'shu_before_allocation': shu_before_allocation,
            'shu_allocations': allocations,
            'total_allocated': sum(allocations.values()),
            'revenue_breakdown': {
                'bunga_pinjaman': financial_data['interest_income'],
                'biaya_admin': financial_data['fee_income'],
                'denda_keterlambatan': financial_data['penalty_income'],
                'pendapatan_lain': financial_data['other_income']
            },
            'expense_breakdown': {
                'gaji_pengurus': financial_data['management_salary'],
                'gaji_karyawan': financial_data['staff_salary'],
                'sewa_kantor': financial_data['office_rent'],
                'listrik': financial_data['utilities'],
                'telepon_internet': financial_data['telecom'],
                'transportasi': financial_data['transportation'],
                'biaya_saaS': financial_data['saas_cost'],
                'kertas_thermal': financial_data['paper_cost'],
                'pengeluaran_lain': financial_data['other_expenses']
            }
        }
    
    def calculate_member_shu_share(self, fiscal_year: int) -> list:
        """
        Hitung bagian SHU untuk setiap anggota
        """
        
        shu_data = self.calculate_annual_shu(fiscal_year)
        jasa_anggota_pool = shu_data['shu_allocations']['jasa_anggota']
        
        # Get member participation data
        members = self._get_active_members(fiscal_year)
        
        member_shu_shares = []
        total_shu_points = 0
        
        # Calculate SHU points untuk setiap member
        for member in members:
            shu_points = self._calculate_member_shu_points(member, fiscal_year)
            total_shu_points += shu_points
            
            member_shu_shares.append({
                'member_id': member['id'],
                'member_name': member['name'],
                'shu_points': shu_points,
                'points_breakdown': self._get_shu_points_breakdown(member, fiscal_year)
            })
        
        # Calculate actual SHU amount untuk setiap member
        for member_share in member_shu_shares:
            member_share['shu_percentage'] = member_share['shu_points'] / total_shu_points
            member_share['shu_amount'] = jasa_anggota_pool * member_share['shu_percentage']
        
        # Sort by SHU amount (descending)
        member_shu_shares.sort(key=lambda x: x['shu_amount'], reverse=True)
        
        return member_shu_shares
    
    def _calculate_member_shu_points(self, member: dict, fiscal_year: int) -> float:
        """
        Calculate SHU points untuk member berdasarkan participation
        """
        
        # Get member activity data untuk fiscal year
        member_data = self._get_member_annual_data(member['id'], fiscal_year)
        
        # SHU points calculation
        points = 0
        
        # Points dari simpanan (40% weight)
        avg_savings_balance = member_data['avg_savings_balance']
        points += avg_savings_balance * 0.0001  # 0.01% per Rp1,000
        
        # Points dari pinjaman (30% weight)
        total_loan_amount = member_data['total_loan_amount']
        points += total_loan_amount * 0.00005  # 0.005% per Rp1,000
        
        # Points dari keaktifan membayar (20% weight)
        on_time_payment_rate = member_data['on_time_payment_rate']
        points += on_time_payment_rate * 100  # Max 100 points
        
        # Points dari lama keanggotaan (10% weight)
        membership_years = member_data['membership_years']
        points += membership_years * 5  # 5 points per year
        
        return points
```

### 💳 **4. Fitur Budgeting & Pengeluaran (Expense Tracking)**

#### **📝 Expense Management System**
```python
# Expense tracking dan budget management system
class ExpenseManagementSystem:
    """
    Comprehensive expense tracking dan budget management
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.expense_categories = {
            'operasional': ['listrik', 'sewa_kantor', 'telepon_internet', 'air'],
            'transportasi': ['bensin_mantri', 'service_motor', 'asuransi_kendaraan'],
            'personalia': ['gaji_pengurus', 'gaji_karyawan', 'bonus', 'thr'],
            'administrasi': ['kertas_thermal', ' ATK', 'biaya_bank', 'pajak'],
            'marketing': ['brosur', 'iklan', 'event', 'komisi_referral']
        }
        self.budget_alerts = {
            'warning_threshold': 0.80,  # 80% of budget
            'critical_threshold': 0.95   # 95% of budget
        }
    
    def create_monthly_budget(self, month: str, year: int, budget_data: dict) -> dict:
        """
        Create monthly budget untuk expense control
        """
        
        budget_id = self._generate_budget_id()
        
        # Validate budget data
        total_budget = sum(budget_data.values())
        if total_budget <= 0:
            raise ValueError("Total budget must be greater than 0")
        
        # Create budget record
        budget = {
            'id': budget_id,
            'month': month,
            'year': year,
            'total_budget': total_budget,
            'category_budgets': budget_data,
            'status': 'active',
            'created_at': datetime.now(),
            'created_by': self.current_user_id
        }
        
        # Store budget
        self._store_budget(budget)
        
        return {
            'success': True,
            'budget_id': budget_id,
            'total_budget': total_budget,
            'message': f"Budget for {month} {year} created successfully"
        }
    
    def submit_expense_claim(self, expense_data: dict) -> dict:
        """
        Submit expense claim untuk approval
        """
        
        claim_id = self._generate_claim_id()
        
        # Validate expense data
        required_fields = ['category', 'amount', 'description', 'receipt_number']
        for field in required_fields:
            if field not in expense_data:
                raise ValueError(f"Missing required field: {field}")
        
        # Check budget availability
        budget_check = self._check_budget_availability(
            expense_data['category'], 
            expense_data['amount']
        )
        
        if not budget_check['available']:
            return {
                'success': False,
                'error': 'Budget exceeded',
                'budget_info': budget_check
            }
        
        # Create expense claim
        claim = {
            'id': claim_id,
            'submitter_id': expense_data.get('submitter_id'),
            'category': expense_data['category'],
            'amount': expense_data['amount'],
            'description': expense_data['description'],
            'receipt_number': expense_data['receipt_number'],
            'receipt_image': expense_data.get('receipt_image'),
            'submission_date': datetime.now(),
            'status': 'pending_approval',
            'approval_workflow': [
                {
                    'step': 1,
                    'approver_role': 'supervisor',
                    'status': 'pending',
                    'approved_at': None,
                    'notes': None
                },
                {
                    'step': 2,
                    'approver_role': 'owner',
                    'status': 'pending',
                    'approved_at': None,
                    'notes': None
                }
            ]
        }
        
        # Store claim
        self._store_expense_claim(claim)
        
        # Send notification ke approvers
        self._send_approval_notification(claim)
        
        return {
            'success': True,
            'claim_id': claim_id,
            'status': 'pending_approval',
            'message': 'Expense claim submitted successfully'
        }
    
    def approve_expense_claim(self, claim_id: str, approver_id: str, action: str, notes: str = None) -> dict:
        """
        Approve atau reject expense claim
        """
        
        claim = self._get_expense_claim(claim_id)
        
        if not claim:
            return {
                'success': False,
                'error': 'Claim not found'
            }
        
        if claim['status'] != 'pending_approval':
            return {
                'success': False,
                'error': f'Claim already {claim["status"]}'
            }
        
        # Find current approval step
        current_step = None
        for step in claim['approval_workflow']:
            if step['status'] == 'pending':
                current_step = step
                break
        
        if not current_step:
            return {
                'success': False,
                'error': 'No pending approval step found'
            }
        
        # Update approval step
        current_step['status'] = action
        current_step['approved_at'] = datetime.now()
        current_step['notes'] = notes
        
        # Check if all steps completed
        all_approved = all(
            step['status'] == 'approved' 
            for step in claim['approval_workflow']
        )
        
        if action == 'rejected':
            claim['status'] = 'rejected'
        elif all_approved:
            claim['status'] = 'approved'
            # Process payment
            self._process_expense_payment(claim)
        else:
            # Send notification ke next approver
            self._send_next_approval_notification(claim)
        
        # Update claim
        self._update_expense_claim(claim)
        
        return {
            'success': True,
            'claim_id': claim_id,
            'status': claim['status'],
            'message': f'Claim {action} successfully'
        }
```

---

### 🔍 **5. Fitur Audit Trail (Cegah Manipulasi Keuangan)**

#### **📋 Comprehensive Audit System**
```python
# Audit trail system untuk financial integrity
class FinancialAuditSystem:
    """
    Comprehensive audit trail system untuk prevent financial manipulation
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.audit_events = [
            'transaction_created',
            'transaction_updated',
            'transaction_deleted',
            'member_created',
            'member_updated',
            'member_deleted',
            'loan_created',
            'loan_updated',
            'loan_deleted',
            'payment_created',
            'payment_updated',
            'payment_deleted',
            'expense_created',
            'expense_updated',
            'expense_deleted',
            'user_login',
            'user_logout',
            'permission_changed',
            'system_config_changed'
        ]
        self.sensitive_fields = [
            'amount',
            'interest_rate',
            'loan_status',
            'payment_status',
            'member_status',
            'bank_account_number'
        ]
    
    def log_financial_event(self, event_type: str, entity_type: str, entity_id: str, 
                          old_data: dict = None, new_data: dict = None, 
                          user_id: str = None, ip_address: str = None) -> dict:
        """
        Log semua financial events dengan complete audit trail
        """
        
        audit_id = self._generate_audit_id()
        
        # Create audit record
        audit_record = {
            'id': audit_id,
            'event_type': event_type,
            'entity_type': entity_type,
            'entity_id': entity_id,
            'user_id': user_id,
            'user_name': self._get_user_name(user_id),
            'ip_address': ip_address,
            'timestamp': datetime.now(),
            'session_id': self._get_current_session_id(),
            'old_data': old_data,
            'new_data': new_data,
            'changes_detected': self._detect_changes(old_data, new_data),
            'risk_level': self._calculate_risk_level(event_type, old_data, new_data),
            'requires_review': self._requires_review(event_type, old_data, new_data)
        }
        
        # Store audit record
        self._store_audit_record(audit_record)
        
        # Check untuk suspicious activity
        if audit_record['risk_level'] >= 'medium':
            self._create_security_alert(audit_record)
        
        return {
            'success': True,
            'audit_id': audit_id,
            'risk_level': audit_record['risk_level'],
            'requires_review': audit_record['requires_review']
        }
    
    def perform_bank_reconciliation(self, bank_account_id: str, 
                                  reconciliation_date: str) -> dict:
        """
        Perform bank reconciliation untuk detect discrepancies
        """
        
        # Get bank statement data
        bank_statement = self._get_bank_statement(bank_account_id, reconciliation_date)
        
        # Get system transaction data
        system_transactions = self._get_system_transactions(bank_account_id, reconciliation_date)
        
        # Perform matching
        reconciliation_result = self._match_transactions(bank_statement, system_transactions)
        
        # Identify discrepancies
        discrepancies = self._identify_discrepancies(reconciliation_result)
        
        # Create reconciliation report
        reconciliation_report = {
            'bank_account_id': bank_account_id,
            'reconciliation_date': reconciliation_date,
            'bank_balance': bank_statement['ending_balance'],
            'system_balance': sum(t['amount'] for t in system_transactions),
            'matched_transactions': len(reconciliation_result['matched']),
            'unmatched_bank_transactions': len(reconciliation_result['unmatched_bank']),
            'unmatched_system_transactions': len(reconciliation_result['unmatched_system']),
            'discrepancies': discrepancies,
            'reconciliation_status': 'balanced' if not discrepancies else 'discrepancies_found',
            'requires_investigation': len(discrepancies) > 0,
            'performed_by': self.current_user_id,
            'performed_at': datetime.now()
        }
        
        # Store reconciliation report
        self._store_reconciliation_report(reconciliation_report)
        
        return reconciliation_report
```

### 📈 **6. Rekomendasi Investasi/Ekspansi**

#### **🎯 Business Intelligence & Recommendations**
```python
# Business intelligence dan investment recommendation system
class BusinessIntelligenceEngine:
    """
    Advanced business intelligence untuk investment dan expansion recommendations
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.analysis_periods = {
            'daily': 7,
            'weekly': 4,
            'monthly': 12,
            'quarterly': 4
        }
        self.performance_thresholds = {
            'excellent': 0.90,
            'good': 0.75,
            'average': 0.60,
            'poor': 0.40
        }
    
    def analyze_market_performance(self, analysis_type: str = 'comprehensive') -> dict:
        """
        Analyze market performance berdasarkan wilayah dan sektor
        """
        
        performance_data = {
            'regional_analysis': self._analyze_regional_performance(),
            'sector_analysis': self._analyze_sector_performance(),
            'mantri_performance': self._analyze_mantri_performance(),
            'product_performance': self._analyze_product_performance(),
            'time_series_analysis': self._analyze_time_series_trends()
        }
        
        # Generate recommendations
        recommendations = self._generate_performance_recommendations(performance_data)
        
        return {
            'analysis_type': analysis_type,
            'analysis_date': datetime.now().date(),
            'performance_data': performance_data,
            'recommendations': recommendations,
            'confidence_score': self._calculate_analysis_confidence(performance_data),
            'data_period': 'Last 90 days'
        }
    
    def generate_expansion_recommendations(self) -> dict:
        """
        Generate comprehensive expansion recommendations
        """
        
        # Get current performance data
        performance_data = self.analyze_market_performance()
        
        # Generate regional expansion recommendations
        regional_recommendations = []
        for region in performance_data['performance_data']['regional_analysis']:
            if region['performance_level'] in ['excellent', 'good'] and region['opportunity_score'] > 0.7:
                regional_recommendations.append({
                    'type': 'regional_expansion',
                    'target': region['region_name'],
                    'recommendation': f"Wilayah {region['region_name']} sangat lancar, disarankan menambah 1 mantri lagi",
                    'justification': f"Collection rate {region['collection_rate']*100:.1f}%, NPL {region['npl_ratio']*100:.1f}%",
                    'estimated_investment': self._calculate_mantri_investment(),
                    'expected_roi': self._calculate_expansion_roi(region),
                    'implementation_timeline': '4-6 weeks',
                    'risk_level': 'low'
                })
        
        # Generate sector focus recommendations
        sector_recommendations = []
        for sector in performance_data['performance_data']['sector_analysis']:
            if sector['profit_margin'] > 0.15 and sector['npl_ratio'] < 0.05:
                sector_recommendations.append({
                    'type': 'sector_focus',
                    'target': sector['sector_name'],
                    'recommendation': f"Sektor {sector['sector_name']} lebih lancar, arahkan pinjaman ke sektor ini",
                    'justification': f"Profit margin {sector['profit_margin']*100:.1f}%, NPL {sector['npl_ratio']*100:.1f}%",
                    'market_size': sector['market_potential'],
                    'growth_potential': sector['growth_trend'],
                    'action_items': self._generate_sector_action_items(sector),
                    'risk_level': 'low'
                })
        
        # Prioritize recommendations
        all_recommendations = regional_recommendations + sector_recommendations
        prioritized_recommendations = self._prioritize_recommendations(all_recommendations)
        
        return {
            'analysis_date': datetime.now().date(),
            'recommendations': prioritized_recommendations,
            'summary': {
                'total_recommendations': len(prioritized_recommendations),
                'high_priority': len([r for r in prioritized_recommendations if r['priority'] == 'high']),
                'medium_priority': len([r for r in prioritized_recommendations if r['priority'] == 'medium']),
                'low_priority': len([r for r in prioritized_recommendations if r['priority'] == 'low']),
                'estimated_total_investment': sum(r.get('estimated_investment', 0) for r in prioritized_recommendations),
                'expected_total_roi': sum(r.get('expected_roi', 0) for r in prioritized_recommendations)
            },
            'implementation_roadmap': self._create_implementation_roadmap(prioritized_recommendations),
            'success_metrics': self._define_success_metrics(prioritized_recommendations)
        }
    
    def _get_regional_recommendation(self, performance_level: str, metrics: dict) -> str:
        """Get recommendation berdasarkan regional performance"""
        
        recommendations = {
            'excellent': {
                'action': 'expand',
                'message': 'Performa excellent, pertimbangkan ekspansi'
            },
            'good': {
                'action': 'optimize',
                'message': 'Performa baik, optimalkan operasional'
            },
            'average': {
                'action': 'improve',
                'message': 'Performa rata-rata, perlu improvement'
            },
            'poor': {
                'action': 'intervene',
                'message': 'Performa buruk, perlu intervensi segera'
            }
        }
        
        return recommendations.get(performance_level, recommendations['average'])
    
    def _get_sector_recommendation(self, sector_id: str, metrics: dict) -> str:
        """Get recommendation berdasarkan sector performance"""
        
        if metrics['npl_ratio'] < 0.03 and metrics['repayment_rate'] > 0.95:
            return f"Sektor {sector_id} sangat sehat, tingkatkan exposure"
        elif metrics['npl_ratio'] < 0.05 and metrics['repayment_rate'] > 0.90:
            return f"Sektor {sector_id} sehat, maintain current level"
        elif metrics['npl_ratio'] < 0.08 and metrics['repayment_rate'] > 0.85:
            return f"Sektor {sector_id} moderate, monitor closely"
        else:
            return f"Sektor {sector_id} berisiko, reduce exposure"
```

## 🤖 **Sistem AI-Driven KPI & Business Intelligence Advisor**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Sistem kecerdasan buatan yang mengolah data historis transaksi menjadi Indikator Kinerja Utama (KPI) dan memberikan rekomendasi bisnis yang akurat. Sistem ini berfungsi sebagai "partner bisnis pintar" yang membantu pemilik koperasi membuat keputusan data-driven.

---

### 💰 **1. Fitur Saran Tambah/Kurang Modal (Liquidity Advisor)**

#### **📊 Liquidity Analysis Engine**
```python
# Liquidity Advisor System
class LiquidityAdvisor:
    """
    AI-driven liquidity management system untuk optimal capital allocation
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.liquidity_thresholds = {
            'cash_shortage': 0.20,      # 20% dari total needs
            'optimal_liquidity': 0.30,   # 30% idle cash optimal
            'excess_cash': 0.50,         # 50% excess cash
            'critical_shortage': 0.10    # 10% critical shortage
        }
        self.analysis_periods = {
            'daily': 7,
            'weekly': 4,
            'monthly': 6,
            'quarterly': 4
        }
    
    def analyze_liquidity_needs(self) -> dict:
        """
        Analisis kebutuhan likuiditas dan berikan rekomendasi capital
        """
        
        # Get current financial position
        current_data = self._get_current_financial_position()
        
        # Analyze savings inflow
        savings_analysis = self._analyze_savings_trends()
        
        # Analyze loan demand
        loan_demand_analysis = self._analyze_loan_demand()
        
        # Calculate liquidity gap
        liquidity_gap = self._calculate_liquidity_gap(current_data, loan_demand_analysis)
        
        # Generate recommendations
        recommendations = self._generate_liquidity_recommendations(
            liquidity_gap, 
            savings_analysis, 
            loan_demand_analysis
        )
        
        return {
            'analysis_date': datetime.now().date(),
            'current_position': current_data,
            'savings_trends': savings_analysis,
            'loan_demand': loan_demand_analysis,
            'liquidity_gap': liquidity_gap,
            'recommendations': recommendations,
            'risk_level': self._assess_liquidity_risk(liquidity_gap),
            'action_priority': self._prioritize_actions(recommendations)
        }
    
    def _analyze_savings_trends(self) -> dict:
        """
        Analisis tren simpanan masuk
        """
        
        # Get 6 months historical data
        historical_savings = self._get_historical_savings_data(months=6)
        
        # Calculate trends
        monthly_avg = sum(historical_savings.values()) / len(historical_savings)
        recent_month = historical_savings[max(historical_savings.keys())]
        previous_month = historical_savings[max(historical_savings.keys()) - 1]
        
        # Calculate growth rate
        growth_rate = (recent_month - previous_month) / previous_month if previous_month > 0 else 0
        
        # Calculate trend direction
        if growth_rate > 0.10:
            trend_direction = 'increasing'
            trend_strength = 'strong'
        elif growth_rate > 0.05:
            trend_direction = 'increasing'
            trend_strength = 'moderate'
        elif growth_rate > -0.05:
            trend_direction = 'stable'
            trend_strength = 'weak'
        else:
            trend_direction = 'decreasing'
            trend_strength = 'strong' if growth_rate < -0.10 else 'moderate'
        
        return {
            'monthly_average': monthly_avg,
            'recent_month': recent_month,
            'growth_rate': growth_rate,
            'trend_direction': trend_direction,
            'trend_strength': trend_strength,
            'volatility': self._calculate_savings_volatility(historical_savings),
            'seasonal_pattern': self._detect_seasonal_pattern(historical_savings)
        }
    
    def _analyze_loan_demand(self) -> dict:
        """
        Analisis permintaan pinjaman
        """
        
        # Get loan application data
        loan_applications = self._get_loan_application_data(months=6)
        loan_disbursements = self._get_loan_disbursement_data(months=6)
        
        # Calculate demand metrics
        total_applications = len(loan_applications)
        approved_applications = len([app for app in loan_applications if app['status'] == 'approved'])
        rejection_rate = (total_applications - approved_applications) / total_applications if total_applications > 0 else 0
        
        # Calculate demand trends
        monthly_demand = {}
        for month_data in loan_applications:
            month = month_data['application_date'].strftime('%Y-%m')
            if month not in monthly_demand:
                monthly_demand[month] = 0
            monthly_demand[month] += 1
        
        # Calculate average loan size
        avg_loan_size = sum(app['requested_amount'] for app in loan_applications) / len(loan_applications) if loan_applications else 0
        
        # Calculate waiting list
        waiting_list = self._get_current_waiting_list()
        waiting_list_amount = sum(app['requested_amount'] for app in waiting_list)
        
        return {
            'total_applications': total_applications,
            'approved_applications': approved_applications,
            'rejection_rate': rejection_rate,
            'monthly_demand': monthly_demand,
            'demand_growth': self._calculate_demand_growth(monthly_demand),
            'average_loan_size': avg_loan_size,
            'waiting_list_count': len(waiting_list),
            'waiting_list_amount': waiting_list_amount,
            'approval_capacity': self._calculate_approval_capacity(),
            'unmet_demand': waiting_list_amount,
            'demand_pressure': self._assess_demand_pressure(waiting_list_amount, avg_loan_size)
        }
    
    def _generate_liquidity_recommendations(self, liquidity_gap: dict, 
                                          savings_analysis: dict, 
                                          loan_demand: dict) -> list:
        """
        Generate rekomendasi likuiditas yang actionable
        """
        
        recommendations = []
        
        # Scenario 1: High demand, low cash
        if (loan_demand['demand_pressure'] == 'high' and 
            liquidity_gap['status'] == 'shortage'):
            
            additional_capital_needed = liquidity_gap['shortage_amount']
            
            recommendations.append({
                'type': 'add_capital',
                'priority': 'high',
                'title': 'Saran Tambah Modal',
                'message': f"Permintaan pinjaman naik {loan_demand['demand_growth']*100:.1f}% bulan ini. Disarankan tambah modal Rp {additional_capital_needed:,} untuk memenuhi kebutuhan pasar.",
                'details': {
                    'current_demand': loan_demand['waiting_list_amount'],
                    'unmet_demand_percentage': (loan_demand['waiting_list_amount'] / (loan_demand['waiting_list_amount'] + liquidity_gap['available_cash'])) * 100,
                    'recommended_amount': additional_capital_needed,
                    'expected_roi': self._calculate_capital_roi(additional_capital_needed),
                    'implementation_time': '2-3 weeks'
                },
                'action_items': [
                    f"Tambah modal Rp {additional_capital_needed:,}",
                    "Review loan approval criteria",
                    "Prepare marketing campaign untuk new borrowers"
                ]
            })
        
        # Scenario 2: Excess cash, low demand
        elif (loan_demand['demand_pressure'] == 'low' and 
              liquidity_gap['status'] == 'excess'):
            
            excess_cash = liquidity_gap['excess_amount']
            
            recommendations.append({
                'type': 'reallocate_capital',
                'priority': 'medium',
                'title': 'Saran Kurangi/Putar Modal',
                'message': f"Dana mengendap Rp {excess_cash:,}. Disarankan alokasikan ke investasi lain atau turunkan bunga pinjaman untuk menarik peminjam baru.",
                'details': {
                    'excess_amount': excess_cash,
                    'excess_percentage': (excess_cash / liquidity_gap['total_cash']) * 100,
                    'current_interest_rate': self._get_current_interest_rate(),
                    'suggested_rate_reduction': self._calculate_optimal_rate_reduction(),
                    'alternative_investments': self._suggest_alternative_investments(excess_cash)
                },
                'action_items': [
                    f"Realokasi Rp {excess_cash:,} ke investasi lain",
                    "Turunkan bunga pinjaman 1-2%",
                    "Intensifkan marketing untuk new borrowers"
                ]
            })
        
        # Scenario 3: Optimal balance
        elif (liquidity_gap['status'] == 'optimal'):
            
            recommendations.append({
                'type': 'maintain_strategy',
                'priority': 'low',
                'title': 'Strategi Likuiditas Optimal',
                'message': "Keseimbangan likuiditas optimal. Pertahankan strategi saat ini.",
                'details': {
                    'current_position': 'Optimal',
                    'cash_ratio': liquidity_gap['cash_ratio'],
                    'demand_supply_balance': loan_demand['demand_pressure']
                },
                'action_items': [
                    "Monitor trends mingguan",
                    "Maintain current approval criteria",
                    "Continue regular performance review"
                ]
            })
        
        return recommendations
```

### 🗺️ **2. Fitur Analisis Ekspansi Wilayah (Expansion Insights)**

#### **📍 Geographic Expansion Analysis**
```python
# Expansion Insights System
class ExpansionInsights:
    """
    AI-driven geographic expansion analysis system
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.performance_metrics = {
            'npl_weight': 0.40,        # 40% weight untuk NPL
            'collection_speed': 0.25,  # 25% weight untuk collection speed
            'growth_rate': 0.20,       # 20% weight untuk growth rate
            'profitability': 0.15      # 15% weight untuk profitability
        }
        self.expansion_thresholds = {
            'excellent': 0.85,
            'good': 0.70,
            'moderate': 0.55,
            'poor': 0.40
        }
    
    def analyze_expansion_opportunities(self) -> dict:
        """
        Analisis peluang ekspansi berdasarkan performa wilayah dan mantri
        """
        
        # Get regional performance data
        regional_performance = self._analyze_regional_performance()
        
        # Get mantri performance data
        mantri_performance = self._analyze_mantri_performance()
        
        # Calculate expansion scores
        expansion_scores = self._calculate_expansion_scores(
            regional_performance, 
            mantri_performance
        )
        
        # Generate expansion recommendations
        recommendations = self._generate_expansion_recommendations(expansion_scores)
        
        # Perform comparative analysis
        comparative_analysis = self._perform_comparative_analysis(regional_performance)
        
        return {
            'analysis_date': datetime.now().date(),
            'regional_performance': regional_performance,
            'mantri_performance': mantri_performance,
            'expansion_scores': expansion_scores,
            'recommendations': recommendations,
            'comparative_analysis': comparative_analysis,
            'market_opportunities': self._identify_market_opportunities(),
            'risk_assessment': self._assess_expansion_risks(expansion_scores)
        }
    
    def _analyze_regional_performance(self) -> list:
        """
        Analisis performa per wilayah dengan GPS data integration
        """
        
        regions = self._get_active_regions()
        regional_analysis = []
        
        for region in regions:
            # Get performance metrics
            metrics = self._calculate_regional_metrics(region['id'])
            
            # Calculate NPL performance
            npl_score = self._calculate_npl_score(metrics['npl_ratio'])
            
            # Calculate collection speed performance
            collection_speed_score = self._calculate_collection_speed_score(
                metrics['avg_collection_days'], 
                metrics['target_collection_days']
            )
            
            # Calculate growth rate performance
            growth_score = self._calculate_growth_score(metrics['monthly_growth_rate'])
            
            # Calculate profitability performance
            profitability_score = self._calculate_profitability_score(
                metrics['net_interest_margin'], 
                metrics['operating_efficiency']
            )
            
            # Calculate overall expansion score
            expansion_score = (
                npl_score * self.performance_metrics['npl_weight'] +
                collection_speed_score * self.performance_metrics['collection_speed'] +
                growth_score * self.performance_metrics['growth_rate'] +
                profitability_score * self.performance_metrics['profitability']
            )
            
            # Determine performance level
            performance_level = self._determine_performance_level(expansion_score)
            
            regional_analysis.append({
                'region_id': region['id'],
                'region_name': region['name'],
                'coordinates': region['coordinates'],
                'metrics': metrics,
                'performance_scores': {
                    'npl_score': npl_score,
                    'collection_speed_score': collection_speed_score,
                    'growth_score': growth_score,
                    'profitability_score': profitability_score,
                    'overall_score': expansion_score
                },
                'performance_level': performance_level,
                'expansion_potential': self._assess_expansion_potential(expansion_score),
                'market_saturation': self._calculate_market_saturation(region['id']),
                'competitive_landscape': self._analyze_competition(region['id']),
                'infrastructure_readiness': self._assess_infrastructure(region['id'])
            })
        
        # Sort by expansion score (descending)
        regional_analysis.sort(key=lambda x: x['performance_scores']['overall_score'], reverse=True)
        
        return regional_analysis
    
    def _perform_comparative_analysis(self, regional_data: list) -> dict:
        """
        Lakukan perbandingan antar wilayah untuk expansion insights
        """
        
        comparisons = []
        
        # Compare top performing regions
        top_regions = regional_data[:3]  # Top 3 regions
        
        for i, region_a in enumerate(top_regions):
            for region_b in top_regions[i+1:]:
                comparison = {
                    'region_a': region_a['region_name'],
                    'region_b': region_b['region_name'],
                    'npl_comparison': self._compare_npl(region_a, region_b),
                    'collection_speed_comparison': self._compare_collection_speed(region_a, region_b),
                    'growth_comparison': self._compare_growth(region_a, region_b),
                    'profitability_comparison': self._compare_profitability(region_a, region_b),
                    'recommendation': self._generate_expansion_choice(region_a, region_b)
                }
                comparisons.append(comparison)
        
        return {
            'comparisons': comparisons,
            'best_performing_region': regional_data[0]['region_name'] if regional_data else None,
            'worst_performing_region': regional_data[-1]['region_name'] if regional_data else None,
            'expansion_recommendations': self._generate_expansion_choices(comparisons)
        }
    
    def _generate_expansion_recommendations(self, expansion_scores: list) -> list:
        """
        Generate rekomendasi ekspansi yang spesifik dan actionable
        """
        
        recommendations = []
        
        # Get top expansion opportunities
        top_opportunities = [s for s in expansion_scores if s['expansion_potential'] == 'high'][:3]
        
        for opportunity in top_opportunities:
            if opportunity['performance_level'] in ['excellent', 'good']:
                
                recommendations.append({
                    'type': 'regional_expansion',
                    'priority': 'high',
                    'target_region': opportunity['region_name'],
                    'title': f'Ekspansi ke {opportunity["region_name"]}',
                    'message': self._generate_expansion_message(opportunity),
                    'details': {
                        'npl_ratio': opportunity['metrics']['npl_ratio'],
                        'collection_efficiency': opportunity['metrics']['collection_efficiency'],
                        'growth_rate': opportunity['metrics']['monthly_growth_rate'],
                        'market_saturation': opportunity['market_saturation'],
                        'expected_roi': self._calculate_expansion_roi(opportunity),
                        'investment_required': self._calculate_expansion_investment(opportunity),
                        'payback_period': self._calculate_payback_period(opportunity)
                    },
                    'action_items': self._generate_expansion_action_items(opportunity),
                    'risk_factors': self._identify_expansion_risks(opportunity),
                    'success_probability': self._calculate_success_probability(opportunity)
                })
        
        # Generate recommendations untuk underperforming regions
        underperforming = [s for s in expansion_scores if s['performance_level'] in ['poor']]
        for region in underperforming:
            recommendations.append({
                'type': 'performance_improvement',
                'priority': 'medium',
                'target_region': region['region_name'],
                'title': f'Perbaikan Performa {region["region_name"]}',
                'message': f'Wilayah {region["region_name"]} memerlukan intervensi untuk meningkatkan performa.',
                'details': {
                    'main_issues': self._identify_performance_issues(region),
                    'improvement_potential': self._calculate_improvement_potential(region),
                    'required_actions': self._recommend_improvement_actions(region)
                }
            })
        
        return recommendations
    
    def _generate_expansion_message(self, opportunity: dict) -> str:
        """
        Generate pesan rekomendasi ekspansi yang persuasive
        """
        
        metrics = opportunity['metrics']
        
        if metrics['npl_ratio'] < 0.02 and metrics['collection_efficiency'] > 0.95:
            return f"Wilayah {opportunity['region_name']} memiliki NPL {metrics['npl_ratio']*100:.1f}% dan efisiensi penagihan {metrics['collection_efficiency']*100:.1f}%. Sangat aman untuk ekspansi."
        elif metrics['monthly_growth_rate'] > 0.15:
            return f"{opportunity['region_name']} menunjukkan pertumbuhan {metrics['monthly_growth_rate']*100:.1f}% per bulan. Potensi keuntungan besar dengan tambahan mantri."
        elif metrics['avg_collection_days'] < metrics['target_collection_days'] - 2:
            return f"Pasar {opportunity['region_name']} memiliki rata-rata pelunasan lebih cepat {metrics['target_collection_days'] - metrics['avg_collection_days']:.0f} hari dari target. Potensi keuntungan lebih besar."
        else:
            return f"Wilayah {opportunity['region_name']} menunjukkan performa solid dengan NPL {metrics['npl_ratio']*100:.1f}% dan pertumbuhan stabil. Cocok untuk ekspansi bertahap."
```

### 🏪 **3. Fitur Saran Segmentasi Usaha (Sector Analysis)**

#### **📊 Sector Performance Analysis**
```python
# Sector Analysis System
class SectorAnalysis:
    """
    AI-driven sector analysis untuk identify most resilient business segments
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.sector_categories = {
            'bahan_pokok': {
                'name': 'Bahan Pokok',
                'subcategories': ['sayur', 'beras', 'sembako', 'dagang_kecil']
            },
            'pakaian': {
                'name': 'Pakaian & Tekstil',
                'subcategories': ['konveksi', 'toko_pakaian', 'jahit']
            },
            'jasa': {
                'name': 'Usaha Jasa',
                'subcategories': ['service_motor', 'salon', 'bengkel', 'jasa_lain']
            },
            'industri': {
                'name': 'Industri Kecil',
                'subcategories': ['kerajinan', 'makanan', 'produksi_kecil']
            },
            'pertanian': {
                'name': 'Pertanian/Perkebunan',
                'subcategories': ['tani', 'kebun', 'peternakan']
            },
            'lainnya': {
                'name': 'Lainnya',
                'subcategories': ['lain_lain']
            }
        }
        self.performance_weights = {
            'repayment_rate': 0.35,      # 35% weight untuk repayment rate
            'npl_ratio': 0.25,           # 25% weight untuk NPL ratio
            'profit_margin': 0.20,       # 20% weight untuk profit margin
            'growth_rate': 0.15,         # 15% weight untuk growth rate
            'stability': 0.05            # 5% weight untuk stability
        }
    
    def analyze_sector_performance(self, analysis_period: int = 6) -> dict:
        """
        Analisis performa sektor usaha untuk identify most resilient segments
        """
        
        # Get sector performance data
        sector_data = self._get_sector_performance_data(months=analysis_period)
        
        # Calculate performance metrics per sector
        sector_performance = []
        
        for sector_id, sector_info in self.sector_categories.items():
            performance = self._calculate_sector_performance(sector_id, sector_data)
            
            # Calculate resilience score
            resilience_score = self._calculate_resilience_score(performance)
            
            # Determine sector health
            sector_health = self._determine_sector_health(resilience_score)
            
            sector_performance.append({
                'sector_id': sector_id,
                'sector_name': sector_info['name'],
                'subcategories': sector_info['subcategories'],
                'performance_metrics': performance,
                'resilience_score': resilience_score,
                'sector_health': sector_health,
                'market_size': self._calculate_sector_market_size(sector_id),
                'growth_potential': self._assess_growth_potential(sector_id, performance),
                'risk_level': self._assess_sector_risk(sector_id, performance),
                'recommendations': self._generate_sector_recommendations(sector_id, performance)
            })
        
        # Sort by resilience score (descending)
        sector_performance.sort(key=lambda x: x['resilience_score'], reverse=True)
        
        # Generate comparative analysis
        comparative_analysis = self._perform_sector_comparison(sector_performance)
        
        # Generate portfolio recommendations
        portfolio_recommendations = self._generate_portfolio_recommendations(sector_performance)
        
        return {
            'analysis_date': datetime.now().date(),
            'analysis_period': f"{analysis_period} months",
            'sector_performance': sector_performance,
            'comparative_analysis': comparative_analysis,
            'portfolio_recommendations': portfolio_recommendations,
            'market_trends': self._analyze_market_trends(),
            'seasonal_patterns': self._detect_seasonal_patterns(),
            'risk_assessment': self._assess_portfolio_risk(sector_performance)
        }
    
    def _calculate_sector_performance(self, sector_id: str, sector_data: dict) -> dict:
        """
        Calculate comprehensive performance metrics untuk specific sector
        """
        
        # Filter data untuk specific sector
        sector_loan_data = [loan for loan in sector_data['loans'] if loan['sector'] == sector_id]
        sector_payment_data = [payment for payment in sector_data['payments'] if payment['sector'] == sector_id]
        
        # Calculate repayment rate
        total_payments = sum(payment['amount'] for payment in sector_payment_data)
        total_due = sum(loan['scheduled_payment'] for loan in sector_loan_data)
        repayment_rate = total_payments / total_due if total_due > 0 else 0
        
        # Calculate NPL ratio
        npl_amount = sum(loan['outstanding'] for loan in sector_loan_data if loan['days_overdue'] > 30)
        total_outstanding = sum(loan['outstanding'] for loan in sector_loan_data)
        npl_ratio = npl_amount / total_outstanding if total_outstanding > 0 else 0
        
        # Calculate profit margin
        interest_income = sum(loan['interest_paid'] for loan in sector_loan_data)
        operating_costs = self._calculate_sector_operating_costs(sector_id)
        profit_margin = (interest_income - operating_costs) / interest_income if interest_income > 0 else 0
        
        # Calculate growth rate
        monthly_loans = self._group_loans_by_month(sector_loan_data)
        growth_rate = self._calculate_sector_growth_rate(monthly_loans)
        
        # Calculate stability (volatility)
        repayment_volatility = self._calculate_repayment_volatility(sector_payment_data)
        stability_score = max(0, 1 - repayment_volatility)  # Higher stability = lower volatility
        
        return {
            'repayment_rate': repayment_rate,
            'npl_ratio': npl_ratio,
            'profit_margin': profit_margin,
            'growth_rate': growth_rate,
            'stability_score': stability_score,
            'total_loans': len(sector_loan_data),
            'total_outstanding': total_outstanding,
            'average_loan_size': total_outstanding / len(sector_loan_data) if sector_loan_data else 0,
            'repayment_volatility': repayment_volatility,
            'default_rate': self._calculate_default_rate(sector_loan_data),
            'prepayment_rate': self._calculate_prepayment_rate(sector_loan_data),
            'seasonal_impact': self._calculate_seasonal_impact(sector_id, sector_loan_data)
        }
    
    def _calculate_resilience_score(self, performance: dict) -> float:
        """
        Calculate resilience score berdasarkan multiple performance metrics
        """
        
        # Normalize metrics (0-1 scale)
        repayment_score = min(1.0, performance['repayment_rate'])  # Higher is better
        npl_score = max(0.0, 1.0 - (performance['npl_ratio'] * 10))  # Lower NPL is better
        profit_score = min(1.0, max(0.0, performance['profit_margin'] * 5))  # Higher profit is better
        growth_score = min(1.0, max(0.0, performance['growth_rate'] * 10))  # Higher growth is better
        stability_score = performance['stability_score']  # Higher stability is better
        
        # Calculate weighted score
        resilience_score = (
            repayment_score * self.performance_weights['repayment_rate'] +
            npl_score * self.performance_weights['npl_ratio'] +
            profit_score * self.performance_weights['profit_margin'] +
            growth_score * self.performance_weights['growth_rate'] +
            stability_score * self.performance_weights['stability']
        )
        
        return resilience_score
    
    def _generate_sector_recommendations(self, sector_id: str, performance: dict) -> list:
        """
        Generate actionable recommendations untuk specific sector
        """
        
        recommendations = []
        
        # High performing sector recommendations
        if performance['repayment_rate'] > 0.95 and performance['npl_ratio'] < 0.02:
            recommendations.append({
                'type': 'expand_exposure',
                'priority': 'high',
                'title': 'Tingkatkan Exposure',
                'message': f"Sektor {self.sector_categories[sector_id]['name']} sangat sehat dengan repayment rate {performance['repayment_rate']*100:.1f}% dan NPL {performance['npl_ratio']*100:.1f}%. Tingkatkan exposure ke sektor ini.",
                'action_items': [
                    f"Tingkatkan limit pinjaman untuk sektor {self.sector_categories[sector_id]['name']}",
                    "Target marketing ke sektor ini",
                    "Sederhanakan approval process untuk sektor ini"
                ]
            })
        
        # Underperforming sector recommendations
        elif performance['repayment_rate'] < 0.85 or performance['npl_ratio'] > 0.08:
            recommendations.append({
                'type': 'reduce_exposure',
                'priority': 'medium',
                'title': 'Kurangi Exposure',
                'message': f"Sektor {self.sector_categories[sector_id]['name']} menunjukkan risiko tinggi. Pertimbangkan untuk mengurangi exposure.",
                'action_items': [
                    f"Perketat underwriting untuk sektor {self.sector_categories[sector_id]['name']}",
                    "Tingkatkan monitoring untuk sector ini",
                    "Pertimbangkan higher interest rate untuk compensation risk"
                ]
            })
        
        # Growth opportunity recommendations
        elif performance['growth_rate'] > 0.15:
            recommendations.append({
                'type': 'growth_opportunity',
                'priority': 'medium',
                'title': 'Peluang Pertumbuhan',
                'message': f"Sektor {self.sector_categories[sector_id]['name']} menunjukkan pertumbuhan {performance['growth_rate']*100:.1f}% per bulan. Peluang bagus untuk ekspansi.",
                'action_items': [
                    "Develop produk khusus untuk sector ini",
                    "Target marketing campaign untuk sector ini",
                    "Consider partnership dengan industry association"
                ]
            })
        
        return recommendations
```

                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="sector-rank-item poor-performing">

                </div>
                <div class="performance-indicators">

                        <span class="value">75%</span>
                    </div>

                    </div>

                        <span class="label">Pertumbuhan:</span>
                        <span class="value">-2%</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="sector-recommendations">
        <h3>Rekomendasi Segmentasi</h3>
        <div class="recommendation-list">
            <div class="recommendation-card high-priority">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <div class="priority-indicator high"></div>
                    <h4>🟢 Prioritaskan Sektor Bahan Pokok</h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-content">
                    <p class="recommendation-text">
                        Data 6 bulan terakhir menunjukkan pedagang Sayur memiliki tingkat kelancaran 98%, sedangkan pedagang Pakaian hanya 75%. Disarankan prioritaskan pinjaman untuk sektor Bahan Pokok.
                    </p>
                    <div class="sector-details">
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="label">Repayment rate:</span>
                            <span class="value excellent">98%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="label">NPL ratio:</span>
                            <span class="value excellent">0.8%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="label">Profit margin:</span>
                            <span class="value good">12%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="label">Stability:</span>
                            <span class="value excellent">95%</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="action-items">
                        <h5>Action Items:</h5>
                        <ul>
                            <li>Tingkatkan limit pinjaman untuk sektor Bahan Pokok</li>
                            <li>Target marketing campaign ke pedagang sayur dan sembako</li>
                            <li>Sederhanakan approval process untuk sektor ini</li>
                            <li>Develop produk khusus untuk kebutuhan sektor ini</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                    <div class="action-buttons">
                        <button class="btn-primary">Terapkan Strategi</button>
                        <button class="btn-secondary">Lihat Detail Analisis</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="sector-charts">
        <div class="chart-container">
            <h3>Performa Sektor 6 Bulan Terakhir</h3>
            <canvas id="sector-performance-chart"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-container">
            <h3>Distribusi Portfolio per Sektor</h3>
            <canvas id="portfolio-distribution-chart"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
