### 📱 **4. Modul Survei Lapangan (Mantri App)**

#### **4.1 Field Survey Integration**
```sql
CREATE TABLE field_surveys (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    member_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES members(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    surveyor_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
    survey_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    survey_type ENUM('New_Application', 'Verification', 'Collection', 'NPL_Followup') NOT NULL,
    
    -- Location data
    survey_latitude DECIMAL(10,8),
    survey_longitude DECIMAL(11,8),
    gps_accuracy DECIMAL(5,2),
    
    -- Survey findings
    business_status ENUM('Active', 'Closed', 'Moved', 'Temporarily_Closed'),
    premises_condition ENUM('Good', 'Fair', 'Poor'),
    owner_present BOOLEAN,
    family_members_present INT,
    
    -- Photo evidence
    photos JSONB, -- Array of photo paths with descriptions
    
    -- Risk assessment
    risk_indicators TEXT[],
    surveyor_notes TEXT,
    recommendation ENUM('Approve', 'Reject', 'Manual_Review', 'Further_Verification'),
    
    -- Verification results
    verified_address BOOLEAN,
    verified_business BOOLEAN,
    verified_family BOOLEAN,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_field_surveys_member ON field_surveys(member_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_field_surveys_surveyor ON field_surveys(surveyor_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_field_surveys_date ON field_surveys(survey_date);
```

#### **4.2 Nearby Members Detection for Field Survey**
```sql
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_nearby_members_for_survey(
    p_tenant_id UUID,
    p_latitude DECIMAL,
    p_longitude DECIMAL,
    p_radius_meters DECIMAL DEFAULT 100
) RETURNS TABLE(
    member_id UUID,
    member_name VARCHAR,
    member_address TEXT,
    distance_meters DECIMAL,
    loan_status VARCHAR,
    days_overdue INT,
    risk_level VARCHAR,
    last_payment_date DATE
) AS $$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
        m.id as member_id,
        m.nama_anggota as member_name,
        b.alamat_usaha as member_address,
        (6371 * acos(
            cos(radians(p_latitude)) * cos(radians(b.latitude)) * 
            cos(radians(b.longitude) - radians(p_longitude)) + 
            sin(radians(p_latitude)) * sin(radians(b.latitude))
        ) * 1000) as distance_meters,
        COALESCE(l.status_pinjaman, 'No Loan') as loan_status,
        CASE 
            WHEN l.tanggal_jatuh_tempo IS NOT NULL THEN 
                CURRENT_DATE - l.tanggal_jatuh_tempo
            ELSE NULL
        END as days_overdue,
        CASE 
            WHEN l.status_pinjaman = 'Macet' THEN 'Critical'
            WHEN (CURRENT_DATE - l.tanggal_jatuh_tempo) > 7 THEN 'High'
            WHEN (CURRENT_DATE - l.tanggal_jatuh_tempo) > 3 THEN 'Medium'
            ELSE 'Low'
        END as risk_level,
        (
            SELECT MAX(li.created_at)::DATE
            FROM loan_installments li
            WHERE li.loan_id = l.id
        ) as last_payment_date
    FROM members m
    JOIN businesses b ON m.id = b.member_id
    LEFT JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id AND l.status_pinjaman IN ('Aktif', 'Macet')
    WHERE m.tenant_id = p_tenant_id
      AND m.status_anggota = 'Aktif'
      AND (
          6371 * acos(
              cos(radians(p_latitude)) * cos(radians(b.latitude)) * 
              cos(radians(b.longitude) - radians(p_longitude)) + 
              sin(radians(p_latitude)) * sin(radians(b.latitude))
          ) * 1000
      ) <= p_radius_meters
    ORDER BY distance_meters;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
```

---

### 🚨 **5. Blacklist & Linkage Management**

#### **5.1 Blacklist Indicators Table**
```sql
CREATE TABLE blacklist_indicators (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    indicator_type ENUM('No_KK', 'Alamat', 'No_HP', 'Email', 'KTP', 'Face_Encoding') NOT NULL,
    indicator_value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    blacklist_reason TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_member_id UUID REFERENCES members(id), -- Member yang menyebabkan blacklist
    risk_level ENUM('Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Critical') NOT NULL,
    auto_block BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP, -- NULL untuk permanent blacklist
    created_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    
    UNIQUE(tenant_id, indicator_type, indicator_value)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_blacklist_tenant ON blacklist_indicators(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_blacklist_type_value ON blacklist_indicators(indicator_type, indicator_value);
CREATE INDEX idx_blacklist_source ON blacklist_indicators(source_member_id);
```

#### **5.2 Automatic Blacklist Trigger**
```sql
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION trigger_family_blacklist()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    -- When a loan becomes NPL, blacklist related family members
    IF NEW.status_pinjaman = 'Macet' AND OLD.status_pinjaman != 'Macet' THEN
        -- Get family relations
        INSERT INTO blacklist_indicators (
            tenant_id, indicator_type, indicator_value, 
            blacklist_reason, source_member_id, risk_level, auto_block
        )
        SELECT 
            l.tenant_id,
            'No_KK',
            m.no_kk,
            CONCAT('Family member of ', m.nama_anggota, ' has NPL status'),
            l.member_id,
            'High',
            (SELECT config_value::BOOLEAN FROM system_config WHERE config_key = 'auto_blacklist_family')
        FROM loans l
        JOIN members m ON l.member_id = m.id
        WHERE l.id = NEW.id
          AND m.no_kk IS NOT NULL
        ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, indicator_type, indicator_value) 
        DO UPDATE SET 
            blacklist_reason = EXCLUDED.blacklist_reason,
            risk_level = EXCLUDED.risk_level,
            auto_block = EXCLUDED.auto_block;
    END IF;
    
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

-- Create trigger
CREATE TRIGGER family_blacklist_trigger
    AFTER UPDATE ON loans
    FOR EACH ROW
    EXECUTE FUNCTION trigger_family_blacklist();
```

---

### 🔄 **6. Complete User Flow Implementation**

#### **6.1 Registration with Fraud Detection**
```sql
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION register_member_with_fraud_detection(
    p_tenant_id UUID,
    p_member_data JSONB,
    p_business_data JSONB,
    p_face_encoding VECTOR(128) DEFAULT NULL
) RETURNS TABLE(
    registration_status VARCHAR,
    risk_level VARCHAR,
    risk_score INT,
    fraud_indicators TEXT[],
    recommendation VARCHAR,
    member_id UUID
) AS $$
DECLARE
    v_member_id UUID;
    v_risk_score INT := 0;
    v_fraud_indicators TEXT[] := '{}';
    v_risk_level VARCHAR := 'Low';
    v_recommendation VARCHAR := 'APPROVE';
BEGIN
    -- Step 1: Basic validation
    -- Check blacklist indicators
    IF EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM blacklist_indicators bi
        WHERE bi.tenant_id = p_tenant_id
          AND (
              (bi.indicator_type = 'No_KK' AND bi.indicator_value = p_member_data->>'no_kk')
              OR (bi.indicator_type = 'No_HP' AND bi.indicator_value = p_member_data->>'no_telepon')
              OR (bi.indicator_type = 'KTP' AND bi.indicator_value = p_member_data->>'nik')
          )
          AND (bi.expires_at IS NULL OR bi.expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    ) THEN
        v_risk_score := v_risk_score + 50;
        v_fraud_indicators := array_append(v_fraud_indicators, 'Blacklisted identifier found');
    END IF;
    
    -- Step 2: Family linkage detection
    FOR linked_member IN 
        SELECT * FROM detect_family_linkage(
            p_tenant_id,
            p_member_data->>'no_kk',
            p_member_data->>'emergency_contact_phone',
            p_business_data->>'latitude'::DECIMAL,
            p_business_data->>'longitude'::DECIMAL
        )
    LOOP
        v_risk_score := v_risk_score + 30;
        v_fraud_indicators := array_append(v_fraud_indicators, 
            CONCAT('Family linkage: ', linked_member.relation_type));
    END LOOP;
    
    -- Step 3: Address fraud detection
    FOR address_risk IN 
        SELECT * FROM detect_address_fraud(
            p_tenant_id,
            p_business_data->>'latitude'::DECIMAL,
            p_business_data->>'longitude'::DECIMAL
        )
    LOOP
        v_risk_score := v_risk_score + address_risk.risk_score;
        v_fraud_indicators := array_cat(v_fraud_indicators, address_risk.risk_factors);
    END LOOP;
    
    -- Step 4: Determine risk level and recommendation
    IF v_risk_score >= 80 THEN
        v_risk_level := 'Critical';
        v_recommendation := 'REJECT';
    ELSIF v_risk_score >= 60 THEN
        v_risk_level := 'High';
        v_recommendation := 'MANUAL_REVIEW';
    ELSIF v_risk_score >= 40 THEN
        v_risk_level := 'Medium';
        v_recommendation := 'VERIFICATION_REQUIRED';
    ELSE
        v_risk_level := 'Low';
        v_recommendation := 'APPROVE';
    END IF;
    
    -- Step 5: Create member if not rejected
    IF v_recommendation != 'REJECT' THEN
        INSERT INTO members (
            tenant_id, nik, nama_anggota, alamat_rumah, no_telepon, no_whatsapp,
            no_kk, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_phone,
            emergency_contact_relation, risk_score, risk_level,
            family_linkage_detected, linkage_notes, status_anggota
        ) VALUES (
            p_tenant_id,
            p_member_data->>'nik',
            p_member_data->>'nama_anggota',
            p_member_data->>'alamat_rumah',
            p_member_data->>'no_telepon',
            p_member_data->>'no_whatsapp',
            p_member_data->>'no_kk',
            p_member_data->>'emergency_contact_name',
            p_member_data->>'emergency_contact_phone',
            p_member_data->>'emergency_contact_relation',
            v_risk_score,
            v_risk_level,
            CASE WHEN v_fraud_indicators IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
            array_to_string(v_fraud_indicators, '; '),
            CASE WHEN v_recommendation = 'APPROVE' THEN 'Aktif' ELSE 'Calon' END
        ) RETURNING id INTO v_member_id;
        
        -- Insert business data
        INSERT INTO businesses (
            member_id, tenant_id, nama_usaha, jenis_usaha, alamat_usaha,
            latitude, longitude, status_usaha
        ) VALUES (
            v_member_id,
            p_tenant_id,
            p_business_data->>'nama_usaha',
            p_business_data->>'jenis_usaha',
            p_business_data->>'alamat_usaha',
            p_business_data->>'latitude'::DECIMAL,
            p_business_data->>'longitude'::DECIMAL,
            'Aktif'
        );
    END IF;
    
    -- Step 6: Return results
    RETURN QUERY SELECT 
        v_recommendation as registration_status,
        v_risk_level as risk_level,
        v_risk_score as risk_score,
        v_fraud_indicators as fraud_indicators,
        v_recommendation as recommendation,
        v_member_id as member_id;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
```

---

### 📊 **7. Dashboard & Monitoring**

#### **7.1 Fraud Detection Dashboard View**
```sql
CREATE VIEW v_fraud_dashboard AS
SELECT 
    t.id as tenant_id,
    t.nama_koperasi,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN m.risk_level = 'Critical' THEN 1 END) as critical_risk_members,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN m.risk_level = 'High' THEN 1 END) as high_risk_members,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN m.risk_level = 'Medium' THEN 1 END) as medium_risk_members,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN m.family_linkage_detected = TRUE THEN 1 END) as family_linkage_detected,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status_pinjaman = 'Macet' THEN 1 END) as active_npl_count,
    COUNT(CASE 
        WHEN l.status_pinjaman = 'Macet' 
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM member_relations mr 
            WHERE mr.member_id_1 = l.member_id OR mr.member_id_2 = l.member_id
        ) 
        THEN 1 
    END) as npl_with_family_links,
    AVG(m.risk_score) as avg_risk_score,
    MAX(m.risk_score) as max_risk_score
FROM tenants t
LEFT JOIN members m ON t.id = m.tenant_id
LEFT JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id
GROUP BY t.id, t.nama_koperasi;
```

#### **7.2 Fraud Alert System**
```sql
CREATE TABLE fraud_alerts (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    alert_type ENUM('Family_Linkage', 'Address_Cluster', 'Blacklist_Match', 'Face_Similarity', 'NPL_Spike') NOT NULL,
    severity ENUM('Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Critical') NOT NULL,
    member_ids UUID[], -- Array of member IDs involved
    alert_title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    alert_description TEXT NOT NULL,
    alert_data JSONB, -- Detailed alert data
    status ENUM('New', 'Reviewing', 'Resolved', 'False_Positive') DEFAULT 'New',
    assigned_to UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    resolved_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    resolved_at TIMESTAMP,
    resolution_notes TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_fraud_alerts_tenant ON fraud_alerts(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_fraud_alerts_status ON fraud_alerts(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_fraud_alerts_severity ON fraud_alerts(severity);
```

---

### 🎯 **8. Key Benefits & ROI**

#### **✅ Fraud Prevention Benefits**
- **Early Detection**: Identifikasi potensi fraud sebelum approval
- **Family Linkage**: Deteksi hubungan keluarga untuk prevent NPL spread
- **Geospatial Analysis**: Validasi lokasi untuk detect address fraud
- **AI Face Recognition**: Teknologi modern untuk identity verification

#### **✅ Operational Efficiency**
- **Automated Risk Scoring**: Objective assessment untuk consistency
- **Field Survey Integration**: Verifikasi lapangan yang terintegrasi
- **Real-time Alerts**: Proactive notification untuk immediate action
- **Audit Trail**: Complete documentation untuk compliance

#### **✅ Business Impact**
- **NPL Reduction**: Prevent bad loans melalui better screening
- **Risk Management**: Data-driven decision making
- **Customer Quality**: Better member selection process
- **Regulatory Compliance**: Comprehensive fraud detection system

---

### 🚀 **9. Implementation Strategy**

#### **9.1 Phase 1: Basic Family Detection**
- Implement KK matching and emergency contact validation
- Add address geofencing with 50m radius
- Create basic risk scoring system

#### **9.2 Phase 2: Advanced Analytics**
- Add face recognition capabilities
- Implement machine learning for pattern detection
- Create predictive fraud scoring

#### **9.3 Phase 3: Full Integration**
- Integrate with field survey app
- Implement real-time alert system
- Add comprehensive reporting dashboard

## 🐍 **Pseudocode Implementation - Fraud Detection Algorithm**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Implementasi lengkap algoritma deteksi fraud yang berjalan di backend saat registrasi anggota baru. Sistem ini secara otomatis mendeteksi potensi hubungan keluarga dengan nasabah macet untuk mencegah penyalahgunaan.

---

### 📋 **1. Main Fraud Detection Function**

```python
FUNCTION Cek_Potensi_Keluarga_Macet(data_pendaftar_baru):
    """
    Fungsi utama untuk mendeteksi potensi fraud berdasarkan family linkage
    dan lokasi geografis. Dijalankan saat registrasi anggota baru.
    
    Args:
        data_pendaftar_baru: Object dengan data registrasi
            - nik: String (Nomor KTP)
            - nomor_kk: String (Nomor Kartu Keluarga)
            - no_whatsapp: String (Nomor HP)
            - koordinat_gps: Tuple (latitude, longitude)
            - emergency_contact_hp: String (Kontak darurat)
            - nama_lengkap: String (Nama pendaftar)
    
    Returns:
        Tuple: (status_pengajuan, pesan, detail_risiko)
    """
    
    # 1. Inisialisasi status awal
    skor_risiko = 0
    catatan_risiko = []
    indikator_fraud = []
    status_pengajuan = "PENDING"
    
    # 2. Ambil data dari input pendaftar
    nik_baru = data_pendaftar_baru.nik
    kk_baru = data_pendaftar_baru.nomor_kk
    hp_baru = data_pendaftar_baru.no_whatsapp
    lokasi_baru = data_pendaftar_baru.koordinat_gps  # (lat, long)
    emergency_hp = data_pendaftar_baru.emergency_contact_hp
    nama_baru = data_pendaftar_baru.nama_lengkap
    
    # 3. CEK BERDASARKAN NOMOR KK (Keluarga Inti) - RED FLAG MAXIMUM
    nasabah_satu_kk = Query_Database("""
        SELECT m.nama_anggota, m.no_telepon, l.total_tagihan, l.sisa_tagihan,
               l.tanggal_cair, l.tanggal_jatuh_tempo
        FROM members m 
        JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id 
        WHERE m.nomor_kk = %s 
          AND m.status_anggota = 'Aktif'
          AND l.status_pinjaman = 'Macet'
        LIMIT 1
    """, (kk_baru,))
    
    IF nasabah_satu_kk EXISTS:
        skor_risiko += 100  # Skor maksimal untuk KK matching
        catatan_risiko.append(
            f"RED FLAG: Terdeteksi anggota keluarga (satu KK) memiliki pinjaman MACET: {nasabah_satu_kk.nama_anggota}"
        )
        indikator_fraud.append({
            'type': 'KK_MATCH',
            'severity': 'CRITICAL',
            'description': f'Same KK number with NPL member: {nasabah_satu_kk.nama_anggota}',
            'npl_amount': nasabah_satu_kk.sisa_tagihan,
            'overdue_days': (CURRENT_DATE - nasabah_satu_kk.tanggal_jatuh_tempo).days
        })
    
    # 4. CEK BERDASARKAN KONTAK DARURAT (Relasi HP) - MEDIUM RISK
    relasi_kontak = Query_Database("""
        SELECT m.nama_anggota, m.no_telepon, l.sisa_tagihan,
               m.emergency_contact_relation
        FROM members m 
        JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id 
        WHERE m.emergency_contact_hp = %s 
          AND m.status_anggota = 'Aktif'
          AND l.status_pinjaman = 'Macet'
        LIMIT 1
    """, (hp_baru,))
    
    IF relasi_kontak EXISTS:
        skor_risiko += 50
        catatan_risiko.append(
            f"MEDIUM RISK: Nomor HP pendaftar terdaftar sebagai kontak darurat nasabah MACET: {relasi_kontak.nama_anggota}"
        )
        indikator_fraud.append({
            'type': 'CONTACT_MATCH',
            'severity': 'HIGH',
            'description': f'Phone number used as emergency contact by NPL member: {relasi_kontak.nama_anggota}',
            'relation': relasi_kontak.emergency_contact_relation,
            'npl_amount': relasi_kontak.sisa_tagihan
        })
    
    # 5. CEK BERDASARKAN LOKASI (Geofencing 50 Meter) - LOW-MEDIUM RISK
    tetangga_macet = Query_Database("""
        SELECT m.nama_anggota, m.alamat_rumah, l.sisa_tagihan,
               ST_Distance(
                   ST_Point(%s, %s)::geography,
                   ST_Point(b.longitude, b.latitude)::geography
               ) as distance_meters
        FROM members m 
        JOIN businesses b ON m.id = b.member_id
        JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id 
        WHERE m.status_anggota = 'Aktif'
          AND l.status_pinjaman = 'Macet'
          AND ST_DWithin(
              ST_Point(%s, %s)::geography,
              ST_Point(b.longitude, b.latitude)::geography,
              50  -- 50 meters
          )
        ORDER BY distance_meters
        LIMIT 3
    """, (lokasi_baru[0], lokasi_baru[1], lokasi_baru[0], lokasi_baru[1]))
    
    IF tetangga_macet EXISTS:
        skor_risiko += 30
        lokasi_terdekat = tetangga_macet[0]
        catatan_risiko.append(
            f"LOCATION RISK: Lokasi pendaftar berjarak {round(lokasi_terdekat.distance_meters, 1)}m dari nasabah MACET: {lokasi_terdekat.nama_anggota}"
        )
        indikator_fraud.append({
            'type': 'LOCATION_MATCH',
            'severity': 'MEDIUM',
            'description': f'Location proximity ({round(lokasi_terdekat.distance_meters, 1)}m) with NPL member: {lokasi_terdekat.nama_anggota}',
            'distance': lokasi_terdekat.distance_meters,
            'npl_amount': lokasi_terdekat.sisa_tagihan
        })
    
    # 6. CEK BERDASARKAN EMERGENCY CONTACT REVERSE LOOKUP
    emergency_reverse = Query_Database("""
        SELECT m.nama_anggota, l.sisa_tagihan, m.emergency_contact_name
        FROM members m 
        JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id 
        WHERE m.no_telepon = %s 
          AND m.status_anggota = 'Aktif'
          AND l.status_pinjaman = 'Macet'
          AND m.emergency_contact_hp = %s
        LIMIT 1
    """, (emergency_hp, hp_baru))
    
    IF emergency_reverse EXISTS:
        skor_risiko += 25
        catatan_risiko.append(
            f"CONTACT REVERSE: Kontak darurat pendaftar ({emergency_hp}) adalah nasabah MACET: {emergency_reverse.nama_anggota}"
        )
        indikator_fraud.append({
            'type': 'REVERSE_CONTACT',
            'severity': 'MEDIUM',
            'description': f'Emergency contact is NPL member: {emergency_reverse.nama_anggota}',
            'npl_amount': emergency_reverse.sisa_tagihan
        })
    
    # 7. CEK BLACKLIST INDICATORS
    blacklist_check = Query_Database("""
        SELECT indicator_type, indicator_value, blacklist_reason, risk_level
        FROM blacklist_indicators 
        WHERE tenant_id = %s
          AND (
              (indicator_type = 'No_KK' AND indicator_value = %s)
              OR (indicator_type = 'No_HP' AND indicator_value = %s)
              OR (indicator_type = 'KTP' AND indicator_value = %s)
          )
          AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    """, (data_pendaftar_baru.tenant_id, kk_baru, hp_baru, nik_baru))
    
    IF blacklist_check EXISTS:
        for blacklist in blacklist_check:
            skor_risiko += 40
            catatan_risiko.append(
                f"BLACKLIST: {blacklist.indicator_type} terblacklist - {blacklist.blacklist_reason}"
            )
            indikator_fraud.append({
                'type': 'BLACKLIST',
                'severity': blacklist.risk_level,
                'description': blacklist.blacklist_reason,
                'indicator_type': blacklist.indicator_type
            })
    
    # 8. PENENTUAN HASIL AKHIR
    IF skor_risiko >= 100:
        status_pengajuan = "REJECTED_AUTOMATIC"
        pesan = "Pengajuan DITOLAK OTOMATIS: Terdeteksi hubungan keluarga dengan nasabah macet. Silakan selesaikan kewajiban keluarga terlebih dahulu."
        action_required = "NONE"
    ELIF skor_risiko >= 50:
        status_pengajuan = "NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW"
        pesan = "Membutuhkan VERIFIKASI MANUAL: Terdeteksi indikasi hubungan dengan nasabah macet. Manager akan melakukan review."
        action_required = "MANAGER_REVIEW"
    ELIF skor_risiko >= 30:
        status_pengajuan = "NEEDS_FIELD_VERIFICATION"
        pesan = "Membutuhkan VERIFIKASI LAPANGAN: Terdeteksi kemiripan data. Mantri akan melakukan survei tambahan."
        action_required = "FIELD_SURVEY"
    ELSE:
        status_pengajuan = "APPROVED_TO_SURVEY"
        pesan = "Data BERSIH: Lanjut proses survei lapangan normal."
        action_required = "STANDARD_SURVEY"
    
    # 9. SIMPAN HASIL KE LOG UNTUK ADMIN
    detail_analisis = {
        'nik': nik_baru,
        'nama': nama_baru,
        'skor_risiko': skor_risiko,
        'status_pengajuan': status_pengajuan,
        'catatan_risiko': catatan_risiko,
        'indikator_fraud': indikator_fraud,
        'action_required': action_required,
        'timestamp': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
        'tenant_id': data_pendaftar_baru.tenant_id
    }
    
    Simpan_Log_Analisis(detail_analisis)
    
    # 10. TRIGGER NOTIFIKASI JIKA DIPERLUKAN
    IF skor_risiko >= 50:
        Trigger_Notifikasi_Manager(detail_analisis)
    
    RETURN status_pengajuan, pesan, detail_analisis
```

---

### 🗄️ **2. Database Query Functions**

```python
FUNCTION Query_Database(query, params):
    """
    Fungsi helper untuk eksekusi query dengan error handling
    """
    try:
        connection = Get_Database_Connection()
        cursor = connection.cursor()
        cursor.execute(query, params)
        result = cursor.fetchall()
        connection.close()
        return result
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"Database error: {e}")
        return None

FUNCTION Simpan_Log_Analisis(detail_analisis):
    """
    Menyimpan hasil analisis fraud detection ke database
    """
    query = """
    INSERT INTO fraud_detection_logs (
        tenant_id, nik_pendaftar, nama_pendaftar, skor_risiko,
        status_pengajuan, catatan_risiko, indikator_fraud,
        action_required, created_at
    ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    """
    
    params = (
        detail_analisis['tenant_id'],
        detail_analisis['nik'],
        detail_analisis['nama'],
        detail_analisis['skor_risiko'],
        detail_analisis['status_pengajuan'],
        json.dumps(detail_analisis['catatan_risiko']),
        json.dumps(detail_analisis['indikator_fraud']),
        detail_analisis['action_required']
    )
    
    Query_Database(query, params)

FUNCTION Trigger_Notifikasi_Manager(detail_analisis):
    """
    Mengirim notifikasi ke manager jika terdeteksi high risk
    """
    notifikasi = {
        'type': 'FRAUD_ALERT',
        'severity': 'HIGH' if detail_analisis['skor_risiko'] >= 50 else 'MEDIUM',
        'title': f'Fraud Detection Alert - {detail_analisis["nama"]}',
        'message': f'Terdeteksi potensi fraud dengan skor {detail_analisis["skor_risiko"]}',
        'data': detail_analisis,
        'tenant_id': detail_analisis['tenant_id']
    }
    
    # Kirim ke notification queue
    Insert_Notification_Queue(notifikasi)
```

---

### 📱 **3. API Endpoint Implementation**

```python
# Flask/FastAPI Endpoint
@app.route('/api/members/register-check', methods=['POST'])
@require_auth
def check_fraud_detection():
    """
    API endpoint untuk fraud detection saat registrasi
    """
    try:
        data = request.get_json()
        
        # Validate input
        required_fields = ['nik', 'nomor_kk', 'no_whatsapp', 'koordinat_gps', 'nama_lengkap']
        for field in required_fields:
            if field not in data:
                return jsonify({'error': f'Missing required field: {field}'}), 400
        
        # Add tenant_id from authenticated user
        data['tenant_id'] = get_current_tenant_id()
        
        # Run fraud detection
        status, message, detail = Cek_Potensi_Keluarga_Macet(data)
        
        # Return response
        response = {
            'status': status,
            'message': message,
            'risk_score': detail['skor_risiko'],
            'risk_indicators': detail['indikator_fraud'],
            'next_action': detail['action_required'],
            'can_proceed': status in ['APPROVED_TO_SURVEY', 'NEEDS_FIELD_VERIFICATION']
        }
        
        return jsonify(response), 200
        
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"Fraud detection API error: {e}")
        return jsonify({'error': 'Internal server error'}), 500
```

---

### 🎛️ **4. Manager Review Interface**

```python
@app.route('/api/fraud/review/<log_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
@require_manager_role
def review_fraud_case(log_id):
    """
    Interface untuk manager review kasus fraud
    """
    if request.method == 'GET':
        # Get detailed fraud analysis
        query = """
        SELECT * FROM fraud_detection_logs 
        WHERE id = %s AND tenant_id = %s
        """
        result = Query_Database(query, (log_id, get_current_tenant_id()))
        
        if not result:
            return jsonify({'error': 'Case not found'}), 404
        
        case_data = result[0]
        
        # Get additional member data for context
        member_query = """
        SELECT * FROM members 
        WHERE nik = %s AND tenant_id = %s
        """
        member_data = Query_Database(member_query, (case_data['nik_pendaftar'], get_current_tenant_id()))
        
        return jsonify({
            'case': case_data,
            'member': member_data[0] if member_data else None,
            'actions': ['APPROVE', 'REJECT', 'REQUEST_MORE_INFO']
        })
    
    elif request.method == 'POST':
        # Process manager decision
        decision = request.get_json()
        action = decision.get('action')
        notes = decision.get('notes', '')
        
        # Update case status
        update_query = """
        UPDATE fraud_detection_logs 
        SET manager_decision = %s, manager_notes = %s, 
            reviewed_by = %s, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        WHERE id = %s AND tenant_id = %s
        """
        
        Query_Database(update_query, (
            action, notes, get_current_user_id(), 
            log_id, get_current_tenant_id()
        ))
        
        # If approved, update member status
        if action == 'APPROVE':
            Update_Member_Status(case_data['nik_pendaftar'], 'Approved_for_Survey')
        elif action == 'REJECT':
            Update_Member_Status(case_data['nik_pendaftar'], 'Rejected')
        
        return jsonify({'message': 'Decision recorded successfully'})
```

---

### 📊 **5. Dashboard Integration**

```python
@app.route('/api/dashboard/fraud-alerts')
@require_auth
def get_fraud_dashboard():
    """
    Dashboard data untuk monitoring fraud alerts
    """
    tenant_id = get_current_tenant_id()
    
    # Get recent fraud cases
    recent_cases = Query_Database("""
        SELECT * FROM fraud_detection_logs 
        WHERE tenant_id = %s 
          AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
        ORDER BY skor_risiko DESC, created_at DESC
        LIMIT 10
    """, (tenant_id,))
    
    # Get statistics
    stats = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            COUNT(*) as total_checks,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN skor_risiko >= 100 THEN 1 END) as auto_rejected,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN skor_risiko >= 50 AND skor_risiko < 100 THEN 1 END) as manual_review,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN skor_risiko >= 30 AND skor_risiko < 50 THEN 1 END) as field_verification,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN skor_risiko < 30 THEN 1 END) as approved,
            AVG(skor_risiko) as avg_risk_score
        FROM fraud_detection_logs 
        WHERE tenant_id = %s 
          AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    """, (tenant_id,))
    
    # Get risk indicators breakdown
    risk_breakdown = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            json_array_elements(indikator_fraud)->>'type' as indicator_type,
            COUNT(*) as count
        FROM fraud_detection_logs 
        WHERE tenant_id = %s 
          AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
          AND indikator_fraud IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY indicator_type
        ORDER BY count DESC
    """, (tenant_id,))
    
    return jsonify({
        'recent_cases': recent_cases,
        'statistics': stats[0] if stats else {},
        'risk_breakdown': risk_breakdown
    })
```

### 🔧 **6. Configuration & Settings**

```python
# Fraud detection settings
FRAUD_DETECTION_CONFIG = {
    'thresholds': {
        'auto_reject': 100,      # KK match
        'manual_review': 50,      # Emergency contact match
        'field_verification': 30, # Location match
        'blacklist_penalty': 40   # Blacklist indicator
    },
    'geofencing': {
        'radius_meters': 50,
        'max_nearby_members': 3
    },
    'notifications': {
        'notify_manager_above_score': 50,
        'email_alerts': True,
        'push_notifications': True
    }
}

FUNCTION Get_Fraud_Config(setting_key):
    """
    Get configuration from database or fallback to defaults
    """
    config_query = """
    SELECT config_value FROM system_config 
    WHERE config_key = %s AND tenant_id = %s
    """
    
    result = Query_Database(config_query, (setting_key, get_current_tenant_id()))
    
    if result:
        return result[0]['config_value']
    else:
        return FRAUD_DETECTION_CONFIG.get(setting_key)
```

### 📈 **7. Performance Optimization**

```python
# Caching untuk frequently accessed data
@cache.memoize(timeout=300)  # 5 minutes cache
FUNCTION Get_NPL_Members_By_Location(tenant_id, lat, lng, radius):
    """
    Cached function untuk location-based NPL checks
    """
    query = """
    SELECT m.id, m.nama_anggota, m.no_telepon,
           ST_Distance(
               ST_Point(%s, %s)::geography,
               ST_Point(b.longitude, b.latitude)::geography
           ) as distance
    FROM members m 
    JOIN businesses b ON m.id = b.member_id
    JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id 
    WHERE m.tenant_id = %s
      AND m.status_anggota = 'Aktif'
      AND l.status_pinjaman = 'Macet'
      AND ST_DWithin(
          ST_Point(%s, %s)::geography,
          ST_Point(b.longitude, b.latitude)::geography,
          %s
      )
    ORDER BY distance
    """
    
    return Query_Database(query, (lat, lng, tenant_id, lat, lng, radius))

# Batch processing untuk multiple checks
FUNCTION Batch_Fraud_Check(registrations_data):
    """
    Process multiple fraud checks in batch for efficiency
    """
    results = []
    
    # Pre-load NPL data for the tenant
    npl_data = Preload_NPL_Data(registrations_data[0]['tenant_id'])
    
    for registration in registrations_data:
        result = Cek_Potensi_Keluarga_Macet(registration, npl_data)
        results.append(result)
    
    return results
```

---

### 🎯 **8. Key Implementation Notes**

#### **✅ Scoring System Logic**
- **KK Match (100 points)**: Automatic rejection - same family unit
- **Emergency Contact (50 points)**: Manual review - potential family connection
- **Location Match (30 points)**: Field verification - could be neighbor or family
- **Blacklist (40 points)**: Additional risk layer
- **Reverse Contact (25 points)**: Cross-reference validation

#### **✅ Distance Calculation**
- **PostGIS with ST_DWithin**: Accurate geospatial queries
- **Haversine formula**: Fallback for non-spatial databases
- **50-meter radius**: Optimal balance between false positives and detection

#### **✅ Audit Trail**
- **Complete logging**: Every check stored with timestamp
- **Decision tracking**: Manager reviews and actions recorded
- **Performance metrics**: System effectiveness monitoring

#### **✅ Integration Points**
- **Registration API**: Real-time checking during signup
- **Manager Dashboard**: Review interface for high-risk cases
- **Field Survey App**: Additional verification workflow
- **Notification System**: Alert routing to appropriate staff

#### **✅ Error Handling**
- **Graceful degradation**: System continues if one check fails
- **Fallback mechanisms**: Alternative detection methods
- **Comprehensive logging**: All errors tracked for debugging

---

---

## 🔔 **Real-time Notification System - Admin Alert "Keluarga Macet"**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Sistem notifikasi real-time yang memberikan alert instan kepada admin/manajer saat terdeteksi potensi fraud "Keluarga Macet". Sistem ini memungkinkan pengambilan keputusan cepat untuk mencegah penyalahgunaan sebelum loan dicairkan.

---

### 📱 **1. Alert Types & Priorities**

#### **1.1 "Keluarga Macet" Alert Classification**
```python
FRAUD_ALERT_TYPES = {
    'KK_MATCH_CRITICAL': {
        'severity': 'CRITICAL',
        'priority': 1,
        'title_template': '🚨 KRITIS: KK Sama dengan Nasabah Macet',
        'message_template': 'Terdeteksi calon anggota {nama} dengan KK yang sama dengan nasabah macet {npl_nama}',
        'action_required': 'IMMEDIATE_REJECTION',
        'auto_action': True,
        'notification_channels': ['App', 'Email', 'SMS', 'WhatsApp']
    },
    'FAMILY_LINKAGE_HIGH': {
        'severity': 'HIGH',
        'priority': 2,
        'title_template': '⚠️ TINGGI: Terdeteksi Hubungan Keluarga',
        'message_template': 'Calon anggota {nama} memiliki kemiripan data dengan nasabah macet {npl_nama}',
        'action_required': 'MANAGER_REVIEW',
        'auto_action': False,
        'notification_channels': ['App', 'Email', 'WhatsApp']
    },
    'LOCATION_PROXIMITY': {
        'severity': 'MEDIUM',
        'priority': 3,
        'title_template': '📍 LOKASI: Alamat Dekat Nasabah Macet',
        'message_template': 'Calon anggota {nama} berlokasi {distance}m dari nasabah macet {npl_nama}',
        'action_required': 'FIELD_VERIFICATION',
        'auto_action': False,
        'notification_channels': ['App']
    },
    'BLACKLIST_MATCH': {
        'severity': 'HIGH',
        'priority': 2,
        'title_template': '🚫 BLACKLIST: Terdeteksi Indikator Blacklist',
        'message_template': 'Calon anggota {nama} terdeteksi dalam blacklist: {reason}',
        'action_required': 'MANUAL_REVIEW',
        'auto_action': False,
        'notification_channels': ['App', 'Email']
    }
}
```

#### **1.2 Alert Escalation Rules**
```python
ESCALATION_RULES = {
    'critical_timeout_minutes': 5,    # Escalate if no action in 5 minutes
    'high_timeout_minutes': 30,       # Escalate if no action in 30 minutes
    'medium_timeout_minutes': 120,    # Escalate if no action in 2 hours
    'escalation_channels': {
        'critical': ['App', 'SMS', 'Phone_Call'],
        'high': ['App', 'Email', 'WhatsApp'],
        'medium': ['App', 'Email']
    }
}
```

---

### 🚀 **2. Real-time Alert Generation**

#### **2.1 Alert Trigger Function**
```python
FUNCTION Trigger_Fraud_Alert(fraud_analysis_data):
    """
    Generate real-time alert untuk admin saat fraud detection
    """
    
    # Determine alert type based on risk indicators
    alert_type = Determine_Alert_Type(fraud_analysis_data)
    alert_config = FRAUD_ALERT_TYPES[alert_type]
    
    # Create alert object
    alert_data = {
        'alert_id': Generate_UUID(),
        'tenant_id': fraud_analysis_data['tenant_id'],
        'alert_type': alert_type,
        'severity': alert_config['severity'],
        'priority': alert_config['priority'],
        'title': alert_config['title_template'].format(
            nama=fraud_analysis_data['nama'],
            npl_nama=Get_NPL_Name(fraud_analysis_data)
        ),
        'message': alert_config['message_template'].format(
            nama=fraud_analysis_data['nama'],
            npl_nama=Get_NPL_Name(fraud_analysis_data),
            distance=Get_Distance(fraud_analysis_data),
            reason=Get_Blacklist_Reason(fraud_analysis_data)
        ),
        'member_data': fraud_analysis_data,
        'action_required': alert_config['action_required'],
        'created_at': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
        'expires_at': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + timedelta(hours=24),
        'status': 'NEW'
    }
    
    # Save to database
    Save_Fraud_Alert(alert_data)
    
    # Queue notifications
    Queue_Notifications(alert_data, alert_config['notification_channels'])
    
    # Set escalation timer
    Set_Escalation_Timer(alert_data, alert_config['severity'])
    
    # Send immediate push notification
    Send_Push_Notification(alert_data)
    
    return alert_data

FUNCTION Determine_Alert_Type(fraud_data):
    """
    Determine alert type based on fraud indicators
    """
    indicators = fraud_data['indikator_fraud']
    
    for indicator in indicators:
        if indicator['type'] == 'KK_MATCH':
            return 'KK_MATCH_CRITICAL'
        elif indicator['type'] == 'CONTACT_MATCH':
            return 'FAMILY_LINKAGE_HIGH'
        elif indicator['type'] == 'BLACKLIST':
            return 'BLACKLIST_MATCH'
        elif indicator['type'] == 'LOCATION_MATCH':
            return 'LOCATION_PROXIMITY'
    
    return 'GENERAL_RISK'
```

#### **2.2 Push Notification Implementation**
```python
FUNCTION Send_Push_Notification(alert_data):
    """
    Send real-time push notification to admin devices
    """
    
    # Get active admin users for tenant
    admin_users = Query_Database("""
        SELECT u.id, u.device_token, u.notification_preferences
        FROM users u
        WHERE u.tenant_id = %s
          AND u.role IN ('Admin', 'Manager')
          AND u.status_aktif = TRUE
          AND u.device_token IS NOT NULL
    """, (alert_data['tenant_id'],))
    
    for admin in admin_users:
        # Check notification preferences
        preferences = json.loads(admin['notification_preferences'])
        if not preferences.get('fraud_alerts', True):
            continue
        
        # Prepare push notification payload
        push_payload = {
            'to': admin['device_token'],
            'notification': {
                'title': alert_data['title'],
                'body': alert_data['message'],
                'sound': 'emergency' if alert_data['severity'] == 'CRITICAL' else 'default',
                'badge': Get_Unread_Alert_Count(admin['id']),
                'data': {
                    'alert_id': alert_data['alert_id'],
                    'type': 'fraud_alert',
                    'severity': alert_data['severity'],
                    'action_required': alert_data['action_required'],
                    'member_name': alert_data['member_data']['nama'],
                    'risk_score': alert_data['member_data']['skor_risiko']
                }
            },
            'priority': 'high' if alert_data['severity'] == 'CRITICAL' else 'normal'
        }
        
        # Send via Firebase/FCM
        Send_Firebase_Notification(push_payload)
        
        # Log notification
        Log_Notification_Sent(admin['id'], alert_data['alert_id'], 'push')

FUNCTION Send_Firebase_Notification(payload):
    """
    Send notification via Firebase Cloud Messaging
    """
    try:
        response = requests.post(
            'https://fcm.googleapis.com/fcm/send',
            headers={
                'Authorization': f'Bearer {FIREBASE_SERVER_KEY}',
                'Content-Type': 'application/json'
            },
            json=payload,
            timeout=10
        )
        
        if response.status_code == 200:
            result = response.json()
            if result.get('failure', 0) > 0:
                Log_Error(f"FCM delivery failed: {result}")
        else:
            Log_Error(f"FCM request failed: {response.status_code}")
            
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"FCM notification error: {e}")
```

### 📧 **3. Multi-Channel Notification System**

#### **3.1 WhatsApp Business API Integration**
```python
FUNCTION Send_WhatsApp_Alert(alert_data, admin_phone):
    """
    Send alert via WhatsApp Business API
    """
    
    if alert_data['severity'] not in ['CRITICAL', 'HIGH']:
        return  # Only critical/high alerts via WhatsApp
    
    whatsapp_message = f"""
🚨 *FRAUD DETECTION ALERT* 🚨

*{alert_data['title']}*

{alert_data['message']}

📊 *Risk Score:* {alert_data['member_data']['skor_risiko']}
👤 *Member:* {alert_data['member_data']['nama']}
🆔 *NIK:* {alert_data['member_data']['nik']}

⚡ *Action Required:* {alert_data['action_required']}

📱 *Login to review:* {APP_BASE_URL}/fraud/{alert_data['alert_id']}

---
*Sistem Koperasi Harian*
    """.strip()
    
    whatsapp_payload = {
        'messaging_product': 'messages',
        'to': f'whatsapp:{admin_phone}',
        'type': 'template',
        'template': {
            'name': 'fraud_alert',
            'language': {'code': 'id'},
            'components': [{
                'type': 'body',
                'parameters': [
                    {'type': 'text', 'text': alert_data['title']},
                    {'type': 'text', 'text': alert_data['message']},
                    {'type': 'text', 'text': str(alert_data['member_data']['skor_risiko'])},
                    {'type': 'text', 'text': alert_data['member_data']['nama']},
                    {'type': 'text', 'text': alert_data['action_required']}
                ]
            }]
        }
    }
    
    # Send via WhatsApp API
    Send_WhatsApp_API_Request(whatsapp_payload)

FUNCTION Send_WhatsApp_API_Request(payload):
    """
    Send WhatsApp Business API request
    """
    try:
        response = requests.post(
            f'https://graph.facebook.com/v18.0/{WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID}/messages',
            headers={
                'Authorization': f'Bearer {WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}',
                'Content-Type': 'application/json'
            },
            json=payload,
            timeout=15
        )
        
        if response.status_code != 200:
            Log_Error(f"WhatsApp API error: {response.text}")
            
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"WhatsApp notification error: {e}")
```

#### **3.2 Email Notification System**
```python
FUNCTION Send_Email_Alert(alert_data):
    """
    Send detailed email alert to admins
    """
    
    # Get admin emails
    admin_emails = Query_Database("""
        SELECT u.email, u.nama_lengkap
        FROM users u
        WHERE u.tenant_id = %s
          AND u.role IN ('Admin', 'Manager')
          AND u.status_aktif = TRUE
          AND u.email IS NOT NULL
    """, (alert_data['tenant_id'],))
    
    for admin in admin_emails:
        # Prepare email content
        email_html = Generate_Alert_Email_HTML(alert_data, admin['nama_lengkap'])
        
        # Send email
        Send_Email(
            to=admin['email'],
            subject=f"[{alert_data['severity']}] {alert_data['title']}",
            html_body=email_html,
            priority='high' if alert_data['severity'] == 'CRITICAL' else 'normal'
        )

FUNCTION Generate_Alert_Email_HTML(alert_data, admin_name):
    """
    Generate HTML email template for fraud alert
    """
    
    risk_color = {
        'CRITICAL': '#dc3545',
        'HIGH': '#fd7e14',
        'MEDIUM': '#ffc107',
        'LOW': '#28a745'
    }
    
    html_template = f"""
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Fraud Detection Alert</title>
    <style>
        body {{ font-family: Arial, sans-serif; margin: 0; padding: 20px; }}
        .alert-header {{ background: {risk_color[alert_data['severity']]}; color: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; }}
        .alert-body {{ background: #f8f9fa; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-top: none; }}
        .risk-score {{ font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; color: {risk_color[alert_data['severity']]}; }}
        .action-button {{ background: #007bff; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; margin: 10px 0; }}
        .risk-indicators {{ margin: 15px 0; }}
        .indicator {{ background: white; padding: 10px; margin: 5px 0; border-left: 4px solid #007bff; }}
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="alert-header">
        <h1>🚨 Fraud Detection Alert</h1>
        <p>Hai {admin_name}, terdeteksi potensi fraud yang memerlukan perhatian Anda.</p>
    </div>
    
    <div class="alert-body">
        <h2>{alert_data['title']}</h2>
        <p>{alert_data['message']}</p>
        
        <div class="risk-score">
            Risk Score: {alert_data['member_data']['skor_risiko']}/100
        </div>
        
        <h3>📊 Member Details:</h3>
        <ul>
            <li><strong>Nama:</strong> {alert_data['member_data']['nama']}</li>
            <li><strong>NIK:</strong> {alert_data['member_data']['nik']}</li>
            <li><strong>No. KK:</strong> {alert_data['member_data'].get('nomor_kk', 'N/A')}</li>
            <li><strong>No. HP:</strong> {alert_data['member_data'].get('no_whatsapp', 'N/A')}</li>
        </ul>
        
        <h3>⚠️ Risk Indicators:</h3>
        <div class="risk-indicators">
        """
    
    for indicator in alert_data['member_data']['indikator_fraud']:
        html_template += f"""
            <div class="indicator">
                <strong>{indicator['type']}:</strong> {indicator['description']}
            </div>
        """
    
    html_template += f"""
        </div>
        
        <h3>🎯 Action Required:</h3>
        <p><strong>{alert_data['action_required']}</strong></p>
        
        <a href="{APP_BASE_URL}/fraud/{alert_data['alert_id']}" class="action-button">
            Review Case Now
        </a>
        
        <p><small>Alert ID: {alert_data['alert_id']} | Generated: {alert_data['created_at']}</small></p>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
    """
    
    return html_template
```

### ⏰ **4. Escalation System**

#### **4.1 Automatic Escalation Timer**
```python
FUNCTION Set_Escalation_Timer(alert_data, severity):
    """
    Set automatic escalation timer for unattended alerts
    """
    
    timeout_minutes = ESCALATION_RULES[f'{severity.lower()}_timeout_minutes']
    escalation_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + timedelta(minutes=timeout_minutes)
    
    # Schedule escalation job
    Schedule_Escalation_Job(alert_data['alert_id'], escalation_time, severity)

FUNCTION Schedule_Escalation_Job(alert_id, escalation_time, severity):
    """
    Schedule escalation job using task queue (Celery/Redis)
    """
    from tasks import escalate_fraud_alert
    
    # Schedule task
    escalate_fraud_alert.apply_async(
        args=[alert_id, severity],
        eta=escalation_time,
        expires=escalation_time + timedelta(minutes=30)
    )

# Celery task for escalation
@celery.task
FUNCTION escalate_fraud_alert(alert_id, severity):
    """
    Escalate alert if still unattended
    """
    
    # Check alert status
    alert = Query_Database("""
        SELECT * FROM fraud_alerts 
        WHERE id = %s AND status = 'NEW'
    """, (alert_id,))
    
    if not alert:
        return  # Alert already handled
    
    alert_data = alert[0]
    
    # Determine escalation channels
    escalation_channels = ESCALATION_RULES['escalation_channels'][severity.lower()]
    
    # Send escalated notifications
    for channel in escalation_channels:
        if channel == 'Phone_Call':
            Trigger_Emergency_Call(alert_data)
        else:
            Send_Escalated_Notification(alert_data, channel)
    
    # Update alert status
    Update_Alert_Status(alert_id, 'ESCALATED')
    
    # Log escalation
    Log_Alert_Escalation(alert_id, severity, escalation_channels)

FUNCTION Trigger_Emergency_Call(alert_data):
    """
    Trigger automated phone call for critical alerts
    """
    
    # Get primary admin phone
    admin_phone = Query_Database("""
        SELECT no_telepon FROM users 
        WHERE tenant_id = %s AND role = 'Admin' AND status_aktif = TRUE
        ORDER BY last_login_at DESC LIMIT 1
    """, (alert_data['tenant_id'],))
    
    if admin_phone:
        # Use text-to-speech service for automated call
        call_message = f"""
        Perhatian. Terdeteksi fraud kritis di sistem Koperasi Harian.
        {alert_data['title']}.
        {alert_data['message']}.
        Risk score {alert_data['member_data']['skor_risiko']}.
        Segera login ke sistem untuk melakukan review.
        """
        
        Trigger_Voice_Call(admin_phone['no_telepon'], call_message)

FUNCTION Trigger_Voice_Call(phone_number, message):
    """
    Trigger automated voice call using TTS service
    """
    try:
        response = requests.post(
            VOICE_CALL_API_URL,
            json={
                'api_key': VOICE_CALL_API_KEY,
                'to': phone_number,
                'message': message,
                'voice': 'id-ID',  # Indonesian voice
                'language': 'id'
            },
            timeout=20
        )
        
        if response.status_code != 200:
            Log_Error(f"Voice call failed: {response.text}")
            
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"Voice call error: {e}")
```

### 📱 **5. Mobile App Integration**

#### **5.1 Real-time WebSocket Connection**
```javascript
// Client-side JavaScript for mobile app
class FraudAlertManager {
    constructor() {
        this.socket = null;
        this.alertSound = new Audio('/sounds/emergency.mp3');
        this.connect();
    }
    
    connect() {
        this.socket = io(`${WS_BASE_URL}/fraud-alerts`, {
            auth: {
                token: getAuthToken(),
                tenant_id: getCurrentTenantId()
            }
        });
        
        this.socket.on('connect', () => {
            console.log('Connected to fraud alert stream');
        });
        
        this.socket.on('fraud_alert', (alert) => {
            this.handleNewAlert(alert);
        });
        
        this.socket.on('alert_updated', (alert) => {
            this.handleAlertUpdate(alert);
        });
    }
    
    handleNewAlert(alert) {
        // Show immediate notification
        this.showNotification(alert);
        
        // Play sound for critical alerts
        if (alert.severity === 'CRITICAL') {
            this.alertSound.play();
        }
        
        // Update UI
        this.updateAlertList(alert);
        
        // Show popup for critical alerts
        if (alert.severity === 'CRITICAL') {
            this.showCriticalAlertPopup(alert);
        }
    }
    
    showNotification(alert) {
        // Use mobile notification API
        if (Notification.permission === 'granted') {
            new Notification(alert.title, {
                body: alert.message,
                icon: '/icons/warning.png',
                badge: '/icons/badge.png',
                tag: alert.alert_id,
                requireInteraction: alert.severity === 'CRITICAL',
                actions: [
                    {
                        action: 'review',
                        title: 'Review Now'
                    },
                    {
                        action: 'dismiss',
                        title: 'Dismiss'
                    }
                ]
            });
        }
    }
    
    showCriticalAlertPopup(alert) {
        // Show modal popup for critical alerts
        const modal = document.createElement('div');
        modal.className = 'critical-alert-modal';
        modal.innerHTML = `
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="alert-header critical">
                    <h2>🚨 CRITICAL ALERT</h2>
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">
                    <h3>${alert.title}</h3>
                    <p>${alert.message}</p>
                    <div class="risk-score">Risk Score: ${alert.member_data.skor_risiko}/100</div>
                    <div class="member-info">
                        <strong>Member:</strong> ${alert.member_data.nama}<br>
                        <strong>NIK:</strong> ${alert.member_data.nik}
                    </div>
                    <div class="actions">
                        <button onclick="reviewAlert('${alert.alert_id}')" class="btn-primary">
                            Review Now
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="dismissAlert('${alert.alert_id}')" class="btn-secondary">
                            Dismiss
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        document.body.appendChild(modal);
        
        // Auto-dismiss after 30 seconds if no action
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (document.body.contains(modal)) {
                modal.remove();
            }
        }, 30000);
    }
}

// Initialize alert manager
const alertManager = new FraudAlertManager();
```

#### **5.2 Alert Dashboard Mobile View**
```javascript
// Mobile alert dashboard component
class AlertDashboard {
    constructor() {
        this.alerts = [];
        this.filters = {
            severity: 'all',
            status: 'all',
            timeRange: '24h'
        };
        this.loadAlerts();
    }
    
    async loadAlerts() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/fraud/alerts', {
                headers: {
                    'Authorization': `Bearer ${getAuthToken()}`
                }
            });
            
            this.alerts = await response.json();
            this.renderAlerts();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Failed to load alerts:', error);
        }
    }
    
    renderAlerts() {
        const container = document.getElementById('alerts-container');
        container.innerHTML = '';
        
        const filteredAlerts = this.filterAlerts();
        
        filteredAlerts.forEach(alert => {
            const alertElement = this.createAlertElement(alert);
            container.appendChild(alertElement);
        });
    }
    
    createAlertElement(alert) {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = `alert-item ${alert.severity.toLowerCase()} ${alert.status.toLowerCase()}`;
        
        div.innerHTML = `
            <div class="alert-header">
                <span class="severity-badge ${alert.severity.toLowerCase()}">${alert.severity}</span>
                <span class="timestamp">${this.formatTime(alert.created_at)}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="alert-content">
                <h4>${alert.title}</h4>
                <p>${alert.message}</p>
                <div class="member-details">
                    <span class="member-name">${alert.member_data.nama}</span>
                    <span class="risk-score">Risk: ${alert.member_data.skor_risiko}</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="alert-actions">
                <button onclick="reviewAlert('${alert.alert_id}')" class="btn-sm btn-primary">
                    Review
                </button>
                <button onclick="assignAlert('${alert.alert_id}')" class="btn-sm btn-secondary">
                    Assign
                </button>
            </div>
        `;
        
        return div;
    }
    
    formatTime(timestamp) {
        const date = new Date(timestamp);
        const now = new Date();
        const diffMs = now - date;
        const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
        
        if (diffMins < 1) return 'Just now';
        if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins}m ago`;
        if (diffMins < 1440) return `${Math.floor(diffMins / 60)}h ago`;
        return `${Math.floor(diffMins / 1440)}d ago`;
    }
}
```

### 📊 **6. Admin Action Interface**

#### **6.1 Quick Action Panel**
```python
@app.route('/api/fraud/alert/<alert_id>/action', methods=['POST'])
@require_manager_role
def process_alert_action(alert_id):
    """
    Process admin action on fraud alert
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    action = data.get('action')
    notes = data.get('notes', '')
    admin_id = get_current_user_id()
    
    # Validate action
    valid_actions = ['approve', 'reject', 'assign', 'escalate', 'dismiss']
    if action not in valid_actions:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid action'}), 400
    
    try:
        # Update alert status
        Update_Alert_Action(alert_id, action, admin_id, notes)
        
        # Process specific action
        if action == 'approve':
            Approve_Member_Registration(alert_id, admin_id)
        elif action == 'reject':
            Reject_Member_Registration(alert_id, admin_id, notes)
        elif action == 'assign':
            assigned_to = data.get('assigned_to')
            Assign_Alert_To_User(alert_id, assigned_to, admin_id)
        elif action == 'escalate':
            Escalate_Alert_Manually(alert_id, admin_id)
        
        # Send confirmation notification
        Send_Action_Confirmation(alert_id, action, admin_id)
        
        return jsonify({'message': f'Action {action} processed successfully'})
        
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"Alert action error: {e}")
        return jsonify({'error': 'Failed to process action'}), 500

FUNCTION Update_Alert_Action(alert_id, action, admin_id, notes):
    """
    Update alert with admin action
    """
    Query_Database("""
        UPDATE fraud_alerts 
        SET status = %s, 
            action_taken = %s,
            action_by = %s,
            action_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            action_notes = %s
        WHERE id = %s
    """, ('PROCESSED', action, admin_id, notes, alert_id))
```

#### **6.2 Bulk Action Processing**
```python
@app.route('/api/fraud/alerts/bulk-action', methods=['POST'])
@require_manager_role
def process_bulk_alert_actions():
    """
    Process multiple alerts at once
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    alert_ids = data.get('alert_ids', [])
    action = data.get('action')
    notes = data.get('notes', '')
    
    if not alert_ids or not action:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Missing alert_ids or action'}), 400
    
    results = []
    
    for alert_id in alert_ids:
        try:
            # Process each alert
            result = process_single_alert_action(alert_id, action, notes)
            results.append({
                'alert_id': alert_id,
                'status': 'success',
                'result': result
            })
        except Exception as e:
            results.append({
                'alert_id': alert_id,
                'status': 'error',
                'error': str(e)
            })
    
    return jsonify({
        'message': f'Processed {len(alert_ids)} alerts',
        'results': results
    })
```

### 📈 **7. Analytics & Reporting**

#### **7.1 Alert Performance Metrics**
```python
@app.route('/api/analytics/fraud-alerts')
@require_auth
def get_fraud_alert_analytics():
    """
    Get fraud alert performance analytics
    """
    tenant_id = get_current_tenant_id()
    
    # Alert response time metrics
    response_metrics = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (action_at - created_at))/60) as avg_response_minutes,
            MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (action_at - created_at))/60) as min_response_minutes,
            MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (action_at - created_at))/60) as max_response_minutes,
            COUNT(*) as total_alerts,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN action_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as responded_alerts
        FROM fraud_alerts 
        WHERE tenant_id = %s 
          AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    """, (tenant_id,))
    
    # Alert type breakdown
    type_breakdown = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            alert_type,
            severity,
            COUNT(*) as count,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN action_taken = 'reject' THEN 1 END) as rejected_count,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN action_taken = 'approve' THEN 1 END) as approved_count
        FROM fraud_alerts 
        WHERE tenant_id = %s 
          AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
        GROUP BY alert_type, severity
        ORDER BY count DESC
    """, (tenant_id,))
    
    # Escalation metrics
    escalation_metrics = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            COUNT(*) as escalated_alerts,
            AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (escalated_at - created_at))/60) as avg_escalation_minutes
        FROM fraud_alerts 
        WHERE tenant_id = %s 
          AND status = 'ESCALATED'
          AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    """, (tenant_id,))
    
    return jsonify({
        'response_metrics': response_metrics[0] if response_metrics else {},
        'type_breakdown': type_breakdown,
        'escalation_metrics': escalation_metrics[0] if escalation_metrics else {}
    })
```

---
