## 🛡️ **Anti-Fraud & Quick Recovery System - "Mantri Melarikan Diri"**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Sistem komprehensif untuk mencegah dan menangani kasus moral hazard terbesar dalam koperasi harian: mantri yang membawa kabur uang setoran. Solusi end-to-end dari pencegahan hingga recovery dengan real-time monitoring dan quick response capabilities.

---

### ⚠️ **1. Pencegahan (Early Warning System)**

#### **1.1 Real-time Cash Limit (Limit Kantong)**
```python
# Configuration untuk cash limit per mantri
COLLECTOR_CASH_LIMITS = {
    'daily_cash_limit': 5000000,      # Rp5 juta maksimal
    'transaction_limit': 1000000,     # Rp1 juta per transaksi
    'warning_threshold': 0.8,         # 80% warning threshold
    'lock_threshold': 1.0,           # 100% lock threshold
    'settlement_grace_period': 120    # 2 jam grace period
}

FUNCTION Check_Cash_Limit(collector_id, transaction_amount):
    """
    Check dan enforce cash limit untuk mantri
    """
    
    # Get current daily collection
    daily_collection = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            COALESCE(SUM(nominal_bayar), 0) as total_collected,
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settlement_status = 'Deposited' THEN nominal_bayar END), 0) as total_deposited
        FROM loan_installments 
        WHERE collector_id = %s 
          AND DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
          AND status_pembayaran = 'Sukses'
    """, (collector_id,))
    
    total_collected = daily_collection[0]['total_collected']
    total_deposited = daily_collection[0]['total_deposited']
    cash_on_hand = total_collected - total_deposited
    
    # Check limits
    if cash_on_hand + transaction_amount > COLLECTOR_CASH_LIMITS['daily_cash_limit']:
        return {
            'allowed': False,
            'reason': 'CASH_LIMIT_EXCEEDED',
            'current_cash': cash_on_hand,
            'limit': COLLECTOR_CASH_LIMITS['daily_cash_limit'],
            'action_required': 'DEPOSIT_REQUIRED'
        }
    
    # Warning threshold
    if (cash_on_hand + transaction_amount) >= (COLLECTOR_CASH_LIMITS['daily_cash_limit'] * COLLECTOR_CASH_LIMITS['warning_threshold']):
        Trigger_Cash_Warning(collector_id, cash_on_hand, transaction_amount)
    
    # Lock threshold
    if cash_on_hand >= (COLLECTOR_CASH_LIMITS['daily_cash_limit'] * COLLECTOR_CASH_LIMITS['lock_threshold']):
        Lock_Collector_App(collector_id, 'CASH_LIMIT_REACHED')
        return {
            'allowed': False,
            'reason': 'APP_LOCKED',
            'current_cash': cash_on_hand,
            'action_required': 'IMMEDIATE_DEPOSIT'
        }
    
    return {'allowed': True}

FUNCTION Lock_Collector_App(collector_id, reason):
    """
    Lock mantri app dan kirim notifikasi
    """
    
    # Update collector status
    Query_Database("""
        UPDATE employees 
        SET app_status = 'Locked', 
            lock_reason = %s, 
            locked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        WHERE user_id = %s
    """, (reason, collector_id))
    
    # Send notification to admin
    Trigger_Admin_Alert({
        'type': 'COLLECTOR_LOCKED',
        'collector_id': collector_id,
        'reason': reason,
        'requires_immediate_action': True
    })
    
    # Send WhatsApp to collector
    Send_WhatsApp_Collector_Lock(collector_id, reason)
```

#### **1.2 Live Tracking & Geofencing**
```python
# Geofencing configuration
GEOFENCING_CONFIG = {
    'work_hours_start': '08:00',
    'work_hours_end': '17:00',
    'allowed_radius_km': 5,        # 5km dari wilayah tugas
    'gps_offline_timeout': 300,     # 5 menit
    'location_check_interval': 600,  # 10 menit
    'warning_count_threshold': 3    # 3 warnings sebelum escalation
}

FUNCTION Monitor_Collector_Location():
    """
    Background job untuk monitoring lokasi mantri
    """
    
    collectors = Query_Database("""
        SELECT e.id, e.nama_lengkap, e.wilayah_tugas, u.last_location_lat, 
               u.last_location_lng, u.last_location_update, u.gps_enabled
        FROM employees e
        JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id
        WHERE e.status_pegawai = 'Aktif'
          AND e.role = 'Mantri'
          AND u.status_aktif = TRUE
    """)
    
    for collector in collectors:
        location_issues = Check_Location_Violations(collector)
        
        if location_issues:
            Handle_Location_Violation(collector, location_issues)

FUNCTION Check_Location_Violations(collector):
    """
    Check berbagai jenis location violations
    """
    
    violations = []
    current_time = CURRENT_TIME()
    current_date = CURRENT_DATE()
    
    # Check work hours
    if not Is_Work_Hours(current_time):
        return violations  # Outside work hours, no checking
    
    # Check GPS enabled
    if not collector['gps_enabled']:
        violations.append({
            'type': 'GPS_DISABLED',
            'severity': 'HIGH',
            'message': 'GPS dimatikan',
            'last_update': collector['last_location_update']
        })
    
    # Check location staleness
    if collector['last_location_update']:
        last_update = datetime.strptime(collector['last_location_update'], '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
        if (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - last_update).total_seconds() > GEOFENCING_CONFIG['gps_offline_timeout']:
            violations.append({
                'type': 'GPS_STALE',
                'severity': 'MEDIUM',
                'message': f'GPS tidak update selama {(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - last_update).total_seconds() / 60:.0f} menit',
                'last_update': collector['last_location_update']
            })
    
    # Check geofence boundary
    if collector['last_location_lat'] and collector['last_location_lng']:
        if not Is_Within_Assigned_Area(
            collector['last_location_lat'], 
            collector['last_location_lng'], 
            collector['wilayah_tugas']
        ):
            violations.append({
                'type': 'OUTSIDE_ASSIGNED_AREA',
                'severity': 'HIGH',
                'message': 'Mantri berada di luar wilayah tugas',
                'current_location': (collector['last_location_lat'], collector['last_location_lng'])
            })
    
    return violations

FUNCTION Handle_Location_Violation(collector, violations):
    """
    Handle location violations dengan graduated response
    """
    
    for violation in violations:
        # Log violation
        Log_Location_Violation(collector['id'], violation)
        
        # Check violation count today
        violation_count = Query_Database("""
            SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM location_violations 
            WHERE collector_id = %s AND DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
        """, (collector['id'],))[0]['count']
        
        # Graduated response
        if violation_count == 1:
            # First violation - warning
            Send_Location_Warning(collector, violation)
        elif violation_count == GEOFENCING_CONFIG['warning_count_threshold']:
            # Third violation - escalate to admin
            Escalate_Location_Violation(collector, violation)
        elif violation_count > GEOFENCING_CONFIG['warning_count_threshold']:
            # Repeated violations - consider suspension
            Consider_Collector_Suspension(collector, violation)
```

#### **1.3 Daily Settlement Enforcement**
```python
# Settlement configuration
SETTLEMENT_CONFIG = {
    'daily_settlement_deadline': '17:00',  # Jam 5 sore
    'grace_period_minutes': 60,             # 1 jam grace
    'reminder_intervals': [60, 30, 10],    # Menit sebelum deadline
    'auto_notification_enabled': True,
    'settlement_methods': ['Cash_Deposit', 'Bank_Transfer', 'Digital_Wallet']
}

FUNCTION Monitor_Daily_Settlement():
    """
    Monitor dan enforce daily settlement deadline
    """
    
    current_time = CURRENT_TIME()
    deadline_time = datetime.strptime(SETTLEMENT_CONFIG['daily_settlement_deadline'], '%H:%M').time()
    
    # Check collectors yang belum settlement
    unsettled_collectors = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            e.id, e.nama_lengkap, e.no_telepon,
            COALESCE(SUM(li.nominal_bayar), 0) as total_collected,
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN li.settlement_status = 'Deposited' THEN li.nominal_bayar END), 0) as total_deposited
        FROM employees e
        JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id
        LEFT JOIN loan_installments li ON e.user_id = li.collector_id 
            AND DATE(li.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE 
            AND li.status_pembayaran = 'Sukses'
        WHERE e.status_pegawai = 'Aktif'
          AND e.role = 'Mantri'
        GROUP BY e.id, e.nama_lengkap, e.no_telepon
        HAVING COALESCE(SUM(li.nominal_bayar), 0) > COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN li.settlement_status = 'Deposited' THEN li.nominal_bayar END), 0)
    """)
    
    for collector in unsettled_collectors:
        remaining_amount = collector['total_collected'] - collector['total_deposited']
        
        if current_time >= deadline_time:
            # Past deadline - trigger escalation
            Handle_Missed_Settlement(collector, remaining_amount)
        else:
            # Check for scheduled reminders
            time_to_deadline = (datetime.combine(CURRENT_DATE, deadline_time) - CURRENT_DATETIME).total_seconds() / 60
            
            for reminder_interval in SETTLEMENT_CONFIG['reminder_intervals']:
                if abs(time_to_deadline - reminder_interval) < 5:  # Within 5 minutes
                    Send_Settlement_Reminder(collector, remaining_amount, time_to_deadline)

FUNCTION Handle_Missed_Settlement(collector, remaining_amount):
    """
    Handle missed settlement dengan customer verification
    """
    
    # Mark collector as delinquent
    Query_Database("""
        UPDATE employees 
        SET settlement_status = 'Overdue',
            last_settlement_missed = CURRENT_DATE
        WHERE id = %s
    """, (collector['id'],))
    
    # Get today's customers for verification
    customers_today = Query_Database("""
        SELECT DISTINCT m.nama_anggota, m.no_whatsapp, li.nominal_bayar, li.created_at
        FROM loan_installments li
        JOIN members m ON li.member_id = m.id
        WHERE li.collector_id = %s
          AND DATE(li.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
          AND li.status_pembayaran = 'Sukses'
    """, (collector['id'],))
    
    # Send verification messages to all customers
    for customer in customers_today:
        Send_Customer_Verification_Message(customer, collector)
    
    # Escalate to admin
    Trigger_Admin_Alert({
        'type': 'MISSED_SETTLEMENT',
        'collector_id': collector['id'],
        'collector_name': collector['nama_lengkap'],
        'remaining_amount': remaining_amount,
        'customer_count': len(customers_today),
        'requires_immediate_action': True
    })

FUNCTION Send_Customer_Verification_Message(customer, collector):
    """
    Send WhatsApp verification ke customer
    """
    
    verification_link = f"{APP_BASE_URL}/verify-payment/{collector['id']}/{customer['nama_anggota']}"
    
    message = f"""
🏦 *Koperasi Harian - Verifikasi Pembayaran*

Hai {customer['nama_anggota']},

Kami ingin memastikan pembayaran Anda hari ini:
💰 *Jumlah:* Rp {customer['nominal_bayar']:,.0f}
👤 *Petugas:* {collector['nama_lengkap']}
⏰ *Waktu:* {customer['created_at']}

Apakah Anda sudah membayar kepada petugas kami?
📱 *Konfirmasi di sini:* {verification_link}

Jika belum membayar, segera hubungi kantor kami.
Terima kasih atas kerjasamanya.
    """.strip()
    
    # Send via WhatsApp API
    Send_WhatsApp_Message(customer['no_whatsapp'], message)
```

---

### 🆘 **2. "Panic Button" & Takeover System**

#### **2.1 Emergency Route Transfer**
```python
@app.route('/api/collector/emergency-transfer', methods=['POST'])
@require_admin_role
def emergency_route_transfer():
    """
    Transfer route dari mantri yang kabur ke mantri pengganti
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    from_collector_id = data.get('from_collector_id')
    to_collector_id = data.get('to_collector_id')
    reason = data.get('reason', 'Emergency_Absconded')
    
    if not from_collector_id or not to_collector_id:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Missing collector IDs'}), 400
    
    try:
        # Start database transaction
        with db.transaction():
            # 1. Deactivate from_collector
            Query_Database("""
                UPDATE employees 
                SET status_pegawai = 'Suspend',
                    suspension_reason = %s,
                    suspended_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                WHERE id = %s
            """, (reason, from_collector_id))
            
            # 2. Create route transfer record
            Query_Database("""
                INSERT INTO route_transfers (
                    from_collector_id, to_collector_id, reason, 
                    transfer_status, created_at, created_by
                ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, 'Completed', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, %s)
            """, (from_collector_id, to_collector_id, reason, get_current_user_id()))
            
            # 3. Transfer active loans
            Query_Database("""
                UPDATE loans 
                SET assigned_collector_id = %s,
                    route_transfer_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                WHERE assigned_collector_id = %s
                  AND status_pinjaman = 'Aktif'
            """, (to_collector_id, from_collector_id))
            
            # 4. Transfer pending installments
            Query_Database("""
                UPDATE loan_installments 
                SET collector_id = %s,
                    transferred_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                WHERE collector_id = %s
                  AND status_pembayaran = 'Pending'
            """, (to_collector_id, from_collector_id))
            
            # 5. Update collector assignments
            Query_Database("""
                UPDATE collector_assignments 
                SET collector_id = %s,
                    transferred_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                WHERE collector_id = %s
                  AND status = 'Active'
            """, (to_collector_id, from_collector_id))
        
        # Send notifications
        Send_Route_Transfer_Notifications(from_collector_id, to_collector_id, reason)
        
        return jsonify({
            'message': 'Route transfer completed successfully',
            'from_collector': from_collector_id,
            'to_collector': to_collector_id,
            'transferred_loans': Get_Transferred_Loans_Count(from_collector_id)
        })
        
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"Emergency route transfer failed: {e}")
        return jsonify({'error': 'Transfer failed'}), 500

FUNCTION Send_Route_Transfer_Notifications(from_collector_id, to_collector_id, reason):
    """
    Send notifications untuk route transfer
    """
    
    # Get collector details
    from_collector = Get_Collector_Details(from_collector_id)
    to_collector = Get_Collector_Details(to_collector_id)
    
    # Notify to_collector
    Send_App_Notification(to_collector['user_id'], {
        'type': 'ROUTE_TRANSFER',
        'title': '🔄 Penugasan Baru',
        'message': f'Anda menerima rute dari {from_collector["nama_lengkap"]}',
        'data': {
            'from_collector': from_collector,
            'reason': reason,
            'new_customers_count': Get_Assigned_Customers_Count(to_collector_id)
        }
    })
    
    # Notify admin
    Trigger_Admin_Alert({
        'type': 'ROUTE_TRANSFER_COMPLETED',
        'from_collector': from_collector_id,
        'to_collector': to_collector_id,
        'reason': reason,
        'requires_action': False
    })
```

#### **2.2 Digital Collection Card System**
```python
@app.route('/api/digital-collection-card/<member_id>', methods=['GET'])
@require_auth
def get_digital_collection_card(member_id):
    """
    Generate digital collection card untuk member
    """
    
    member = Query_Database("""
        SELECT m.*, l.total_tagihan, l.sisa_tagihan, l.angsuran_harian,
               l.tanggal_cair, l.tanggal_jatuh_tempo
        FROM members m
        JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id
        WHERE m.id = %s AND m.tenant_id = %s
    """, (member_id, get_current_tenant_id()))
    
    if not member:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Member not found'}), 404
    
    member_data = member[0]
    
    # Get recent payments
    recent_payments = Query_Database("""
        SELECT nominal_bayar, created_at, collector_id, qr_code_hash
        FROM loan_installments
        WHERE member_id = %s AND status_pembayaran = 'Sukses'
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
        LIMIT 10
    """, (member_id,))
    
    # Generate QR code for verification
    qr_data = {
        'member_id': member_id,
        'nik': member_data['nik'],
        'timestamp': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP.isoformat(),
        'verification_code': Generate_Verification_Code()
    }
    
    qr_code_url = Generate_QR_Code(qr_data)
    
    digital_card = {
        'member_info': {
            'nama': member_data['nama_anggota'],
            'nik': member_data['nik'],
            'no_anggota': member_data['qr_code_token']
        },
        'loan_info': {
            'total_pinjaman': member_data['total_tagihan'],
            'sisa_tagihan': member_data['sisa_tagihan'],
            'angsuran_harian': member_data['angsuran_harian'],
            'jatuh_tempo': member_data['tanggal_jatuh_tempo']
        },
        'payment_history': recent_payments,
        'verification': {
            'qr_code': qr_code_url,
            'verification_code': qr_data['verification_code'],
            'valid_until': (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + timedelta(hours=24)).isoformat()
        }
    }
    
    return jsonify(digital_card)

@app.route('/api/verify-payment-qr', methods=['POST'])
def verify_payment_qr():
    """
    Verify payment QR code scanned by collector
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    qr_data = data.get('qr_data')
    collector_id = data.get('collector_id')
    payment_amount = data.get('payment_amount')
    
    try:
        # Decode QR data
        decoded_data = json.loads(base64.b64decode(qr_data))
        
        # Verify QR is still valid
        qr_timestamp = datetime.fromisoformat(decoded_data['timestamp'])
        if (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - qr_timestamp).total_seconds() > 86400:  # 24 hours
            return jsonify({'error': 'QR code expired'}), 400
        
        # Verify member
        member_id = decoded_data['member_id']
        member = Query_Database("""
            SELECT * FROM members WHERE id = %s AND nik = %s
        """, (member_id, decoded_data['nik']))
        
        if not member:
            return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid member'}), 400
        
        # Create payment record with QR verification
        payment_id = Create_QR_Verified_Payment(
            member_id, collector_id, payment_amount, decoded_data
        )
        
        return jsonify({
            'verified': True,
            'payment_id': payment_id,
            'member_name': member[0]['nama_anggota'],
            'verification_code': decoded_data['verification_code']
        })
        
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"QR verification failed: {e}")
        return jsonify({'error': 'Verification failed'}), 500
```

---

### 🔍 **3. Verifikasi Nasabah (Audit Pasca-Kabur)**

#### **3.1 Broadcast Blast System**
```python
@app.route('/api/audit/broadcast-customers', methods=['POST'])
@require_admin_role
def broadcast_customer_audit():
    """
    Broadcast verification ke semua nasabah di rute mantri yang kabur
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    collector_id = data.get('collector_id')
    audit_period_start = data.get('audit_period_start')  # ISO date
    audit_period_end = data.get('audit_period_end')
    
    # Get all customers in the period
    customers = Query_Database("""
        SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.nama_anggota, m.no_whatsapp, m.email,
               COUNT(li.id) as transaction_count,
               COALESCE(SUM(li.nominal_bayar), 0) as total_amount
        FROM members m
        JOIN loan_installments li ON m.id = li.member_id
        WHERE li.collector_id = %s
          AND DATE(li.created_at) BETWEEN %s AND %s
          AND li.status_pembayaran = 'Sukses'
        GROUP BY m.id, m.nama_anggota, m.no_whatsapp, m.email
    """, (collector_id, audit_period_start, audit_period_end))
    
    audit_campaign_id = Generate_UUID()
    results = []
    
    for customer in customers:
        # Generate individual verification link
        verification_link = f"{APP_BASE_URL}/audit/{audit_campaign_id}/{customer['id']}"
        
        # Send verification message
        message = f"""
🔍 *Audit Pembayaran - Koperasi Harian*

Hai {customer['nama_anggota']},

Kami sedang melakukan audit pembayaran untuk periode {audit_period_start} hingga {audit_period_end}.

Berdasarkan catatan kami:
📊 *Jumlah Transaksi:* {customer['transaction_count']} kali
💰 *Total Pembayaran:* Rp {customer['total_amount']:,.0f}

Mohon konfirmasi kebenaran data ini:
✅ *Konfirmasi:* {verification_link}
❌ *Laporkan Kesalahan:* {verification_link}?dispute=true

Terima kasih atas kerjasama Anda dalam menjaga kebersihan data.
        """.strip()
        
        # Send via WhatsApp
        if customer['no_whatsapp']:
            result = Send_WhatsApp_Message(customer['no_whatsapp'], message)
            results.append({
                'customer_id': customer['id'],
                'channel': 'WhatsApp',
                'status': 'sent' if result else 'failed'
            })
        
        # Send via Email (backup)
        if customer['email']:
            result = Send_Email_Audit_Verification(customer['email'], verification_link, customer)
            results.append({
                'customer_id': customer['id'],
                'channel': 'Email',
                'status': 'sent' if result else 'failed'
            })
    
    # Save audit campaign
    Query_Database("""
        INSERT INTO audit_campaigns (
            id, collector_id, period_start, period_end, 
            total_customers, created_by, created_at
        ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    """, (audit_campaign_id, collector_id, audit_period_start, audit_period_end, 
          len(customers), get_current_user_id()))
    
    return jsonify({
        'campaign_id': audit_campaign_id,
        'total_customers': len(customers),
        'messages_sent': len(results),
        'results': results
    })

@app.route('/api/audit/<campaign_id>/<member_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def customer_audit_verification(campaign_id, member_id):
    """
    Customer verification endpoint untuk audit
    """
    
    if request.method == 'GET':
        # Show verification page
        audit_data = Query_Database("""
            SELECT ac.*, m.nama_anggota, m.no_whatsapp
            FROM audit_campaigns ac
            JOIN members m ON m.id = %s
            WHERE ac.id = %s
        """, (member_id, campaign_id))
        
        if not audit_data:
            return "Audit tidak ditemukan", 404
        
        # Get transaction details
        transactions = Query_Database("""
            SELECT li.nominal_bayar, li.created_at, u.nama_lengkap as collector_name
            FROM loan_installments li
            JOIN users u ON li.collector_id = u.id
            WHERE li.member_id = %s
              AND DATE(li.created_at) BETWEEN %s AND %s
              AND li.status_pembayaran = 'Sukses'
            ORDER BY li.created_at DESC
        """, (member_id, audit_data[0]['period_start'], audit_data[0]['period_end']))
        
        return render_template('audit_verification.html', 
                             audit=audit_data[0], 
                             transactions=transactions)
    
    elif request.method == 'POST':
        # Process verification response
        data = request.get_json()
        is_confirmed = data.get('confirmed', False)
        dispute_reason = data.get('dispute_reason', '')
        customer_notes = data.get('customer_notes', '')
        
        # Save verification response
        Query_Database("""
            INSERT INTO audit_responses (
                campaign_id, member_id, confirmed, dispute_reason, 
                customer_notes, created_at
            ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
            ON CONFLICT (campaign_id, member_id) 
            DO UPDATE SET 
                confirmed = EXCLUDED.confirmed,
                dispute_reason = EXCLUDED.dispute_reason,
                customer_notes = EXCLUDED.customer_notes,
                updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        """, (campaign_id, member_id, is_confirmed, dispute_reason, customer_notes))
        
        # If dispute, trigger investigation
        if not is_confirmed:
            Trigger_Dispute_Investigation(campaign_id, member_id, dispute_reason)
        
        return jsonify({'message': 'Verification recorded successfully'})
```

#### **3.2 Field Audit Mobile System**
```python
@app.route('/api/field-audit/start', methods=['POST'])
@require_collector_role
def start_field_audit():
    """
    Start field audit untuk replacement collector
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    audit_campaign_id = data.get('campaign_id')
    collector_id = get_current_user_id()
    
    # Get audit assignment
    assignment = Query_Database("""
        SELECT * FROM field_audit_assignments 
        WHERE campaign_id = %s AND collector_id = %s AND status = 'Assigned'
    """, (audit_campaign_id, collector_id))
    
    if not assignment:
        return jsonify({'error': 'No audit assignment found'}), 404
    
    # Get customer list for audit
    customers = Query_Database("""
        SELECT m.id, m.nama_anggota, m.alamat_rumah, m.no_whatsapp,
               li.nominal_bayar as expected_amount, li.created_at as payment_date
        FROM members m
        JOIN loan_installments li ON m.id = li.member_id
        JOIN audit_campaign_customers acc ON m.id = acc.member_id
        WHERE acc.campaign_id = %s
          AND acc.status = 'Pending'
          AND DATE(li.created_at) BETWEEN (
              SELECT period_start FROM audit_campaigns WHERE id = %s
          ) AND (
              SELECT period_end FROM audit_campaigns WHERE id = %s
          )
        ORDER BY li.created_at DESC
    """, (audit_campaign_id, audit_campaign_id, audit_campaign_id))
    
    return jsonify({
        'assignment_id': assignment[0]['id'],
        'customers': customers,
        'audit_tools': {
            'qr_scanner': True,
            'photo_capture': True,
            'gps_verification': True,
            'digital_signature': True
        }
    })

@app.route('/api/field-audit/submit', methods=['POST'])
@require_collector_role
def submit_field_audit():
    """
    Submit field audit results
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    customer_id = data.get('customer_id')
    audit_result = data.get('audit_result')  # 'Matched', 'Disputed', 'Not_Found'
    actual_amount = data.get('actual_amount', 0)
    dispute_details = data.get('dispute_details', {})
    evidence_photos = data.get('evidence_photos', [])
    gps_location = data.get('gps_location')
    customer_signature = data.get('customer_signature')
    
    try:
        # Save audit result
        Query_Database("""
            INSERT INTO field_audit_results (
                customer_id, collector_id, audit_result, expected_amount,
                actual_amount, dispute_details, evidence_photos,
                gps_location, customer_signature, created_at
            ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
        """, (customer_id, get_current_user_id(), audit_result, 
              data.get('expected_amount'), actual_amount,
              json.dumps(dispute_details), json.dumps(evidence_photos),
              json.dumps(gps_location), customer_signature))
        
        # Update campaign customer status
        Query_Database("""
            UPDATE audit_campaign_customers 
            SET status = %s, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, audited_by = %s
            WHERE campaign_id = %s AND member_id = %s
        """, (audit_result, get_current_user_id(), 
              data.get('campaign_id'), customer_id))
        
        # If disputed, trigger investigation
        if audit_result == 'Disputed':
            Trigger_Dispute_Investigation(data.get('campaign_id'), customer_id, dispute_details)
        
        return jsonify({'message': 'Audit result submitted successfully'})
        
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"Field audit submission failed: {e}")
        return jsonify({'error': 'Submission failed'}), 500
```

### 🗄️ **4. Struktur Database Pendukung (Audit Trail)**

#### **4.1 Collector Cash Flow Tracking**
```sql
CREATE TABLE collector_cash_flow (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    collector_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES employees(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    transaction_date DATE NOT NULL,
    
    -- Cash flow metrics
    total_collected DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
    total_deposited DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
    cash_on_hand DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
    
    -- Status tracking
    settlement_status ENUM('Pending', 'Partial', 'Completed', 'Overdue') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    settlement_method ENUM('Cash_Deposit', 'Bank_Transfer', 'Digital_Wallet'),
    settlement_time TIMESTAMP,
    
    -- Compliance
    cash_limit_compliance ENUM('Compliant', 'Warning', 'Exceeded') DEFAULT 'Compliant',
    app_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    lock_reason VARCHAR(100),
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    
    UNIQUE(collector_id, transaction_date)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_cash_flow_collector_date ON collector_cash_flow(collector_id, transaction_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_cash_flow_status ON collector_cash_flow(settlement_status);
CREATE INDEX idx_cash_flow_compliance ON collector_cash_flow(cash_limit_compliance);
```

#### **4.2 Route Transfer Tracking**
```sql
CREATE TABLE route_transfers (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    from_collector_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES employees(id),
    to_collector_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES employees(id),
    
    -- Transfer details
    transfer_reason ENUM('Emergency_Absconded', 'Resignation', 'Reassignment', 'Performance') NOT NULL,
    transfer_status ENUM('Pending', 'In_Progress', 'Completed', 'Failed') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    
    -- Metrics
    total_loans_transferred INT DEFAULT 0,
    total_customers_transferred INT DEFAULT 0,
    total_outstanding_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
    total_pending_installments INT DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Timeline
    initiated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    started_at TIMESTAMP,
    completed_at TIMESTAMP,
    
    -- Audit
    initiated_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    completed_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    notes TEXT,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_route_transfers_from ON route_transfers(from_collector_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_route_transfers_to ON route_transfers(to_collector_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_route_transfers_status ON route_transfers(transfer_status);
CREATE INDEX idx_route_transfers_date ON route_transfers(initiated_at);
```

#### **4.3 Location Violation Tracking**
```sql
CREATE TABLE location_violations (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    collector_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES employees(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Violation details
    violation_type ENUM('GPS_DISABLED', 'GPS_STALE', 'OUTSIDE_ASSIGNED_AREA', 'WORK_HOURS_VIOLATION') NOT NULL,
    severity ENUM('Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Critical') NOT NULL,
    
    -- Location data
    recorded_latitude DECIMAL(10,8),
    recorded_longitude DECIMAL(11,8),
    recorded_at TIMESTAMP,
    expected_area VARCHAR(100),
    
    -- Response
    violation_status ENUM('New', 'Warning_Sent', 'Escalated', 'Resolved', 'Ignored') DEFAULT 'New',
    response_action VARCHAR(100),
    response_at TIMESTAMP,
    
    -- Context
    work_day DATE,
    violation_count_today INT DEFAULT 1,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_location_violations_collector ON location_violations(collector_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_location_violations_date ON location_violations(work_day);
CREATE INDEX idx_location_violations_type ON location_violations(violation_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_location_violations_status ON location_violations(violation_status);
```

#### **4.4 Audit Campaign Tracking**
```sql
CREATE TABLE audit_campaigns (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    collector_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES employees(id),
    
    -- Audit scope
    period_start DATE NOT NULL,
    period_end DATE NOT NULL,
    audit_reason ENUM('Collector_Absconded', 'Routine_Audit', 'Customer_Complaint', 'Discrepancy_Detected') NOT NULL,
    
    -- Metrics
    total_customers INT DEFAULT 0,
    total_transactions INT DEFAULT 0,
    total_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
    confirmed_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
    disputed_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
    missing_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
    
    -- Status
    campaign_status ENUM('Active', 'Completed', 'Investigation_Required') DEFAULT 'Active',
    completion_percentage DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
    
    -- Timeline
    started_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    completed_at TIMESTAMP,
    
    -- Responsibility
    created_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    assigned_to UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE audit_campaign_customers (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    campaign_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES audit_campaigns(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    member_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES members(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    -- Expected data
    expected_transactions INT DEFAULT 0,
    expected_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
    
    -- Customer response
    customer_response ENUM('Pending', 'Confirmed', 'Disputed', 'No_Response') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    customer_response_at TIMESTAMP,
    dispute_reason TEXT,
    
    -- Field audit
    field_audit_status ENUM('Pending', 'Matched', 'Disputed', 'Not_Found', 'Customer_Unavailable') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    field_audit_result JSONB,
    audited_by UUID REFERENCES employees(id),
    audited_at TIMESTAMP,
    
    -- Final determination
    final_status ENUM('Pending', 'Verified', 'Discrepancy', 'Fraud_Suspected') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    discrepancy_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    
    UNIQUE(campaign_id, member_id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_audit_campaigns_collector ON audit_campaigns(collector_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_campaigns_period ON audit_campaigns(period_start, period_end);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_campaign_customers_campaign ON audit_campaign_customers(campaign_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_campaign_customers_status ON audit_campaign_customers(final_status);
```

### ⚖️ **5. Strategi "Legal & Collateral"**

#### **5.1 Collateral Management System**
```python
@app.route('/api/collector/collateral', methods=['POST', 'GET'])
def manage_collector_collateral():
    """
    Management collateral untuk mantri (ijazah, jaminan, etc.)
    """
    
    if request.method == 'POST':
        # Add new collateral
        data = request.get_json()
        collector_id = data.get('collector_id')
        collateral_type = data.get('collateral_type')  # 'Ijazah', 'KTP', 'BPKB', 'Surat_Pernyataan'
        collateral_document = data.get('collateral_document')  # File path or base64
        description = data.get('description', '')
        
        # Save collateral record
        Query_Database("""
            INSERT INTO collector_collateral (
                collector_id, collateral_type, document_path, 
                description, status, created_by, created_at
            ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, 'Held', %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
        """, (collector_id, collateral_type, collateral_document, 
              description, get_current_user_id()))
        
        return jsonify({'message': 'Collateral recorded successfully'})
    
    elif request.method == 'GET':
        # Get collector collateral
        collector_id = request.args.get('collector_id')
        
        collateral = Query_Database("""
            SELECT * FROM collector_collateral 
            WHERE collector_id = %s AND status = 'Held'
            ORDER BY created_at DESC
        """, (collector_id,))
        
        return jsonify({'collateral': collateral})

@app.route('/api/collector/collateral/release', methods=['POST'])
@require_admin_role
def release_collector_collateral():
    """
    Release collateral saat mantri resign atau clear
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    collateral_id = data.get('collateral_id')
    release_reason = data.get('release_reason')
    release_notes = data.get('release_notes', '')
    
    # Update collateral status
    Query_Database("""
        UPDATE collector_collateral 
        SET status = 'Released', 
            release_reason = %s,
            release_notes = %s,
            released_by = %s,
            released_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        WHERE id = %s
    """, (release_reason, release_notes, get_current_user_id(), collateral_id))
    
    return jsonify({'message': 'Collateral released successfully'})
```

#### **5.2 Performance-Based Bonus System**
```python
@app.route('/api/collector/bonus/calculate', methods=['POST'])
@require_admin_role
def calculate_collector_bonus():
    """
    Calculate bonus berdasarkan collectibility performance
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    collector_id = data.get('collector_id')
    period_start = data.get('period_start')
    period_end = data.get('period_end')
    
    # Get performance metrics
    performance = Query_Database("""
        WITH collector_performance AS (
            SELECT 
                COUNT(DISTINCT li.member_id) as total_customers,
                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE(li.created_at) BETWEEN %s AND %s THEN li.member_id END) as period_customers,
                COALESCE(SUM(li.nominal_bayar), 0) as total_collected,
                COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(li.created_at) BETWEEN %s AND %s THEN li.nominal_bayar END), 0) as period_collected,
                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status_pinjaman = 'Aktif' AND l.sisa_tagihan > 0 THEN li.member_id END) as active_customers,
                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status_pinjaman = 'Aktif' AND l.sisa_tagihan > 0 
                    AND DATE(li.created_at) BETWEEN %s AND %s THEN li.member_id END) as period_active_customers
            FROM employees e
            JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id
            LEFT JOIN loan_installments li ON u.id = li.collector_id AND li.status_pembayaran = 'Sukses'
            LEFT JOIN loans l ON li.member_id = l.member_id
            WHERE e.id = %s
        )
        SELECT 
            total_customers,
            period_customers,
            total_collected,
            period_collected,
            active_customers,
            period_active_customers,
            CASE 
                WHEN period_active_customers > 0 
                THEN (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE(li.created_at) BETWEEN %s AND %s THEN li.member_id END)::DECIMAL / period_active_customers) * 100
                ELSE 0
            END as collectibility_rate,
            e.target_harian,
            e.target_bulanan,
            e.komisi_persen
        FROM collector_performance cp
        JOIN employees e ON e.id = %s
        LEFT JOIN loan_installments li ON e.user_id = li.collector_id 
            AND li.status_pembayaran = 'Sukses'
            AND DATE(li.created_at) BETWEEN %s AND %s
        GROUP BY total_customers, period_customers, total_collected, period_collected,
                 active_customers, period_active_customers, e.target_harian, e.target_bulanan, e.komisi_persen
    """, (period_start, period_end, period_start, period_end, period_start, period_end, 
          collector_id, period_start, period_end, collector_id, period_start, period_end))
    
    if not performance:
        return jsonify({'error': 'No performance data found'}), 404
    
    perf = performance[0]
    
    # Calculate bonus tiers
    bonus_tiers = {
        'excellent': {'min_rate': 95, 'bonus_multiplier': 1.5},
        'good': {'min_rate': 85, 'bonus_multiplier': 1.2},
        'standard': {'min_rate': 75, 'bonus_multiplier': 1.0},
        'below_standard': {'min_rate': 0, 'bonus_multiplier': 0.8}
    }
    
    # Determine bonus tier
    bonus_tier = 'below_standard'
    for tier, config in bonus_tiers.items():
        if perf['collectibility_rate'] >= config['min_rate']:
            bonus_tier = tier
            break
    
    # Calculate bonus amount
    base_bonus = perf['period_collected'] * (perf['komisi_persen'] / 100)
    final_bonus = base_bonus * bonus_tiers[bonus_tier]['bonus_multiplier']
    
    # Apply penalty jika ada settlement issues
    settlement_issues = Query_Database("""
        SELECT COUNT(*) as missed_settlements
        FROM collector_cash_flow 
        WHERE collector_id = %s 
          AND transaction_date BETWEEN %s AND %s
          AND settlement_status = 'Overdue'
    """, (collector_id, period_start, period_end))
    
    penalty_rate = min(settlement_issues[0]['missed_settlements'] * 0.1, 0.5)  # Max 50% penalty
    final_bonus = final_bonus * (1 - penalty_rate)
    
    # Save bonus calculation
    Query_Database("""
        INSERT INTO collector_bonus_calculations (
            collector_id, period_start, period_end, collectibility_rate,
            base_bonus, bonus_tier, penalty_rate, final_bonus,
            calculated_by, created_at
        ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    """, (collector_id, period_start, period_end, perf['collectibility_rate'],
          base_bonus, bonus_tier, penalty_rate, final_bonus, get_current_user_id()))
    
    return jsonify({
        'performance': perf,
        'bonus_calculation': {
            'tier': bonus_tier,
            'collectibility_rate': perf['collectibility_rate'],
            'base_bonus': base_bonus,
            'penalty_rate': penalty_rate,
            'final_bonus': final_bonus
        }
    })
```

#### **5.3 QR Collection Enforcement**
```python
@app.route('/api/qr-collection/verify', methods=['POST'])
@require_collector_role
def verify_qr_collection():
    """
    Verifikasi QR collection untuk enforce physical presence
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    qr_data = data.get('qr_data')
    collector_location = data.get('collector_location')
    payment_amount = data.get('payment_amount')
    
    try:
        # Decode QR data
        decoded_data = json.loads(base64.b64decode(qr_data))
        
        # Verify QR authenticity
        qr_record = Query_Database("""
            SELECT * FROM member_qr_codes 
            WHERE member_id = %s 
              AND qr_code_hash = %s 
              AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        """, (decoded_data['member_id'], decoded_data['hash']))
        
        if not qr_record:
            return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid or expired QR code'}), 400
        
        # Verify collector location vs member location
        member_location = Query_Database("""
            SELECT latitude, longitude FROM businesses 
            WHERE member_id = %s AND status_usaha = 'Aktif'
        """, (decoded_data['member_id'],))
        
        if member_location:
            distance = Calculate_Distance(
                collector_location['lat'], collector_location['lng'],
                member_location[0]['latitude'], member_location[0]['longitude']
            )
            
            if distance > 100:  # 100 meter radius
                return jsonify({
                    'error': 'Location verification failed',
                    'distance': distance,
                    'message': 'Collector too far from member location'
                }), 400
        
        # Create verified transaction
        transaction_id = Create_QR_Verified_Transaction(
            decoded_data['member_id'], 
            get_current_user_id(), 
            payment_amount,
            decoded_data,
            collector_location
        )
        
        return jsonify({
            'verified': True,
            'transaction_id': transaction_id,
            'member_name': decoded_data['member_name'],
            'location_verified': True if member_location else False
        })
        
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"QR collection verification failed: {e}")
        return jsonify({'error': 'Verification failed'}), 500

# Generate QR codes for all members
@app.route('/api/members/generate-qr-codes', methods=['POST'])
@require_admin_role
def generate_member_qr_codes():
    """
    Generate QR codes untuk semua members dalam batch
    """
    data = request.get_json()
    member_ids = data.get('member_ids', [])
    expiry_days = data.get('expiry_days', 30)
    
    results = []
    
    for member_id in member_ids:
        # Get member data
        member = Query_Database("""
            SELECT id, nama_anggota, nik, qr_code_token 
            FROM members WHERE id = %s
        """, (member_id,))
        
        if not member:
            continue
        
        member_data = member[0]
        
        # Generate QR data
        qr_data = {
            'member_id': member_data['id'],
            'nama': member_data['nama_anggota'],
            'nik': member_data['nik'],
            'token': member_data['qr_code_token'],
            'generated_at': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP.isoformat(),
            'expires_at': (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + timedelta(days=expiry_days)).isoformat()
        }
        
        # Generate hash
        qr_hash = Generate_SHA256_Hash(json.dumps(qr_data))
        qr_data['hash'] = qr_hash
        
        # Save QR record
        Query_Database("""
            INSERT INTO member_qr_codes (
                member_id, qr_code_hash, qr_data, expires_at, created_by, created_at
            ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
            ON CONFLICT (member_id) 
            DO UPDATE SET 
                qr_code_hash = EXCLUDED.qr_code_hash,
                qr_data = EXCLUDED.qr_data,
                expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at,
                updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        """, (member_id, qr_hash, json.dumps(qr_data), 
              qr_data['expires_at'], get_current_user_id()))
        
        # Generate QR image
        qr_image_url = Generate_QR_Code_Image(json.dumps(qr_data))
        
        results.append({
            'member_id': member_id,
            'member_name': member_data['nama_anggota'],
            'qr_code_url': qr_image_url,
            'expires_at': qr_data['expires_at']
        })
    
    return jsonify({
        'generated_count': len(results),
        'qr_codes': results
    })
```

---

### 🎯 **6. Key Implementation Benefits**

#### **✅ Comprehensive Fraud Prevention**
- **Real-time Cash Limits**: Mencegah mantri membawa terlalu banyak uang
- **Live GPS Tracking**: Monitoring lokasi real-time dengan geofencing
- **Daily Settlement Enforcement**: Otomatisasi penagihan settlement
- **QR Collection Verification**: Force physical presence verification

#### **✅ Quick Recovery Capabilities**
- **Emergency Route Transfer**: Transfer rute dalam 1 klik
- **Digital Collection Cards**: Bukti pembayaran yang tidak bisa dimanipulasi
- **Customer Verification Broadcast**: Audit otomatis ke semua nasabah
- **Field Audit Mobile Tools**: Verifikasi lapangan dengan evidence collection

#### **✅ Legal & Collateral Protection**
- **Collateral Management**: Tracking ijazah dan jaminan
- **Performance-Based Bonus**: Bonus hangus jika kabur
- **Complete Audit Trail**: Documentation untuk legal action
- **Dispute Resolution**: Systematic investigation process

#### **✅ Business Impact**
- **Reduced Fraud Losses**: Prevention + quick recovery
- **Increased Customer Trust**: Transparent verification system
- **Operational Efficiency**: Automated monitoring dan enforcement
- **Legal Compliance**: Complete documentation dan audit trails

---

---

## 🚨 **Dashboard Emergency Monitoring - High-Visibility UI/UX Design**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Dashboard monitoring real-time dengan prinsip High-Visibility yang dirancang untuk admin mengidentifikasi masalah dalam hitungan detik. Interface dengan visual indicators, real-time maps, dan emergency action buttons untuk quick response.

---

### 📊 **1. Panel Ringkasan Atas (The Red Flags)**

#### **1.1 KPI Cards dengan Color-Coded Alerts**
```html

}

}

}

    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-badge.critical {

    color: white; 
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
}

.status-badge.warning { 
    background: #ffc107; 
    color: #212529; 
}

.status-badge.alert { 
    background: #fd7e14; 
    color: white; 
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0% { opacity: 1; }
    50% { opacity: 0.7; }
    100% { opacity: 1; }
}
</style>
```

#### **1.2 Real-Time Data Updates**
```javascript
// WebSocket connection untuk real-time KPI updates
class EmergencyDashboard {
    constructor() {
        this.socket = null;
        this.kpiElements = new Map();
        this.initializeWebSocket();
        this.startPeriodicRefresh();
    }
    
    initializeWebSocket() {
        this.socket = io(`${WS_BASE_URL}/emergency-dashboard`, {
            auth: {
                token: getAuthToken(),
                tenant_id: getCurrentTenantId()
            }
        });
        
        this.socket.on('kpi_update', (data) => {
            this.updateKPI(data);
        });
        
        this.socket.on('collector_alert', (alert) => {
            this.handleCollectorAlert(alert);
        });
        
        this.socket.on('system_notification', (notification) => {
            this.addNotificationTicker(notification);
        });
    }
    
    updateKPI(kpiData) {
        const element = this.kpiElements.get(kpiData.type);
        if (element) {
            // Update value dengan animation
            this.animateValue(element.querySelector('.current'), kpiData.value);
            
            // Update status badge
            const statusBadge = element.querySelector('.status-badge');
            statusBadge.className = `status-badge ${kpiData.severity}`;
            statusBadge.textContent = kpiData.message;
            
            // Add pulse animation untuk critical alerts
            if (kpiData.severity === 'critical') {
                element.classList.add('pulse-animation');
                setTimeout(() => element.classList.remove('pulse-animation'), 3000);
            }
        }
    }
    
    animateValue(element, newValue) {
        const currentValue = parseInt(element.textContent);
        const difference = newValue - currentValue;
        const duration = 500;
        const steps = 20;
        const stepValue = difference / steps;
        let currentStep = 0;
        
        const interval = setInterval(() => {
            currentStep++;
            element.textContent = Math.round(currentValue + (stepValue * currentStep));
            
            if (currentStep >= steps) {
                clearInterval(interval);
                element.textContent = newValue;
            }
        }, duration / steps);
    }
}
```

---

#### **2.2 Interactive Map dengan Real-Time Updates**
```javascript
// Google Maps integration untuk collector monitoring
class CollectorMap {
    constructor() {
        this.map = null;
        this.markers = new Map();
        this.geofencePolygons = new Map();
        this.infoWindows = new Map();
        this.initializeMap();
        this.startRealTimeUpdates();
    }
    
    initializeMap() {
        this.map = new google.maps.Map(document.getElementById('emergency-map'), {
            center: { lat: -6.2088, lng: 106.8456 }, // Jakarta
            zoom: 12,
            styles: [
                {
                    featureType: "poi",
                    elementType: "labels",
                    stylers: [{ visibility: "off" }]
                }
            ],
            mapTypeControl: false,
            streetViewControl: false
        });
    }
    
    updateCollectorLocation(collectorData) {
        const { id, name, latitude, longitude, status, cash_on_hand, last_update } = collectorData;
        
        // Determine marker color based on status
        const markerConfig = this.getMarkerConfig(status, cash_on_hand);
        
        if (this.markers.has(id)) {
            // Update existing marker
            const marker = this.markers.get(id);
            marker.setPosition({ lat: latitude, lng: longitude });
            marker.setIcon(markerConfig.icon);
            marker.setTitle(`${name} - ${markerConfig.tooltip}`);
        } else {
            // Create new marker
            const marker = new google.maps.Marker({
                position: { lat: latitude, lng: longitude },
                map: this.map,
                icon: markerConfig.icon,
                title: `${name} - ${markerConfig.tooltip}`,
                animation: markerConfig.animation
            });
            
            // Add click listener untuk detailed info
            marker.addListener('click', () => {
                this.showCollectorInfo(collectorData);
            });
            
            this.markers.set(id, marker);
        }
        
        // Update info window content
        this.updateInfoWindow(id, collectorData);
    }
    
    getMarkerConfig(status, cash_on_hand) {
        const configs = {
            'normal': {
                icon: {
                    url: '/icons/marker-green.png',
                    scaledSize: new google.maps.Size(32, 32),
                    anchor: new google.maps.Point(16, 16)
                },
                tooltip: 'Di Jalur - Normal',
                animation: null
            },
            'warning': {
                icon: {
                    url: '/icons/marker-yellow.png',
                    scaledSize: new google.maps.Size(32, 32),
                    anchor: new google.maps.Point(16, 16)
                },
                tooltip: 'Warning - Periksa Status',
                animation: google.maps.Animation.BOUNCE
            },
            'critical': {
                icon: {
                    url: '/icons/marker-red.png',
                    scaledSize: new google.maps.Size(40, 40),
                    anchor: new google.maps.Point(20, 20)
                },
                tooltip: 'CRITICAL - Immediate Action Required',
                animation: google.maps.Animation.BOUNCE
            }
        };
        
        // Determine status based on multiple factors
        if (status === 'out_of_bounds' || cash_on_hand > 5000000) {
            return configs.critical;
        } else if (status === 'stationary' || cash_on_hand > 3000000) {
            return configs.warning;
        } else {
            return configs.normal;
        }
    }
    
    showCollectorInfo(collectorData) {
        const infoContent = this.generateInfoWindowContent(collectorData);
        
        if (this.infoWindows.has(collectorData.id)) {
            this.infoWindows.get(collectorData.id).setContent(infoContent);
            this.infoWindows.get(collectorData.id).open(this.map, this.markers.get(collectorData.id));
        } else {
            const infoWindow = new google.maps.InfoWindow({
                content: infoContent
            });
            
            infoWindow.open(this.map, this.markers.get(collectorData.id));
            this.infoWindows.set(collectorData.id, infoWindow);
        }
    }
    
    generateInfoWindowContent(collector) {
        return `
            <div class="collector-info-popup">
                <h3>${collector.name}</h3>
                <div class="info-row">
                    <span class="label">Wilayah:</span>
                    <span class="value">${collector.assigned_area}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="info-row">
                    <span class="label">Saldo di Tangan:</span>
                    <span class="value cash-${this.getCashStatus(collector.cash_on_hand)}">
                        Rp ${collector.cash_on_hand.toLocaleString('id-ID')}
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div class="info-row">
                    <span class="label">Status GPS:</span>
                    <span class="value status-${collector.gps_status}">${collector.gps_status}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="info-row">
                    <span class="label">Update Terakhir:</span>
                    <span class="value">${this.formatTime(collector.last_update)}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="popup-actions">
                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="showCollectorDetail('${collector.id}')">
                        📊 Detail
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-warning" onclick="contactCollector('${collector.id}')">
                        📞 Hubungi
                    </button>
                    ${collector.cash_on_hand > 5000000 ? `
                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="lockCollectorAccount('${collector.id}')">
                            🔒 Kunci Akun
                        </button>
                    ` : ''}
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
    }
    
    drawGeofences() {
        // Load geofence data dari API
        fetch('/api/collector/geofences')
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(geofences => {
                geofences.forEach(geofence => {
                    const polygon = new google.maps.Polygon({
                        paths: geofence.coordinates,
                        strokeColor: '#0066cc',
                        strokeOpacity: 0.8,
                        strokeWeight: 2,
                        fillColor: '#0066cc',
                        fillOpacity: 0.1,
                        map: this.map
                    });
                    
                    this.geofencePolygons.set(geofence.collector_id, polygon);
                });
            });
    }
}
```

---

```html
<style>
.collector-table {

.status-indicator {

.btn-warning { background: #ffc107; color: #212529; }

.btn-info { background: #17a2b8; color: white; }
</style>
```

#### **3.2 Dynamic Table dengan Real-Time Updates**
```javascript
// Dynamic table population dengan real-time updates
class CollectorTable {
    constructor() {
        this.collectors = new Map();
        this.filteredCollectors = new Map();
        this.initializeTable();
        this.startRealTimeUpdates();
    }
    
    async initializeTable() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/collectors/status');
            const collectors = await response.json();
            
            collectors.forEach(collector => {
                this.collectors.set(collector.id, collector);
            });
            
            this.renderTable();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Failed to load collector data:', error);
        }
    }
    
    renderTable() {
        const tbody = document.getElementById('collectorTableBody');
        tbody.innerHTML = '';
        
        this.filteredCollectors.forEach(collector => {
            const row = this.createCollectorRow(collector);
            tbody.appendChild(row);
        });
        
        // Apply row status styling
        this.applyRowStyling();
    }
    
    createCollectorRow(collector) {
        const row = document.createElement('tr');
        row.id = `collector-${collector.id}`;
        row.className = `status-${collector.overall_status}`;
        
        row.innerHTML = `
            <td>
                <div class="collector-name">
                    <div class="name">${collector.name}</div>
                    <div class="id">ID: ${collector.employee_id}</div>
                </div>
            </td>
            <td>
                <div class="area-info">
                    <div class="area-name">${collector.assigned_area}</div>
                    <div class="customer-count">${collector.active_customers} nasabah</div>
                </div>
            </td>
            <td>
                <div class="cash-amount cash-${this.getCashStatus(collector.cash_on_hand)}">
                    Rp ${collector.cash_on_hand.toLocaleString('id-ID')}
                </div>
                ${collector.cash_on_hand > 5000000 ? 
                    '<div class="cash-warning">⚠️ Melebihi Limit</div>' : ''}
            </td>
            <td>
                <div class="status-indicator status-${collector.gps_status}">
                    ${this.getGPSIcon(collector.gps_status)}
                    ${this.getGPSStatusText(collector.gps_status)}
                </div>
            </td>
            <td>
                <div class="last-update">
                    <div class="time">${this.formatRelativeTime(collector.last_update)}</div>
                    <div class="date">${this.formatDate(collector.last_update)}</div>
                </div>
            </td>
            <td>
                <div class="action-buttons">
                    <button class="btn-sm btn-info" onclick="showCollectorDetail('${collector.id}')" title="Detail">
                        📊
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="contactCollector('${collector.id}')" title="Hubungi">
                        📞
                    </button>
                    ${collector.cash_on_hand > 5000000 ? `
                        <button class="btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="lockCollectorAccount('${collector.id}')" title="Kunci Akun">
                            🔒
                        </button>
                    ` : ''}
                    ${collector.gps_status === 'out_of_bounds' ? `
                        <button class="btn-sm btn-warning" onclick="trackCollector('${collector.id}')" title="Lacak">
                            📍
                        </button>
                    ` : ''}
                    <button class="btn-sm btn-info" onclick="takeoverRoute('${collector.id}')" title="Ambil Alih Rute">
                        🔄
                    </button>
                </div>
            </td>
        `;
        
        return row;
    }
    
    getCashStatus(amount) {
        if (amount > 5000000) return 'high';
        if (amount > 3000000) return 'medium';
        return 'normal';
    }
    
    getGPSIcon(status) {
        const icons = {
            'on_route': '🟢',
            'stationary': '🟡',
            'out_of_bounds': '🔴',
            'offline': '⚫'
        };
        return icons[status] || '⚫';
    }
    
    getGPSStatusText(status) {
        const texts = {
            'on_route': 'Di Jalur',
            'stationary': 'Diam',
            'out_of_bounds': 'Luar Jalur',
            'offline': 'Offline'
        };
        return texts[status] || 'Unknown';
    }
    
    updateCollector(collectorData) {
        this.collectors.set(collectorData.id, collectorData);
        this.applyFilters();
        this.renderTable();
        
        // Add highlight animation untuk updated row
        const row = document.getElementById(`collector-${collectorData.id}`);
        if (row) {
            row.style.animation = 'highlightRow 2s';
            setTimeout(() => {
                row.style.animation = '';
            }, 2000);
        }
    }
    
    filterTable(searchTerm) {
        this.applyFilters(searchTerm);
        this.renderTable();
    }
    
    filterByStatus(status) {
        this.applyFilters(null, status);
        this.renderTable();
    }
    
    applyFilters(searchTerm = '', statusFilter = '') {
        this.filteredCollectors.clear();
        
        this.collectors.forEach(collector => {
            let matchesSearch = true;
            let matchesStatus = true;
            
            if (searchTerm) {
                matchesSearch = collector.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
                              collector.assigned_area.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
            }
            
            if (statusFilter) {
                matchesStatus = collector.overall_status === statusFilter;
            }
            
            if (matchesSearch && matchesStatus) {
                this.filteredCollectors.set(collector.id, collector);
            }
        });
    }
}

// CSS animations
const style = document.createElement('style');
style.textContent = `
@keyframes highlightRow {
    0% { background-color: #fff3cd; }
    50% { background-color: #ffeaa7; }
    100% { background-color: transparent; }
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0% { opacity: 1; }
    50% { opacity: 0.7; }
    100% { opacity: 1; }
}
`;
document.head.appendChild(style);
```

### 🆘 **4. Tombol Interaksi Darurat (Emergency Actions)**

#### **4.1 Emergency Action Functions**
```javascript
// Emergency action handlers
class EmergencyActions {
    constructor() {
        this.actionQueue = new Map();
        this.initializeActionHandlers();
    }
    
    initializeActionHandlers() {
        // Lock collector account
        window.lockCollectorAccount = async (collectorId) => {
            if (!confirm('Apakah Anda yakin ingin mengunci akun mantri ini? Mantri tidak akan bisa mengakses aplikasi.')) {
                return;
            }
            
            try {
                this.showActionLoader(collectorId, 'lock');
                
                const response = await fetch(`/api/collector/${collectorId}/lock`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'Authorization': `Bearer ${getAuthToken()}`
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        reason: 'Emergency Lock - Cash Limit Exceeded',
                        initiated_by: get_current_user_id()
                    })
                });
                
                if (response.ok) {
                    this.showSuccessNotification('Akun mantri berhasil dikunci');
                    this.updateCollectorStatus(collectorId, 'locked');
                } else {
                    throw new Error('Failed to lock account');
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error locking collector account:', error);
                this.showErrorNotification('Gagal mengunci akun mantri');
            } finally {
                this.hideActionLoader(collectorId, 'lock');
            }
        };
        
        // Broadcast to customers
        window.broadcastToCustomers = async (collectorId) => {
            if (!confirm('Kirim broadcast ke semua nasabah mantri ini?')) {
                return;
            }
            
            try {
                this.showActionLoader(collectorId, 'broadcast');
                
                const response = await fetch(`/api/collector/${collectorId}/broadcast-customers`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'Authorization': `Bearer ${getAuthToken()}`
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        message_type: 'payment_hold',
                        custom_message: 'Mohon jangan berikan setoran tunai ke petugas ini untuk sementara waktu.'
                    })
                });
                
                const result = await response.json();
                
                if (response.ok) {
                    this.showSuccessNotification(`Broadcast terkirim ke ${result.customers_notified} nasabah`);
                } else {
                    throw new Error(result.error || 'Failed to send broadcast');
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error sending broadcast:', error);
                this.showErrorNotification('Gagal mengirim broadcast');
            } finally {
                this.hideActionLoader(collectorId, 'broadcast');
            }
        };
        
        // Takeover route
        window.takeoverRoute = async (collectorId) => {
            const availableCollectors = await this.getAvailableCollectors();
            
            if (availableCollectors.length === 0) {
                this.showErrorNotification('Tidak ada mantri pengganti yang tersedia');
                return;
            }
            
            const selectedCollector = await this.showCollectorSelectionDialog(availableCollectors);
            
            if (!selectedCollector) {
                return;
            }
            
            try {
                this.showActionLoader(collectorId, 'takeover');
                
                const response = await fetch('/api/collector/emergency-transfer', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'Authorization': `Bearer ${getAuthToken()}`
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        from_collector_id: collectorId,
                        to_collector_id: selectedCollector.id,
                        reason: 'Emergency_Absconded_Prevention'
                    })
                });
                
                const result = await response.json();
                
                if (response.ok) {
                    this.showSuccessNotification(
                        `Rute berhasil dipindahkan ke ${selectedCollector.name}. ` +
                        `${result.transferred_loans} pinjaman dipindahkan.`
                    );
                    this.refreshDashboard();
                } else {
                    throw new Error(result.error || 'Failed to transfer route');
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error transferring route:', error);
                this.showErrorNotification('Gagal memindahkan rute');
            } finally {
                this.hideActionLoader(collectorId, 'takeover');
            }
        };
        
        // Track collector
        window.trackCollector = (collectorId) => {
            // Open tracking modal or navigate to tracking page
            this.openTrackingModal(collectorId);
        };
        
        // Contact collector
        window.contactCollector = (collectorId) => {
            this.openContactModal(collectorId);
        };
    }
    
    async getAvailableCollectors() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/collectors/available-for-transfer', {
                headers: {
                    'Authorization': `Bearer ${getAuthToken()}`
                }
            });
            
            return await response.json();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error getting available collectors:', error);
            return [];
        }
    }
    
    showCollectorSelectionDialog(collectors) {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
            const modal = document.createElement('div');
            modal.className = 'modal-overlay';
            modal.innerHTML = `
                <div class="modal-dialog">
                    <div class="modal-content">
                        <div class="modal-header">
                            <h3>Pilih Mantri Pengganti</h3>
                            <button class="btn-close" onclick="this.closest('.modal-overlay').remove()">×</button>
                        </div>
                        <div class="modal-body">
                            <div class="collector-list">
                                ${collectors.map(collector => `
                                    <div class="collector-option" onclick="selectCollector('${collector.id}', '${collector.name}')">
                                        <div class="collector-info">
                                            <div class="name">${collector.name}</div>
                                            <div class="details">
                                                ${collector.active_customers} nasabah aktif • 
                                                ${collector.assigned_area}
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="collector-status">
                                            <span class="status-badge available">Tersedia</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                `).join('')}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
            
            document.body.appendChild(modal);
            
            window.selectCollector = (id, name) => {
                modal.remove();
                resolve({ id, name });
            };
            
            // Close modal if clicking outside
            modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target === modal) {
                    modal.remove();
                    resolve(null);
                }
            });
        });
    }
    
    showActionLoader(collectorId, action) {
        const row = document.getElementById(`collector-${collectorId}`);
        const button = row.querySelector(`[onclick*="${action}"]`);
        
        if (button) {
            button.disabled = true;
            button.innerHTML = '⏳';
            button.classList.add('loading');
        }
    }
    
    hideActionLoader(collectorId, action) {
        const row = document.getElementById(`collector-${collectorId}`);
        const button = row.querySelector(`[onclick*="${action}"]`);
        
        if (button) {
            button.disabled = false;
            button.classList.remove('loading');
            // Restore original button content based on action
            const icons = {
                'lock': '🔒',
                'broadcast': '📢',
                'takeover': '🔄'
            };
            button.innerHTML = icons[action] || '📊';
        }
    }
    
    showSuccessNotification(message) {
        this.showNotification(message, 'success');
    }
    
    showErrorNotification(message) {
        this.showNotification(message, 'error');
    }
    
    showNotification(message, type) {
        const notification = document.createElement('div');
        notification.className = `notification notification-${type}`;
        notification.innerHTML = `
            <div class="notification-content">
                <span class="notification-icon">${type === 'success' ? '✅' : '❌'}</span>
                <span class="notification-message">${message}</span>
            </div>
        `;
        
        document.body.appendChild(notification);
        
        // Auto-remove after 5 seconds
        setTimeout(() => {
            notification.classList.add('notification-hide');
            setTimeout(() => notification.remove(), 300);
        }, 5000);
    }
}
```

### 📢 **5. Log Notifikasi Otomatis**

#### **5.1 Real-Time Notification Ticker**
```html
<!-- Notification Ticker -->
<div class="notification-ticker">
    <div class="ticker-header">
        <h3>📢 Log Notifikasi Real-Time</h3>
        <div class="ticker-controls">
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="toggleTicker()">
                ⏸️ Pause
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="clearTicker()">
                🗑️ Clear
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="ticker-content" id="notificationTicker">
        <div class="ticker-item">
            <span class="ticker-time">14:02</span>
            <span class="ticker-source">Sistem</span>

            <span class="ticker-time">14:15</span>

        </div>

            <span class="ticker-time">14:20</span>

</div>

<style>
.notification-ticker {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 12px;

}

}

}

}

}

@keyframes slideInRight {
```
