```html
        transform: translateX(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}
</style>
```

#### **5.2 Real-Time Notification Management**
```javascript
// Real-time notification ticker management
class NotificationTicker {
    constructor() {
        this.tickerElement = document.getElementById('notificationTicker');
        this.notifications = [];
        this.isPaused = false;
        this.maxNotifications = 50;
        this.initializeWebSocket();
    }
    
    initializeWebSocket() {
        // Listen for real-time notifications
        if (window.dashboardSocket) {
            window.dashboardSocket.on('system_notification', (notification) => {
                this.addNotification(notification);
            });
        }
    }
    
    addNotification(notification) {
        if (this.isPaused) {
            return;
        }
        
        const notificationElement = this.createNotificationElement(notification);
        
        // Add to top of ticker
        this.tickerElement.insertBefore(notificationElement, this.tickerElement.firstChild);
        
        // Add to notifications array
        this.notifications.unshift(notification);
        
        // Limit number of notifications
        if (this.notifications.length > this.maxNotifications) {
            this.notifications.pop();
            this.tickerElement.removeChild(this.tickerElement.lastChild);
        }
        
        // Auto-scroll to top to show latest
        this.tickerElement.scrollTop = 0;
        
        // Add visual alert for critical notifications
        if (notification.severity === 'critical') {
            this.highlightNotification(notificationElement);
        }
    }
    
    createNotificationElement(notification) {
        const element = document.createElement('div');
        element.className = 'ticker-item';
        element.innerHTML = `
            <span class="ticker-time">${this.formatTime(notification.timestamp)}</span>
            <span class="ticker-source">${notification.source}</span>
            <span class="ticker-message ${notification.severity}">${notification.message}</span>
        `;
        
        return element;
    }
    
    formatTime(timestamp) {
        const date = new Date(timestamp);
        return date.toLocaleTimeString('id-ID', { 
            hour: '2-digit', 
            minute: '2-digit' 
        });
    }
    
    highlightNotification(element) {
        element.style.background = '#fff5f5';
        element.style.borderLeft = '3px solid #dc3545';
        
        setTimeout(() => {
            element.style.background = '';
            element.style.borderLeft = '';
        }, 3000);
    }
    
    togglePause() {
        this.isPaused = !this.isPaused;
        const button = document.querySelector('[onclick="toggleTicker()"]');
        button.textContent = this.isPaused ? '▶️ Resume' : '⏸️ Pause';
        
        if (!this.isPaused) {
            button.classList.remove('btn-warning');
            button.classList.add('btn-secondary');
        } else {
            button.classList.remove('btn-secondary');
            button.classList.add('btn-warning');
        }
    }
    
    clearTicker() {
        this.tickerElement.innerHTML = '';
        this.notifications = [];
    }
}

// Global functions for ticker controls
window.toggleTicker = () => {
    if (window.notificationTicker) {
        window.notificationTicker.togglePause();
    }
};

window.clearTicker = () => {
    if (window.notificationTicker) {
        window.notificationTicker.clearTicker();
    }
};
```

---

### ⚡ **6. Technical Implementation & Performance**

#### **6.1 WebSocket Real-Time Updates**
```javascript
// WebSocket connection untuk real-time dashboard updates
class DashboardWebSocket {
    constructor() {
        this.socket = null;
        this.reconnectAttempts = 0;
        this.maxReconnectAttempts = 5;
        this.reconnectDelay = 1000;
        this.heartbeatInterval = null;
        this.connect();
    }
    
    connect() {
        try {
            this.socket = new WebSocket(`${WS_BASE_URL}/dashboard`);
            
            this.socket.onopen = () => {
                console.log('Dashboard WebSocket connected');
                this.reconnectAttempts = 0;
                this.startHeartbeat();
                
                // Subscribe to emergency updates
                this.send({
                    type: 'subscribe',
                    channels: ['collector_status', 'system_alerts', 'emergency_actions'],
                    tenant_id: getCurrentTenantId()
                });
            };
            
            this.socket.onmessage = (event) => {
                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
                this.handleMessage(data);
            };
            
            this.socket.onclose = () => {
                console.log('Dashboard WebSocket disconnected');
                this.stopHeartbeat();
                this.attemptReconnect();
            };
            
            this.socket.onerror = (error) => {
                console.error('WebSocket error:', error);
            };
            
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Failed to connect WebSocket:', error);
            this.attemptReconnect();
        }
    }
    
    handleMessage(data) {
        switch (data.type) {
            case 'collector_status_update':
                this.updateCollectorStatus(data.payload);
                break;
            case 'system_alert':
                this.handleSystemAlert(data.payload);
                break;
            case 'emergency_action':
                this.handleEmergencyAction(data.payload);
                break;
            case 'heartbeat':
                // Respond to server heartbeat
                this.send({ type: 'heartbeat_response' });
                break;
        }
    }
    
    updateCollectorStatus(collectorData) {
        // Update KPI cards
        if (window.emergencyDashboard) {
            window.emergencyDashboard.updateKPI({
                type: 'collector_status',
                value: collectorData.overall_status,
                severity: collectorData.severity
            });
        }
        
        // Update map markers
        if (window.collectorMap) {
            window.collectorMap.updateCollectorLocation(collectorData);
        }
        
        // Update table
        if (window.collectorTable) {
            window.collectorTable.updateCollector(collectorData);
        }
        
        // Add to notification ticker
        if (window.notificationTicker) {
            window.notificationTicker.addNotification({
                timestamp: collectorData.last_update,
                source: 'Sistem',
                message: this.generateStatusMessage(collectorData),
                severity: collectorData.severity
            });
        }
    }
    
    generateStatusMessage(collector) {
        const messages = {
            'cash_limit_exceeded': `Saldo Mantri ${collector.name} melewati limit Rp${collector.cash_on_hand.toLocaleString('id-ID')}`,
            'out_of_bounds': `Mantri ${collector.name} terdeteksi di luar wilayah tugas`,
            'stationary_too_long': `Mantri ${collector.name} diam terlalu lama di lokasi yang bukan nasabah`,
            'settlement_overdue': `Mantri ${collector.name} belum melakukan settlement melebihi batas waktu`
        };
        
        return messages[collector.alert_type] || `Status update untuk ${collector.name}`;
    }
    
    startHeartbeat() {
        this.heartbeatInterval = setInterval(() => {
            if (this.socket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
                this.send({ type: 'heartbeat' });
            }
        }, 30000); // 30 seconds
    }
    
    stopHeartbeat() {
        if (this.heartbeatInterval) {
            clearInterval(this.heartbeatInterval);
            this.heartbeatInterval = null;
        }
    }
    
    attemptReconnect() {
        if (this.reconnectAttempts < this.maxReconnectAttempts) {
            this.reconnectAttempts++;
            console.log(`Attempting to reconnect (${this.reconnectAttempts}/${this.maxReconnectAttempts})`);
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                this.connect();
            }, this.reconnectDelay * this.reconnectAttempts);
        } else {
            console.error('Max reconnection attempts reached');
            this.showConnectionError();
        }
    }
    
    send(data) {
        if (this.socket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
            this.socket.send(JSON.stringify(data));
        }
    }
    
    showConnectionError() {
        const errorDiv = document.createElement('div');
        errorDiv.className = 'connection-error';
        errorDiv.innerHTML = `
            <div class="error-content">
                <h3>⚠️ Koneksi Terputus</h3>
                <p>Tidak dapat terhubung ke server real-time. Data mungkin tidak up-to-date.</p>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="location.reload()">Refresh Halaman</button>
            </div>
        `;
        
        document.body.appendChild(errorDiv);
    }
}
```

---

### 🎯 **7. Key Implementation Benefits**

#### **✅ High-Visibility Design**
- **Color-Coded KPI**: Instant visual indication dengan red/green/yellow coding
- **Real-Time Updates**: Sub-second updates via WebSocket
- **Interactive Map**: Visual location monitoring dengan status indicators
- **Action-Oriented Interface**: One-click emergency actions

#### **✅ Quick Response Capabilities**
- **Emergency Actions**: Lock account, broadcast customers, takeover routes
- **Real-Time Tracking**: Live GPS monitoring dengan geofencing
- **Instant Notifications**: Real-time alerts ke semua stakeholders
- **Mobile Responsive**: Accessible dari berbagai devices

#### **✅ Comprehensive Monitoring**
- **Multi-View Dashboard**: KPI cards, map, table, notifications
- **Historical Tracking**: Complete audit trail untuk analysis
- **Performance Metrics**: Collector performance monitoring
- **System Health**: Overall system status monitoring

#### **✅ Business Impact**
- **Reduced Response Time**: Dari hours ke seconds
- **Prevention Focus**: Early detection sebelum becomes critical
- **Operational Control**: Centralized monitoring dan control
- **Risk Management**: Comprehensive risk mitigation system

---

## 📬 **Alur Notifikasi Otomatis - Mantri Melarikan Diri**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Sistem notifikasi otomatis yang komprehensif untuk Owner Koperasi saat mendeteksi indikasi mantri melarikan diri. Alur notifikasi dirancang dengan graduated response untuk memastikan Owner dapat mengambil tindakan tepat waktu sebelum kerugian menjadi lebih besar.

---

### 🚨 **1. Trigger Detection & Scoring System**

#### **1.1 Detection Triggers**
```python
# Trigger conditions untuk mantri absconding detection
ABSCONDING_TRIGGERS = {
    'cash_limit_exceeded': {
        'threshold': 5000000,  # Rp5 juta
        'weight': 40,          # 40% risk score
        'detection_method': 'real_time_cash_monitoring'
    },
    'gps_out_of_bounds': {
        'threshold': 2000,      # 2km dari wilayah tugas
        'weight': 30,          # 30% risk score
        'detection_method': 'geofencing_violation'
    },
    'gps_offline_duration': {
        'threshold': 1800,      # 30 menit
        'weight': 20,          # 20% risk score
        'detection_method': 'connectivity_monitoring'
    },
    'settlement_overdue': {
        'threshold': 3600,      # 1 jam dari deadline
        'weight': 25,          # 25% risk score
        'detection_method': 'settlement_monitoring'
    },
    'unusual_behavior_pattern': {
        'threshold': 3,         # 3 violations dalam 1 jam
        'weight': 15,          # 15% risk score
        'detection_method': 'behavioral_analysis'
    }
}

FUNCTION Calculate_Absconding_Risk_Score(collector_id):
    """
    Calculate risk score untuk mantri absconding detection
    """
    
    risk_factors = []
    total_score = 0
    
    # Check each trigger condition
    for trigger_name, config in ABSCONDING_TRIGGERS.items():
        trigger_result = Check_Trigger_Condition(collector_id, trigger_name, config)
        
        if trigger_result.triggered:
            risk_factors.append({
                'trigger': trigger_name,
                'value': trigger_result.value,
                'threshold': config['threshold'],
                'weight': config['weight'],
                'detected_at': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                'details': trigger_result.details
            })
            total_score += config['weight']
    
    # Determine risk level
    risk_level = Determine_Risk_Level(total_score)
    
    return {
        'collector_id': collector_id,
        'risk_score': total_score,
        'risk_level': risk_level,
        'risk_factors': risk_factors,
        'assessment_time': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    }

FUNCTION Check_Trigger_Condition(collector_id, trigger_name, config):
    """
    Check individual trigger condition
    """
    
    if trigger_name == 'cash_limit_exceeded':
        current_cash = Get_Collector_Cash_On_Hand(collector_id)
        return {
            'triggered': current_cash > config['threshold'],
            'value': current_cash,
            'details': f"Cash on hand: Rp {current_cash:,}"
        }
    
    elif trigger_name == 'gps_out_of_bounds':
        last_location = Get_Collector_Last_Location(collector_id)
        if last_location:
            distance = Calculate_Distance_From_Assigned_Area(
                last_location.lat, last_location.lng, collector_id
            )
            return {
                'triggered': distance > config['threshold'],
                'value': distance,
                'details': f"Distance from assigned area: {distance:.0f}m"
            }
    
    elif trigger_name == 'gps_offline_duration':
        last_update = Get_Collector_Last_GPS_Update(collector_id)
        if last_update:
            offline_duration = (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - last_update).total_seconds()
            return {
                'triggered': offline_duration > config['threshold'],
                'value': offline_duration,
                'details': f"GPS offline for {offline_duration/60:.0f} minutes"
            }
    
    elif trigger_name == 'settlement_overdue':
        last_settlement = Get_Collector_Last_Settlement(collector_id)
        if last_settlement:
            overdue_duration = (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - last_settlement).total_seconds()
            return {
                'triggered': overdue_duration > config['threshold'],
                'value': overdue_duration,
                'details': f"Settlement overdue by {overdue_duration/60:.0f} minutes"
            }
    
    return {'triggered': False, 'value': 0, 'details': 'No data'}

FUNCTION Determine_Risk_Level(score):
    """
    Determine risk level berdasarkan score
    """
    if score >= 80:
        return 'CRITICAL'
    elif score >= 60:
        return 'HIGH'
    elif score >= 40:
        return 'MEDIUM'
    elif score >= 20:
        return 'LOW'
    else:
        return 'MINIMAL'
```

---

### 📱 **2. Multi-Channel Notification Flow**

#### **2.1 Notification Escalation Matrix**
```python
# Escalation matrix berdasarkan risk level
NOTIFICATION_ESCALATION = {
    'MINIMAL': {
        'channels': ['dashboard'],
        'delay_minutes': 0,
        'repeat_interval': 60,  # 1 jam
        'max_repeats': 3
    },
    'LOW': {
        'channels': ['dashboard', 'email'],
        'delay_minutes': 0,
        'repeat_interval': 30,  # 30 menit
        'max_repeats': 5
    },
    'MEDIUM': {
        'channels': ['dashboard', 'email', 'whatsapp'],
        'delay_minutes': 0,
        'repeat_interval': 15,  # 15 menit
        'max_repeats': 8
    },
    'HIGH': {
        'channels': ['dashboard', 'email', 'whatsapp', 'sms'],
        'delay_minutes': 0,
        'repeat_interval': 10,  # 10 menit
        'max_repeats': 10
    },
    'CRITICAL': {
        'channels': ['dashboard', 'email', 'whatsapp', 'sms', 'phone_call'],
        'delay_minutes': 0,
        'repeat_interval': 5,   # 5 menit
        'max_repeats': 999     # Unlimited
    }
}

FUNCTION Trigger_Absconding_Notification(risk_assessment):
    """
    Trigger graduated notification flow
    """
    
    risk_level = risk_assessment['risk_level']
    escalation_config = NOTIFICATION_ESCALATION[risk_level]
    
    # Get owner contact information
    owner_contacts = Get_Owner_Contacts(risk_assessment['collector_id'])
    
    # Prepare notification data
    notification_data = Prepare_Notification_Data(risk_assessment)
    
    # Schedule notifications untuk each channel
    for channel in escalation_config['channels']:
        Schedule_Notification(channel, owner_contacts, notification_data, escalation_config)
    
    # Log notification trigger
    Log_Notification_Trigger(risk_assessment, escalation_config)
    
    # Create escalation task
    Create_Escalation_Task(risk_assessment, escalation_config)

FUNCTION Schedule_Notification(channel, contacts, data, config):
    """
    Schedule notification untuk specific channel
    """
    
    notification_id = Generate_UUID()
    
    # Initial notification
    Send_Notification(channel, contacts, data, notification_id, 'initial')
    
    # Schedule repeat notifications
    if config['repeat_interval'] > 0 and config['max_repeats'] > 1:
        for repeat in range(1, config['max_repeats']):
            schedule_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + timedelta(minutes=repeat * config['repeat_interval'])
            
            Schedule_Notification_Job(
                notification_id=notification_id,
                channel=channel,
                contacts=contacts,
                data=data,
                repeat_number=repeat + 1,
                scheduled_time=schedule_time
            )
```

#### **2.2 Channel-Specific Message Templates**

```python
# Message templates untuk different channels
NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATES = {
    'whatsapp': {
        'CRITICAL': """

        """,
        
        'HIGH': """

Monitoring: {dashboard_link}

        'MEDIUM': """

        'subject_critical': '🚨 URGENT - Mantri Potensi Melarikan Diri - {collector_name}',

<!DOCTYPE html>

</body>

        """
    },
    
    'sms': {

        'HIGH': 'ALERT! Mantri {collector_name} status {risk_level}. Saldo: Rp{cash_on_hand:,}. Segera cek dashboard: {dashboard_shortlink}',
        'MEDIUM': 'INFO: Mantri {collector_name} status warning. Cek dashboard: {dashboard_shortlink}'
    },

        Segera login ke dashboard untuk mengambil tindakan preventif.

        """
    }
}

FUNCTION Generate_Channel_Message(channel, risk_level, data):
    """
    Generate channel-specific message
    """
    
    templates = NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATES[channel]
    
    if channel == 'whatsapp':
        template_key = f"{risk_level}"
        template = templates.get(template_key, templates['MEDIUM'])
        
        return template.format(
            collector_name=data['collector_name'],
            collector_id=data['collector_id'],
            risk_level=data['risk_level'],
            risk_score=data['risk_score'],
            cash_on_hand=data['cash_on_hand'],
            last_location=data['last_location'],
            risk_factors=Format_Risk_Factors(data['risk_factors']),
            lock_link=f"{APP_BASE_URL}/emergency/lock/{data['collector_id']}",
            broadcast_link=f"{APP_BASE_URL}/emergency/broadcast/{data['collector_id']}",
            takeover_link=f"{APP_BASE_URL}/emergency/takeover/{data['collector_id']}",
            phone_link=f"{APP_BASE_URL}/emergency/contact/{data['collector_id']}",
            dashboard_link=f"{APP_BASE_URL}/dashboard/emergency",
            detection_time=Format_Time(data['assessment_time'])
        )
    
    elif channel == 'email':
        subject_key = f"subject_{risk_level.lower()}"
        body_key = f"body_{risk_level.lower()}"
        
        return {
            'subject': templates[subject_key].format(**data),
            'body': templates[body_key].format(
                **data,
                risk_factors_html=Format_Risk_Factors_HTML(data['risk_factors'])
            )
        }
    
    elif channel == 'sms':
        template = templates.get(risk_level, templates['MEDIUM'])
        
        return template.format(
            **data,
            dashboard_shortlink=Generate_Short_Link(f"{APP_BASE_URL}/dashboard/emergency")
        )
    
    elif channel == 'phone_call':
        template = templates.get(risk_level, templates['MEDIUM'])
        
        return template.format(
            **data,
            risk_factors_summary=Format_Risk_Factors_Summary(data['risk_factors']),
            emergency_phone=Get_Emergency_Phone()
        )
    
    return "Notification message not available"
```

### ⏰ **3. Timeline-Based Escalation Flow**

#### **3.1 Escalation Timeline**
```python
# Timeline escalation untuk absconding detection
ESCALATION_TIMELINE = {
    'T0_DETECTION': {
        'time': 0,  # Immediate
        'actions': [
            'dashboard_alert',
            'initial_notification',
            'risk_assessment_logging'
        ],
        'channels': ['dashboard']
    },
    'T1_INITIAL': {
        'time': 5,  # 5 menit
        'actions': [
            'send_email',
            'send_whatsapp',
            'update_dashboard_priority'
        ],
        'channels': ['email', 'whatsapp']
    },
    'T2_ESCALATION': {
        'time': 15,  # 15 menit
        'actions': [
            'send_sms',
            'enable_emergency_actions',
            'notify_backup_mantri'
        ],
        'channels': ['sms']
    },
    'T3_CRITICAL': {
        'time': 30,  # 30 menit
        'actions': [
            'trigger_phone_call',
            'auto_lock_account',
            'broadcast_customers',
            'notify_management'
        ],
        'channels': ['phone_call']
    },
    'T4_EMERGENCY': {
        'time': 60,  # 1 jam
        'actions': [
            'auto_route_transfer',
            'notify_authorities',
            'legal_preparation'
        ],
        'channels': ['phone_call', 'email']
    }
}

FUNCTION Execute_Escalation_Timeline(risk_assessment):
    """
    Execute timeline-based escalation
    """
    
    escalation_log = []
    
    for phase_name, phase_config in ESCALATION_TIMELINE.items():
        # Schedule phase execution
        execution_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + timedelta(minutes=phase_config['time'])
        
        # Create scheduled task
        Create_Escalation_Phase_Task(
            phase_name=phase_name,
            risk_assessment=risk_assessment,
            phase_config=phase_config,
            execution_time=execution_time
        )
        
        # Log scheduled phase
        escalation_log.append({
            'phase': phase_name,
            'scheduled_time': execution_time,
            'actions': phase_config['actions'],
            'channels': phase_config['channels']
        })
    
    return escalation_log

# Celery task untuk phase execution
@celery.task
FUNCTION Execute_Escalation_Phase(phase_name, risk_assessment_id, phase_config):
    """
    Execute specific escalation phase
    """
    
    # Get current risk assessment
    risk_assessment = Get_Risk_Assessment(risk_assessment_id)
    
    # Check if still relevant (not resolved)
    if risk_assessment['status'] == 'resolved':
        return f"Phase {phase_name} skipped - issue resolved"
    
    # Execute phase actions
    for action in phase_config['actions']:
        Execute_Escalation_Action(action, risk_assessment)
    
    # Log phase execution
    Log_Escalation_Phase_Execution(phase_name, risk_assessment, phase_config)
    
    return f"Phase {phase_name} executed successfully"

FUNCTION Execute_Escalation_Action(action, risk_assessment):
    """
    Execute specific escalation action
    """
    
    if action == 'dashboard_alert':
        Trigger_Dashboard_Alert(risk_assessment, 'escalation')
    
    elif action == 'send_email':
        Send_Email_Notification(risk_assessment, 'escalation')
    
    elif action == 'send_whatsapp':
        Send_WhatsApp_Notification(risk_assessment, 'escalation')
    
    elif action == 'send_sms':
        Send_SMS_Notification(risk_assessment, 'escalation')
    
    elif action == 'trigger_phone_call':
        Trigger_Emergency_Phone_Call(risk_assessment)
    
    elif action == 'auto_lock_account':
        Auto_Lock_Collector_Account(risk_assessment['collector_id'])
    
    elif action == 'broadcast_customers':
        Auto_Broadcast_Customers(risk_assessment['collector_id'])
    
    elif action == 'auto_route_transfer':
        Auto_Execute_Route_Transfer(risk_assessment['collector_id'])
    
    elif action == 'notify_backup_mantri':
        Notify_Backup_Mantri(risk_assessment)
    
    elif action == 'notify_management':
        Notify_Upper_Management(risk_assessment)
    
    elif action == 'notify_authorities':
        Notify_Legal_Authorities(risk_assessment)
```

### 📞 **4. Multi-Contact Notification Strategy**

#### **4.1 Contact Hierarchy & Priority**
```python
# Contact hierarchy untuk notifications
CONTACT_HIERARCHY = {
    'primary_owner': {
        'priority': 1,
        'channels': ['whatsapp', 'sms', 'phone_call', 'email'],
        'escalation_delay': 0,
        'required_response_time': 300  # 5 menit
    },
    'backup_owner': {
        'priority': 2,
        'channels': ['whatsapp', 'sms', 'email'],
        'escalation_delay': 600,  # 10 menit
        'required_response_time': 600  # 10 menit
    },
    'regional_manager': {
        'priority': 3,
        'channels': ['email', 'sms'],
        'escalation_delay': 1800,  # 30 menit
        'required_response_time': 1800  # 30 menit
    },
    'system_admin': {
        'priority': 4,
        'channels': ['email'],
        'escalation_delay': 3600,  # 1 jam
        'required_response_time': 3600  # 1 jam
    }
}

FUNCTION Get_Notification_Contacts(collector_id, risk_level):
    """
    Get contact list berdasarkan hierarchy dan risk level
    """
    
    contacts = []
    
    # Get tenant owner information
    tenant_info = Get_Tenant_Owner_Info(collector_id)
    
    # Add primary owner
    if tenant_info['primary_owner']:
        contacts.append({
            'name': tenant_info['primary_owner']['name'],
            'role': 'primary_owner',
            'phone': tenant_info['primary_owner']['phone'],
            'email': tenant_info['primary_owner']['email'],
            'whatsapp': tenant_info['primary_owner']['whatsapp'],
            'priority': 1
        })
    
    # Add backup owner untuk high/critical risk
    if risk_level in ['HIGH', 'CRITICAL'] and tenant_info['backup_owner']:
        contacts.append({
            'name': tenant_info['backup_owner']['name'],
            'role': 'backup_owner',
            'phone': tenant_info['backup_owner']['phone'],
            'email': tenant_info['backup_owner']['email'],
            'whatsapp': tenant_info['backup_owner']['whatsapp'],
            'priority': 2
        })
    
    # Add regional manager untuk critical risk
    if risk_level == 'CRITICAL' and tenant_info['regional_manager']:
        contacts.append({
            'name': tenant_info['regional_manager']['name'],
            'role': 'regional_manager',
            'phone': tenant_info['regional_manager']['phone'],
            'email': tenant_info['regional_manager']['email'],
            'priority': 3
        })
    
    # Add system admin untuk critical risk
    if risk_level == 'CRITICAL':
        system_admins = Get_System_Admin_List()
        for admin in system_admins:
            contacts.append({
                'name': admin['name'],
                'role': 'system_admin',
                'email': admin['email'],
                'priority': 4
            })
    
    return contacts

FUNCTION Execute_Multi_Contact_Notification(risk_assessment):
    """
    Execute notification ke multiple contacts dengan hierarchy
    """
    
    contacts = Get_Notification_Contacts(
        risk_assessment['collector_id'], 
        risk_assessment['risk_level']
    )
    
    notification_results = []
    
    for contact in contacts:
        # Get contact-specific channels
        contact_config = CONTACT_HIERARCHY.get(contact['role'], {})
        channels = contact_config.get('channels', ['email'])
        
        # Calculate escalation delay
        escalation_delay = contact_config.get('escalation_delay', 0)
        
        # Schedule notification dengan delay
        if escalation_delay > 0:
            Schedule_Delayed_Notification(
                contact=contact,
                channels=channels,
                data=risk_assessment,
                delay_minutes=escalation_delay
            )
        else:
            # Send immediate notification
            for channel in channels:
                result = Send_Notification_To_Contact(
                    channel, contact, risk_assessment
                )
                notification_results.append(result)
    
    return notification_results

FUNCTION Schedule_Delayed_Notification(contact, channels, data, delay_minutes):
    """
    Schedule delayed notification untuk escalation
    """
    
    scheduled_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + timedelta(minutes=delay_minutes)
    
    # Create delayed notification task
    Create_Delayed_Notification_Task(
        contact=contact,
        channels=channels,
        data=data,
        scheduled_time=scheduled_time
    )
    
    # Log scheduled notification
    Log_Scheduled_Notification(contact, channels, data, scheduled_time)
```

---

### 📊 **5. Response Tracking & Acknowledgment**

#### **5.1 Owner Response Tracking**
```python
# Response tracking system
RESPONSE_TRACKING = {
    'acknowledgment_required': True,
    'response_timeout_minutes': {
        'CRITICAL': 5,    # 5 menit
        'HIGH': 15,       # 15 menit
        'MEDIUM': 30,     # 30 menit
        'LOW': 60         # 1 jam
    },
    'escalation_on_no_response': True,
    'auto_escalation_actions': {
        'CRITICAL': ['phone_call', 'auto_lock', 'authorities'],
        'HIGH': ['sms', 'backup_owner'],
        'MEDIUM': ['email_reminder', 'regional_manager'],
        'LOW': ['email_reminder']
    }
}

FUNCTION Track_Owner_Response(notification_id, contact_id):
    """
    Track owner response ke notification
    """
    
    # Create response tracking record
    tracking_id = Query_Database("""
        INSERT INTO notification_response_tracking (
            notification_id, contact_id, sent_at, 
            response_required, response_timeout_minutes,
            status, created_at
        ) VALUES (%s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, TRUE, %s, 'PENDING', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
        RETURNING id
    """, (notification_id, contact_id, RESPONSE_TRACKING['response_timeout_minutes']['CRITICAL']))[0]['id']
    
    # Schedule timeout check
    timeout_minutes = RESPONSE_TRACKING['response_timeout_minutes']['CRITICAL']
    timeout_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + timedelta(minutes=timeout_minutes)
    
    Schedule_Response_Timeout_Check(tracking_id, timeout_time)
    
    return tracking_id

# Celery task untuk response timeout
@celery.task
FUNCTION Check_Response_Timeout(tracking_id):
    """
    Check jika owner tidak merespon dalam timeout
    """
    
    tracking = Query_Database("""
        SELECT * FROM notification_response_tracking 
        WHERE id = %s AND status = 'PENDING'
    """, (tracking_id,))
    
    if not tracking:
        return "Tracking not found or already responded"
    
    tracking_data = tracking[0]
    
    # Check if timeout exceeded
    if CURRENT_TIMESTAMP > (tracking_data['sent_at'] + timedelta(minutes=tracking_data['response_timeout_minutes'])):
        
        # Mark as timeout
        Query_Database("""
            UPDATE notification_response_tracking 
            SET status = 'TIMEOUT', timeout_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            WHERE id = %s
        """, (tracking_id,))
        
        # Trigger escalation
        Trigger_No_Response_Escalation(tracking_data)
        
        return f"Response timeout triggered escalation for tracking {tracking_id}"
    
    return "Response received within timeout"

FUNCTION Record_Owner_Response(notification_id, contact_id, response_type, notes):
    """
    Record owner response ke notification
    """
    
    Query_Database("""
        UPDATE notification_response_tracking 
        SET status = 'RESPONDED',
            response_type = %s,
            response_notes = %s,
            responded_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        WHERE notification_id = %s AND contact_id = %s
    """, (response_type, notes, notification_id, contact_id))
    
    # Cancel scheduled timeout check
    Cancel_Response_Timeout_Check(notification_id, contact_id)
    
    # Send acknowledgment
    Send_Response_Acknowledgment(contact_id, response_type)
    
    return "Response recorded successfully"
```

#### **5.2 Response Actions & Acknowledgment**
```python
# Response actions yang dapat dilakukan owner
OWNER_RESPONSE_ACTIONS = {
    'acknowledged': {
        'description': 'Owner telah melihat notifikasi',
        'next_action': 'monitor',
        'auto_escalation': False
    },
    'investigating': {
        'description': 'Owner sedang melakukan investigasi',
        'next_action': 'monitor',
        'auto_escalation': False
    },
    'taking_action': {
        'description': 'Owner sedang mengambil tindakan',
        'next_action': 'monitor',
        'auto_escalation': False
    },
    'resolved': {
        'description': 'Owner telah menyelesaikan masalah',
        'next_action': 'close',
        'auto_escalation': False
    },
    'false_positive': {
        'description': 'Owner menganggap ini false positive',
        'next_action': 'investigate',
        'auto_escalation': True
    },
    'escalate': {
        'description': 'Owner meminta eskalasi ke level atas',
        'next_action': 'escalate',
        'auto_escalation': False
    }
}

@app.route('/api/notification/respond', methods=['POST'])
@require_auth
def respond_to_notification():
    """
    API endpoint untuk owner response
    """
    
    data = request.get_json()
    notification_id = data.get('notification_id')
    response_type = data.get('response_type')
    notes = data.get('notes', '')
    
    # Validate response type
    if response_type not in OWNER_RESPONSE_ACTIONS:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid response type'}), 400
    
    try:
        # Record response
        contact_id = get_current_user_id()
        result = Record_Owner_Response(notification_id, contact_id, response_type, notes)
        
        # Get notification details
        notification = Get_Notification_Details(notification_id)
        
        # Handle response-specific actions
        if response_type == 'resolved':
            Resolve_Absconding_Alert(notification['collector_id'], notes)
        elif response_type == 'false_positive':
            Mark_As_False_Positive(notification['collector_id'], notes)
        elif response_type == 'escalate':
            Trigger_Manual_Escalation(notification['collector_id'], notes)
        
        # Send acknowledgment
        Send_Response_Acknowledgment(contact_id, response_type)
        
        return jsonify({
            'message': 'Response recorded successfully',
            'response_type': response_type,
            'next_action': OWNER_RESPONSE_ACTIONS[response_type]['next_action']
        })
        
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"Error recording response: {e}")
        return jsonify({'error': 'Failed to record response'}), 500

FUNCTION Send_Response_Acknowledgment(contact_id, response_type):
    """
    Send acknowledgment ke owner
    """
    
    contact = Get_User_Details(contact_id)
    
    acknowledgment_message = f"""
    Terima kasih atas respons Anda.

    Tindakan: {OWNER_RESPONSE_ACTIONS[response_type]['description']}
    Status: {OWNER_RESPONSE_ACTIONS[response_type]['next_action']}

    Sistem akan melanjutkan monitoring sesuai respons Anda.
    """
    
    # Send via WhatsApp
    if contact['whatsapp']:
        Send_WhatsApp_Message(contact['whatsapp'], acknowledgment_message)
    
    # Update dashboard
    Update_Dashboard_Response_Status(contact_id, response_type)
```

---

### 📈 **6. Analytics & Reporting**

#### **6.1 Notification Performance Metrics**
```python
# Notification performance analytics
NOTIFICATION_ANALYTICS = {
    'metrics': [
        'delivery_rate',
        'response_rate',
        'response_time_average',
        'escalation_frequency',
        'resolution_time_average'
    ],
    'reporting_periods': ['daily', 'weekly', 'monthly']
}

@app.route('/api/analytics/notification-performance')
@require_auth
def get_notification_analytics():
    """
    Get notification performance analytics
    """
    
    tenant_id = get_current_tenant_id()
    period = request.args.get('period', 'daily')
    
    # Get notification metrics
    metrics = Query_Database("""
        WITH notification_metrics AS (
            SELECT 
                COUNT(*) as total_notifications,
                COUNT(CASE WHEN delivery_status = 'delivered' THEN 1 END) as delivered_count,
                COUNT(CASE WHEN response_status = 'RESPONDED' THEN 1 END) as responded_count,
                AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (responded_at - sent_at))/60) as avg_response_minutes,
                COUNT(CASE WHEN escalated = TRUE THEN 1 END) as escalated_count,
                AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at))/60) as avg_resolution_minutes
            FROM notifications n
            LEFT JOIN notification_response_tracking rt ON n.id = rt.notification_id
            WHERE n.tenant_id = %s
              AND n.created_at >= %s
        )
        SELECT 
            total_notifications,
            delivered_count,
            ROUND((delivered_count::DECIMAL / total_notifications) * 100, 2) as delivery_rate,
            responded_count,
            ROUND((responded_count::DECIMAL / total_notifications) * 100, 2) as response_rate,
            ROUND(avg_response_minutes, 2) as avg_response_minutes,
            escalated_count,
            ROUND((escalated_count::DECIMAL / total_notifications) * 100, 2) as escalation_rate,
            ROUND(avg_resolution_minutes, 2) as avg_resolution_minutes
        FROM notification_metrics
    """, (tenant_id, Get_Period_Start_Date(period)))
    
    # Get channel performance
    channel_metrics = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            channel,
            COUNT(*) as total_sent,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN delivery_status = 'delivered' THEN 1 END) as delivered,
            COUNT(CASE WHEN response_status = 'RESPONDED' THEN 1 END) as responded
        FROM notifications
        WHERE tenant_id = %s
          AND created_at >= %s
        GROUP BY channel
        ORDER BY total_sent DESC
    """, (tenant_id, Get_Period_Start_Date(period)))
    
    # Get escalation timeline
    escalation_timeline = Query_Database("""
        SELECT 
            phase_name,
            AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (executed_at - created_at))/60) as avg_execution_minutes,
            COUNT(*) as execution_count
        FROM escalation_phase_executions
        WHERE tenant_id = %s
          AND created_at >= %s
        GROUP BY phase_name
        ORDER BY avg_execution_minutes
    """, (tenant_id, Get_Period_Start_Date(period)))
    
    return jsonify({
        'period': period,
        'overall_metrics': metrics[0] if metrics else {},
        'channel_performance': channel_metrics,
        'escalation_timeline': escalation_timeline
    })
```

---

### 🎯 **7. Complete Notification Flow Summary**

#### **7.1 End-to-End Flow Diagram**
```
T0: Detection Trigger
├── Real-time monitoring detects anomaly
├── Risk score calculation (0-100)
├── Risk level determination (MINIMAL-LOW-MEDIUM-HIGH-CRITICAL)
└── Initial dashboard alert

T1: Initial Notification (0-5 minutes)
├── Send to primary owner
├── Channels: Dashboard + Email + WhatsApp
├── Message templates based on risk level
└── Response tracking initiated

T2: Escalation (5-30 minutes)
├── No response → escalate to backup owner
├── High risk → add SMS notification
├── Critical risk → trigger phone call
└── Auto-lock account consideration

T3: Critical Response (30+ minutes)
├── Auto-execute emergency actions
├── Broadcast to all customers
├── Route transfer to backup mantri
├── Notify authorities (if needed)
└── Legal documentation preparation

T4: Resolution & Recovery
├── Owner response tracking
├── Action acknowledgment
├── Resolution logging
├── Performance analytics
└── System optimization
```

#### **7.2 Key Success Metrics**
- **Detection Time**: < 1 minute from anomaly occurrence
- **First Notification**: < 5 minutes from detection
- **Owner Response**: < 15 minutes for critical cases
- **Resolution Time**: < 1 hour for critical cases
- **Escalation Rate**: < 10% require manual escalation
- **False Positive Rate**: < 5% of all alerts

---

---

## ⚡ **Real-Time Push Notification & WhatsApp Gateway Integration**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Sistem notifikasi real-time yang ultra-cepat menggunakan kombinasi Push Notification aplikasi dan WhatsApp Gateway untuk deteksi fraud tingkat tinggi. Alur ini dirancang untuk memberikan peringatan SEBELUM mantri menjauh terlalu jauh, menjadikannya selling point utama untuk SaaS Koperasi Harian.

---

### 🚨 **1. Pemicu Notifikasi (High-Risk Trigger Combination)**

#### **1.1 Dual-Condition Trigger System**
```python
# High-risk trigger conditions - BOTH must be true
HIGH_RISK_TRIGGERS = {
    'condition_a': {
        'name': 'cash_limit_exceeded',
        'threshold': 5000000,  # Rp5 juta
        'description': 'Saldo tunai di tangan melebihi batas',
        'check_frequency': 'real_time',
        'data_source': 'collector_cash_flow'
    },
    'condition_b': {
        'name': 'location_anomaly',
        'threshold_distance': 5000,  # 5km dari nasabah terakhir
        'threshold_time': 1800,      # 30 menit di luar wilayah
        'description': 'Posisi GPS di luar wilayah tugas',
        'check_frequency': 'real_time',
        'data_source': 'gps_tracking'
    }
}

# Real-time monitoring function
FUNCTION Monitor_High_Risk_Conditions():
    """
    Real-time monitoring untuk high-risk combination triggers
    """
    
    active_collectors = Query_Database("""
        SELECT e.id, e.nama_lengkap, e.user_id, e.wilayah_tugas,
               u.last_location_lat, u.last_location_lng, u.last_location_update,
               ccf.total_collected, ccf.total_deposited, ccf.cash_on_hand
        FROM employees e
        JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id
        LEFT JOIN collector_cash_flow ccf ON e.id = ccf.collector_id 
            AND ccf.transaction_date = CURRENT_DATE
        WHERE e.status_pegawai = 'Aktif'
          AND e.role = 'Mantri'
          AND u.status_aktif = TRUE
          AND u.last_location_update IS NOT NULL
    """)
    
    for collector in active_collectors:
        # Check Condition A: Cash Limit
        condition_a_met = Check_Cash_Limit_Condition(collector)
        
        # Check Condition B: Location Anomaly
        condition_b_met = Check_Location_Anomaly_Condition(collector)
        
        # BOTH conditions must be true for high-risk alert
        if condition_a_met and condition_b_met:
            # Additional verification: Check if heading to office
            if not Is_Heading_To_Office(collector):
                Trigger_High_Risk_Alert(collector, condition_a_met, condition_b_met)

FUNCTION Check_Cash_Limit_Condition(collector):
    """
    Check Condition A: Cash limit exceeded
    """
    
    cash_on_hand = collector['cash_on_hand'] or 0
    
    if cash_on_hand > HIGH_RISK_TRIGGERS['condition_a']['threshold']:
        return {
            'triggered': True,
            'value': cash_on_hand,
            'threshold': HIGH_RISK_TRIGGERS['condition_a']['threshold'],
            'excess_amount': cash_on_hand - HIGH_RISK_TRIGGERS['condition_a']['threshold'],
            'details': f"Saldo di tangan: Rp {cash_on_hand:,} (Melebihi limit Rp {HIGH_RISK_TRIGGERS['condition_a']['threshold']:,})"
        }
    
    return {'triggered': False}

FUNCTION Check_Location_Anomaly_Condition(collector):
    """
    Check Condition B: Location anomaly detection
    """
    
    current_location = {
        'lat': collector['last_location_lat'],
        'lng': collector['last_location_lng'],
        'timestamp': collector['last_location_update']
    }
    
    # Check if outside assigned area for >30 minutes
    time_outside_area = Calculate_Time_Outside_Assigned_Area(collector['id'], current_location)
    
    if time_outside_area > HIGH_RISK_TRIGGERS['condition_b']['threshold_time']:
        # Check distance from nearest customer
        nearest_customer = Get_Nearest_Customer_Location(collector['id'], current_location)
        
        if nearest_customer:
            distance = Calculate_Distance(
                current_location['lat'], current_location['lng'],
                nearest_customer['latitude'], nearest_customer['longitude']
            )
            
            if distance > HIGH_RISK_TRIGGERS['condition_b']['threshold_distance']:
                return {
                    'triggered': True,
                    'value': distance,
                    'threshold': HIGH_RISK_TRIGGERS['condition_b']['threshold_distance'],
                    'time_outside': time_outside_area,
                    'details': f"Luar wilayah tugas selama {time_outside_area/60:.0f} menit, {distance/1000:.1f}km dari nasabah terdekat"
                }
    
    return {'triggered': False}

FUNCTION Is_Heading_To_Office(collector):
    """
    Additional verification: Check if collector is heading to office
    """
    
    current_location = {
        'lat': collector['last_location_lat'],
        'lng': collector['last_location_lng']
    }
    
    office_location = Get_Office_Location(collector['wilayah_tugas'])
    
    if not office_location:
        return False
    
    distance_to_office = Calculate_Distance(
        current_location['lat'], current_location['lng'],
        office_location['latitude'], office_location['longitude']
    )
    
    # Check if within 2km of office and moving closer
    if distance_to_office < 2000:  # Within 2km
        # Check movement pattern (simplified)
        recent_locations = Get_Recent_Locations(collector['id'], minutes=10)
        if len(recent_locations) >= 2:
            distance_change = Calculate_Distance(
                recent_locations[0]['lat'], recent_locations[0]['lng'],
                recent_locations[-1]['lat'], recent_locations[-1]['lng']
            )
            
            # If moving towards office (distance decreasing)
            if distance_change > 0:  # Moving
                return True
    
    return False
```

---

### 📱 **2. Real-Time Notification Workflow**

#### **2.1 Instant Notification Pipeline**
```python
# Real-time notification pipeline
REAL_TIME_PIPELINE = {
    'detection_interval': 30,  # Check every 30 seconds
    'notification_delay': 0,   # Immediate notification
    'verification_timeout': 60, # 1 minute verification window
    'escalation_delay': 900    # 15 minutes to auto-lock
}

FUNCTION Trigger_High_Risk_Alert(collector, condition_a, condition_b):
    """
    Trigger instant high-risk alert with real-time pipeline
    """
    
    # Create high-risk alert record
    alert_id = Query_Database("""
        INSERT INTO high_risk_alerts (
            collector_id, alert_type, risk_score, 
            condition_a_data, condition_b_data,
            alert_status, created_at
        ) VALUES (%s, 'HIGH_RISK_FRAUD_COMBINATION', 100, %s, %s, 'TRIGGERED', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
        RETURNING id
    """, (collector['id'], json.dumps(condition_a), json.dumps(condition_b)))[0]['id']
    
    # Prepare notification data
    notification_data = Prepare_High_Risk_Notification_Data(
        collector, condition_a, condition_b, alert_id
    )
    
    # Execute real-time notification pipeline
    pipeline_results = []
    
    # Step 1: Send Push Notification (Instant)
    push_result = Send_Push_Notification_Instant(notification_data)
    pipeline_results.append({'channel': 'push', 'result': push_result})
    
    # Step 2: Send WhatsApp (Instant)
    whatsapp_result = Send_WhatsApp_High_Risk_Alert(notification_data)
    pipeline_results.append({'channel': 'whatsapp', 'result': whatsapp_result})
    
    # Step 3: Update Dashboard (Real-time)
    dashboard_result = Update_Emergency_Dashboard(notification_data)
    pipeline_results.append({'channel': 'dashboard', 'result': dashboard_result})
    
    # Step 4: Schedule escalation (15 minutes)
    Schedule_Escalation_Tasks(alert_id, notification_data)
    
    # Log pipeline execution
    Log_Notification_Pipeline(alert_id, pipeline_results)
    
    return {
        'alert_id': alert_id,
        'pipeline_results': pipeline_results,
        'escalation_scheduled': True
    }

FUNCTION Send_Push_Notification_Instant(notification_data):
    """
    Send instant push notification to mobile devices
    """
    
    # Get owner devices
    owner_devices = Get_Owner_Devices(notification_data['tenant_id'])
    
    push_payload = {
        'title': '🚨 PERINGATAN DARURAT - POTENSI FRAUD PETUGAS',
        'body': f"{notification_data['collector_name']} membawa Rp {notification_data['cash_on_hand']:,} di luar wilayah tugas",
        'data': {
            'alert_id': notification_data['alert_id'],
            'collector_id': notification_data['collector_id'],
            'alert_type': 'HIGH_RISK_FRAUD',
            'priority': 'critical',
            'action_required': True,
            'quick_actions': [
                {'id': 'lock_account', 'title': '🔒 Kunci Akun'},
                {'id': 'view_map', 'title': '🗺️ Lihat Peta'},
                {'id': 'contact_collector', 'title': '📞 Hubungi'}
            ]
        },
        'sound': 'emergency_alarm',
        'priority': 'high',
        'ttl': 3600  # 1 hour
    }
    
    # Send to all owner devices
    results = []
    for device in owner_devices:
        try:
            result = Send_Firebase_Push_Notification(device['token'], push_payload)
            results.append({
                'device_id': device['id'],
                'status': 'sent' if result else 'failed',
                'timestamp': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            })
        except Exception as e:
            results.append({
                'device_id': device['id'],
                'status': 'error',
                'error': str(e),
                'timestamp': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            })
    
    return {
        'total_devices': len(owner_devices),
        'sent_count': len([r for r in results if r['status'] == 'sent']),
        'results': results
    }

FUNCTION Send_WhatsApp_High_Risk_Alert(notification_data):
    """
    Send WhatsApp alert with rich formatting and action buttons
    """
    
    # Generate location link
    maps_link = Generate_Google_Maps_Link(
        notification_data['last_location']['lat'],
        notification_data['last_location']['lng'],
        f"Posisi Terakhir: {notification_data['collector_name']}"
    )
    
    # Generate quick action links
    lock_link = f"{APP_BASE_URL}/emergency/lock/{notification_data['collector_id']}?alert_id={notification_data['alert_id']}"
    dashboard_link = f"{APP_BASE_URL}/dashboard/emergency?alert_id={notification_data['alert_id']}"
    
    # WhatsApp message template
    whatsapp_message = f"""
🚨 *PERINGATAN DARURAT - POTENSI FRAUD PETUGAS* 🚨

Halo {notification_data['owner_name']},

Sistem {APP_NAME} mendeteksi aktivitas mencurigakan pada petugas lapangan berikut:

*Nama Petugas:* {notification_data['collector_name']}
*ID Petugas:* {notification_data['collector_id']}
*Saldo di Tangan:* Rp {notification_data['cash_on_hand']:,} ⚠️ (Melebihi Limit)
*Posisi Terakhir:* {maps_link}
*Status Jalur:* DI LUAR WILAYAH TUGAS (Jarak {notification_data['distance_from_nearest_customer']/1000:.1f} KM dari nasabah terdekat)
*Update Terakhir:* {notification_data['last_update_relative']}

*Tindakan yang Disarankan:*
1️⃣ Segera hubungi petugas yang bersangkutan
2️⃣ Pantau pergerakan melalui Dashboard Emergency
3️⃣ Klik tombol di bawah untuk Kunci Akun Sementara:
🔒 [Kunci Akun Cepat]({lock_link})

📊 [Dashboard Emergency]({dashboard_link})

---
⚠️ Pesan ini dikirim otomatis oleh sistem keamanan SaaS Koperasi.
    """.strip()
    
    # Send to owner WhatsApp
    owner_contacts = Get_Owner_WhatsApp_Contacts(notification_data['tenant_id'])
    
    results = []
    for contact in owner_contacts:
        try:
            result = Send_WhatsApp_Message(contact['whatsapp'], whatsapp_message)
            results.append({
                'contact_name': contact['name'],
                'whatsapp': contact['whatsapp'],
                'status': 'sent' if result else 'failed',
                'timestamp': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            })
        except Exception as e:
            results.append({
                'contact_name': contact['name'],
                'whatsapp': contact['whatsapp'],
                'status': 'error',
                'error': str(e),
                'timestamp': CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            })
    
    return {
        'total_contacts': len(owner_contacts),
        'sent_count': len([r for r in results if r['status'] == 'sent']),
        'results': results
    }
```

#### **2.2 Real-Time Dashboard Integration**
```javascript
// Real-time dashboard updates untuk high-risk alerts
class HighRiskDashboard {
    constructor() {
        this.socket = null;
        this.activeAlerts = new Map();
        this.initializeWebSocket();
        this.setupAlertHandlers();
    }
    
    initializeWebSocket() {
        this.socket = io(`${WS_BASE_URL}/high-risk-alerts`, {
            auth: {
                token: getAuthToken(),
                tenant_id: getCurrentTenantId()
            }
        });
        
        this.socket.on('high_risk_alert', (alert) => {
            this.handleHighRiskAlert(alert);
        });
        
        this.socket.on('alert_update', (update) => {
            this.updateAlert(update);
        });
    }
    
    handleHighRiskAlert(alert) {
        // Store alert
        this.activeAlerts.set(alert.alert_id, alert);
        
        // Show critical alert popup
        this.showCriticalAlertPopup(alert);
        
        // Update dashboard KPI
        this.updateEmergencyKPI(alert);
        
        // Show map marker
        this.updateMapAlert(alert);
        
        // Play emergency sound
        this.playEmergencySound();
        
        // Send browser notification
        this.sendBrowserNotification(alert);
    }
    
    showCriticalAlertPopup(alert) {
        const popup = document.createElement('div');
        popup.className = 'critical-alert-popup';
        popup.innerHTML = `
            <div class="alert-header">
                <h2>🚨 PERINGATAN DARURAT - POTENSI FRAUD</h2>
                <div class="alert-time">${new Date(alert.created_at).toLocaleTimeString()}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="alert-content">
                <div class="collector-info">
                    <h3>${alert.collector_name}</h3>
                    <p>ID: ${alert.collector_id}</p>
                    <p class="cash-warning">💰 Saldo: Rp ${alert.cash_on_hand.toLocaleString('id-ID')}</p>
                    <p class="location-warning">📍 ${alert.location_details}</p>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-actions">
                    <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="lockAccount('${alert.collector_id}', '${alert.alert_id}')">
                        🔒 Kunci Akun
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="viewOnMap('${alert.collector_id}')">
                        🗺️ Lihat Peta
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-warning" onclick="contactCollector('${alert.collector_id}')">
                        📞 Hubungi
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="alert-footer">
                <button class="btn-close" onclick="this.closest('.critical-alert-popup').remove()">
                    ✕
                </button>
            </div>
        `;
        
        document.body.appendChild(popup);
        
        // Auto-remove after 30 seconds if not interacted
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (popup.parentElement) {
                popup.remove();
            }
        }, 30000);
        
        // Add slide-in animation
        setTimeout(() => popup.classList.add('show'), 100);
    }
    
    playEmergencySound() {
        const audio = new Audio('/sounds/emergency-alarm.mp3');
        audio.volume = 0.8;
        audio.play().catch(e => console.log('Audio play failed:', e));
    }
    
    sendBrowserNotification(alert) {
        if (Notification.permission === 'granted') {
            new Notification('🚨 PERINGATAN DARURAT - POTENSI FRAUD', {
                body: `${alert.collector_name} membawa Rp ${alert.cash_on_hand.toLocaleString('id-ID')} di luar wilayah tugas`,
                icon: '/icons/emergency-alert.png',
                tag: alert.alert_id,
                requireInteraction: true,
                actions: [
                    {
                        action: 'lock',
                        title: '🔒 Kunci Akun'
                    },
                    {
                        action: 'view',
                        title: '🗺️ Lihat Peta'
                    }
                ]
            });
        }
    }
}

// Global functions for quick actions
window.lockAccount = async (collectorId, alertId) => {
    if (!confirm('Apakah Anda yakin ingin mengunci akun mantri ini?')) {
        return;
    }
    
    try {
        const response = await fetch(`/api/emergency/lock-account`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'Authorization': `Bearer ${getAuthToken()}`
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
                collector_id: collectorId,
                alert_id: alertId,
                reason: 'High-risk fraud prevention - auto-lock'
            })
        });
        
        if (response.ok) {
            showSuccessNotification('Akun mantri berhasil dikunci');
            // Close popup
            document.querySelector('.critical-alert-popup')?.remove();
        } else {
            throw new Error('Failed to lock account');
        }
    } catch (error) {
        showErrorNotification('Gagal mengunci akun mantri');
    }
};
```

---

### ⚡ **3. Escalation & Auto-Lock System**

#### **3.1 Time-Based Escalation**
```python
# Escalation configuration untuk high-risk alerts
ESCALATION_CONFIG = {
    'no_response_timeout': 900,  # 15 minutes
    'auto_lock_enabled': True,
    'customer_alert_enabled': True,
    'evidence_collection_enabled': True
}

FUNCTION Schedule_Escalation_Tasks(alert_id, notification_data):
    """
    Schedule escalation tasks untuk high-risk alerts
    """
    
    # Task 1: Auto-lock after 15 minutes if no response
    if ESCALATION_CONFIG['auto_lock_enabled']:
        Schedule_Auto_Lock_Task(
            alert_id=alert_id,
            delay_minutes=15,
            notification_data=notification_data
        )
    
    # Task 2: Customer alert after confirmation
    if ESCALATION_CONFIG['customer_alert_enabled']:
        Schedule_Customer_Alert_Task(
            alert_id=alert_id,
            delay_minutes=20,  # 5 minutes after auto-lock
            notification_data=notification_data
        )
    
    # Task 3: Evidence collection
    if ESCALATION_CONFIG['evidence_collection_enabled']:
        Schedule_Evidence_Collection_Task(
            alert_id=alert_id,
            delay_minutes=5,  # Start collecting immediately
            notification_data=notification_data
        )

# Celery task untuk auto-lock
@celery.task
FUNCTION Execute_Auto_Lock(alert_id, notification_data):
    """
    Execute automatic account lock if no owner response
    """
    
    # Check if owner has responded
    response_check = Query_Database("""
        SELECT COUNT(*) as response_count 
        FROM notification_response_tracking 
        WHERE alert_id = %s AND status = 'RESPONDED'
    """, (alert_id,))
    
    if response_check[0]['response_count'] > 0:
        return f"Auto-lock skipped - owner responded to alert {alert_id}"
    
    # Execute auto-lock
    try:
        # Lock collector account
        Query_Database("""
            UPDATE employees 
            SET app_status = 'Locked', 
                lock_reason = 'Auto-lock - High-risk fraud prevention - No owner response',
                locked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            WHERE id = %s
        """, (notification_data['collector_id'],))
        
        # Update alert status
        Query_Database("""
            UPDATE high_risk_alerts 
            SET alert_status = 'AUTO_LOCKED', 
                auto_locked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            WHERE id = %s
        """, (alert_id,))
        
        # Send notification about auto-lock
        Send_Auto_Lock_Notification(notification_data)
        
        # Schedule customer alert
        if ESCALATION_CONFIG['customer_alert_enabled']:
            Trigger_Customer_Broadcast_Alert(notification_data)
        
        return f"Auto-lock executed for collector {notification_data['collector_id']}"
        
    except Exception as e:
        Log_Error(f"Auto-lock failed for alert {alert_id}: {e}")
        return f"Auto-lock failed for alert {alert_id}: {e}"

FUNCTION Send_Auto_Lock_Notification(notification_data):
    """
    Send notification about auto-lock execution
    """
    
    message = f"""
⚠️ *AUTO-LOCK EXECUTED* ⚠️

Sistem telah mengunci akun mantri secara otomatis:

*Mantri:* {notification_data['collector_name']}
*Alasan:* Tidak ada respons owner dalam 15 menit
*Waktu Lock:* {CURRENT_TIMESTAMP.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}
*Saldo Terakhir:* Rp {notification_data['cash_on_hand']:,}

*Status Mantri:* 🔒 DIKUNCI
*Akses Aplikasi:* Dinonaktifkan

*Rekomendasi:*
1️⃣ Segera hubungi mantri yang bersangkutan
2️⃣ Verifikasi kondisi sebenarnya
3️⃣ Ambil tindakan lanjutan jika diperlukan

Dashboard: {APP_BASE_URL}/dashboard/emergency
    """.strip()
    
    # Send to all owner contacts
    owner_contacts = Get_Owner_Contacts(notification_data['tenant_id'])
    for contact in owner_contacts:
        if contact['whatsapp']:
            Send_WhatsApp_Message(contact['whatsapp'], message)
```

#### **3.2 Customer Alert System**
```python
FUNCTION Trigger_Customer_Broadcast_Alert(notification_data):
    """
    Send broadcast alert to all customers in collector's route
    """
    
    # Get all active customers in collector's route
    customers = Query_Database("""
        SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.nama_anggota, m.no_whatsapp, m.email,
               l.total_tagihan, l.sisa_tagihan
        FROM members m
        JOIN loans l ON m.id = l.member_id
        WHERE l.assigned_collector_id = %s
          AND l.status_pinjaman = 'Aktif'
          AND m.status_anggota = 'Aktif'
    """, (notification_data['collector_id'],))
    
    # Prepare customer alert message
    customer_message = f"""
🏦 *PENTING - Informasi Keamanan Transaksi* 🏦

Hai Bapak/Ibu {{nama_anggota}},

Kami dari {notification_data['koperasi_name']} ingin menginformasikan:

⚠️ *Sedang ada perubahan sementara proses penagihan*
- Petugas lapangan sedang dalam verifikasi sistem
- Mohon **TIDAK melakukan transaksi tunai** selain kepada petugas resmi dengan tanda pengenal baru

📞 *Hubungi Kantor:*
- {notification_data['koperasi_phone']}
- {notification_data['koperasi_address']}

🔒 *Keamanan Anda adalah prioritas kami*
- Semua transaksi akan diverifikasi kebenarannya
- Kami akan menginformasikan kembali setelah normal

Terima kasih atas pengertian dan kerjasamanya.

---
*{notification_data['koperasi_name']} - Sistem Keamanan*
    """.strip()
    
    broadcast_results = []
    
    for customer in customers:
        try:
            # Personalize message
            personalized_message = customer_message.replace('{{nama_anggota}}', customer['nama_anggota'])
            
            # Send WhatsApp
            if customer['no_whatsapp']:
                whatsapp_result = Send_WhatsApp_Message(customer['no_whatsapp'], personalized_message)
                broadcast_results.append({
                    'customer_id': customer['id'],
                    'customer_name': customer['nama_anggota'],
                    'channel': 'whatsapp',
                    'status': 'sent' if whatsapp_result else 'failed'
                })
            
            # Send Email (backup)
            if customer['email']:
                email_result = Send_Customer_Alert_Email(customer['email'], personalized_message, customer)
                broadcast_results.append({
                    'customer_id': customer['id'],
                    'customer_name': customer['nama_anggota'],
                    'channel': 'email',
                    'status': 'sent' if email_result else 'failed'
                })
                
        except Exception as e:
            broadcast_results.append({
                'customer_id': customer['id'],
                'customer_name': customer['nama_anggota'],
                'channel': 'error',
                'status': 'failed',
                'error': str(e)
            })
    
    # Log broadcast results
    Query_Database("""
        INSERT INTO customer_broadcast_logs (
            alert_id, collector_id, total_customers, sent_count, 
            failed_count, broadcast_results, created_at
        ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    """, (
        notification_data['alert_id'],
        notification_data['collector_id'],
        len(customers),
        len([r for r in broadcast_results if r['status'] == 'sent']),
        len([r for r in broadcast_results if r['status'] == 'failed']),
        json.dumps(broadcast_results)
    ))
    
    return {
        'total_customers': len(customers),
        'sent_count': len([r for r in broadcast_results if r['status'] == 'sent']),
        'failed_count': len([r for r in broadcast_results if r['status'] == 'failed']),
        'results': broadcast_results
    }
```

---

### 📋 **4. Evidence Collection & Legal Documentation**

#### **4.1 Automatic Evidence Collection**
```python
FUNCTION Schedule_Evidence_Collection_Task(alert_id, notification_data):
    """
    Start automatic evidence collection for legal purposes
    """
    
    evidence_collection_id = Generate_UUID()
    
    # Create evidence collection record
    Query_Database("""
        INSERT INTO evidence_collections (
            id, alert_id, collector_id, collection_status,
            started_at, created_at
        ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, 'IN_PROGRESS', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    """, (evidence_collection_id, alert_id, notification_data['collector_id']))
    
    # Collect various evidence types
    evidence_tasks = [
        Collect_GPS_Trace_Data,
        Collect_Transaction_History,
        Collect_Cash_Flow_Records,
        Collect_Communication_Logs,
        Generate_Evidence_PDF
    ]
    
    for task in evidence_tasks:
        task.delay(evidence_collection_id, notification_data['collector_id'])

# Celery task untuk GPS trace collection
@celery.task
FUNCTION Collect_GPS_Trace_Data(evidence_collection_id, collector_id):
    """
    Collect GPS trace data for evidence
    """
    
    # Get GPS history for last 24 hours
    gps_data = Query_Database("""
        SELECT latitude, longitude, accuracy, timestamp, battery_level
        FROM gps_tracking_logs
        WHERE collector_id = %s
          AND timestamp >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24 hours'
        ORDER BY timestamp DESC
    """, (collector_id,))
    
    # Store as evidence
    Query_Database("""
        INSERT INTO evidence_gps_traces (
            evidence_collection_id, collector_id, gps_data, collected_at
        ) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    """, (evidence_collection_id, collector_id, json.dumps(gps_data)))
    
    return f"GPS trace collected: {len(gps_data)} points"

# Celery task untuk evidence PDF generation
@celery.task
FUNCTION Generate_Evidence_PDF(evidence_collection_id, collector_id):
    """
    Generate comprehensive evidence PDF for legal purposes
    """
    
    # Get all evidence data
    evidence_data = Get_Complete_Evidence_Data(evidence_collection_id)
    
    # Generate PDF
    pdf_content = Generate_Evidence_PDF_Content(evidence_data)
    
    # Save PDF
    pdf_path = f"/evidence/{evidence_collection_id}_evidence_{CURRENT_TIMESTAMP.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.pdf"
    
    with open(f"{EVIDENCE_STORAGE_PATH}{pdf_path}", 'wb') as f:
        f.write(pdf_content)
    
    # Update evidence collection
    Query_Database("""
        UPDATE evidence_collections 
        SET evidence_pdf_path = %s, 
            collection_status = 'COMPLETED',
            completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        WHERE id = %s
    """, (pdf_path, evidence_collection_id))
    
    return f"Evidence PDF generated: {pdf_path}"

FUNCTION Generate_Evidence_PDF_Content(evidence_data):
    """
    Generate PDF content for legal evidence
    """
    
    from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas
    from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import letter, A4
    from reportlab.lib.units import inch
    import io
    
    buffer = io.BytesIO()
    p = canvas.Canvas(buffer, pagesize=A4)
    
    # PDF Header
    p.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 16)
    p.drawString(inch, 10.5*inch, "LAPORAN BUKTI KASUS FRAUD PETUGAS")
    p.setFont("Helvetica", 12)
    p.drawString(inch, 10*inch, f"Koperasi: {evidence_data['koperasi_name']}")
    p.drawString(inch, 9.7*inch, f"Tanggal: {CURRENT_TIMESTAMP.strftime('%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S')}")
    p.drawString(inch, 9.4*inch, f"ID Laporan: {evidence_data['evidence_collection_id']}")
    
    # Petugas Information
    y_pos = 8.8*inch
    p.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 14)
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, "DATA PETUGAS")
    y_pos -= 0.3*inch
    
    p.setFont("Helvetica", 11)
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"Nama: {evidence_data['collector_name']}")
    y_pos -= 0.25*inch
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"ID Petugas: {evidence_data['collector_id']}")
    y_pos -= 0.25*inch
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"Wilayah Tugas: {evidence_data['assigned_area']}")
    y_pos -= 0.25*inch
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"Saldo di Tangan: Rp {evidence_data['cash_on_hand']:,}")
    
    # Alert Details
    y_pos -= 0.5*inch
    p.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 14)
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, "DETAILS ALERT")
    y_pos -= 0.3*inch
    
    p.setFont("Helvetica", 11)
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"Waktu Deteksi: {evidence_data['detection_time']}")
    y_pos -= 0.25*inch
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"Lokasi Terakhir: {evidence_data['last_location']}")
    y_pos -= 0.25*inch
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"Jarak dari Nasabah: {evidence_data['distance_from_customer']/1000:.1f} KM")
    y_pos -= 0.25*inch
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"Status: {evidence_data['alert_status']}")
    
    # GPS Tracking Summary
    if evidence_data['gps_traces']:
        y_pos -= 0.5*inch
        p.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 14)
        p.drawString(inch, y_pos, "TRACKING GPS (24 JAM)")
        y_pos -= 0.3*inch
        
        p.setFont("Helvetica", 10)
        for trace in evidence_data['gps_traces'][:20]:  # Show first 20 points
            if y_pos < 2*inch:  # New page if needed
                p.showPage()
                y_pos = 10*inch
                p.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 14)
                p.drawString(inch, y_pos, "TRACKING GPS (LANJUTAN)")
                y_pos -= 0.3*inch
                p.setFont("Helvetica", 10)
            
            p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"{trace['timestamp']}: {trace['latitude']}, {trace['longitude']} (Acc: {trace['accuracy']}m)")
            y_pos -= 0.2*inch
    
    # Transaction Summary
    y_pos -= 0.5*inch
    p.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 14)
    p.drawString(inch, y_pos, "RIWAYAT TRANSAKSI (7 HARI)")
    y_pos -= 0.3*inch
    
    p.setFont("Helvetica", 10)
    for transaction in evidence_data['transactions'][:15]:  # Show first 15 transactions
        if y_pos < 2*inch:  # New page if needed
            p.showPage()
            y_pos = 10*inch
            p.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 14)
            p.drawString(inch, y_pos, "RIWAYAT TRANSAKSI (LANJUTAN)")
            y_pos -= 0.3*inch
            p.setFont("Helvetica", 10)
        
        p.drawString(inch, y_pos, f"{transaction['date']}: Rp {transaction['amount']:,} - {transaction['customer_name']}")
        y_pos -= 0.2*inch
    
    # Footer
    p.setFont("Helvetica", 9)
    p.drawString(inch, 0.5*inch, f"Generated by {APP_NAME} - Anti-Fraud System")
    p.drawString(inch, 0.3*inch, f"Page 1 of {p.getPageNumber()}")
    
    p.save()
    buffer.seek(0)
    
    return buffer.getvalue()
```

```python
# Marketing script untuk sales team
MARKETING_SCRIPT = """
🎯 SCRIPT PENJUALAN UNTUK CALON KLIEN:

"Apakah Anda pernah khawatir uang koperasi dibawa kabur oleh mantri?

Masalah ini adalah nightmare setiap owner koperasi. 
Mantri membawa Rp5-10 juta, lalu menghilang. 
Uang nasabah tidak terbayar, reputasi rusak, harus cari mantri baru.

Dengan sistem kami, hal ini TIDAK AKAN TERJADI lagi.

📱 **Cara Kerjanya:**
1. Sistem monitoring real-time 24/7
2. Deteksi jika mantri bawa uang > Rp5 juta DI LUAR wilayah tugas
3. WhatsApp instan ke Anda dalam 30 detik
4. Auto-lock account dalam 15 menit jika tidak respons
5. Broadcast ke semua nasabah untuk mencegah transaksi ilegal
6. Kumpulkan bukti legal otomatis untuk polisi

🚀 **Hasilnya:**
- Tidak ada lagi uang yang hilang
- Mantri berfikir 2x sebelum mencoba curang
- Nasabah merasa aman dan terlindungi
- Anda tidur nyaman tanpa khawatir

💰 **Investasi Kecil, Manfaat Besar:**
Hanya Rp200/transaksi, Anda mendapatkan proteksi jutaan rupiah.

Berapa nilai kerugian yang bisa Anda hindari?
"""
```

### 📊 **6. Implementation Summary & Success Metrics**

#### **6.1 Complete Implementation Flow**
```
REAL-TIME FRAUD PREVENTION PIPELINE:

┌─[30 Second Monitoring Loop]─┐
│                              │
│  Cash Limit Check ✅          │
│  Location Anomaly Check ✅   │
│  Heading to Office? ❌        │
│                              │
└─[BOTH CONDITIONS TRUE]───────┘
          ↓
┌─[INSTANT NOTIFICATION]────────┐
│  • Push Notification (0s)     │
│  • WhatsApp Alert (0s)        │
│  • Dashboard Update (0s)     │
│  • Browser Notification (0s)  │
└────────────────────────────────┘
          ↓
┌─[OWNER RESPONSE WINDOW]───────┐
│  • 15 Menit untuk respons      │
│  • Quick Action Buttons       │
│  • Real-time Tracking         │
│  • Communication Tools         │
└────────────────────────────────┘
          ↓
┌─[AUTO-ESCALATION]──────────────┐
│  • Auto-Lock Account (15m)    │
│  • Customer Broadcast (20m)   │
│  • Evidence Collection (5m)   │
│  • Legal PDF Generation       │
└────────────────────────────────┘
          ↓
┌─[RESOLUTION & RECOVERY]───────┐
│  • Manual Intervention         │
│  • Route Transfer             │
│  • Legal Action               │
│  • System Learning            │
└────────────────────────────────┘
```
