```python
# Conversion optimization implementation
class ConversionOptimizer:
    """
    Advanced conversion optimization untuk Fraud Guard Pro
    """
    
    def __init__(self, tenant_id: int):
        self.tenant_id = tenant_id
        self.db = get_db_session()
        self.analytics = FraudGuardAnalytics(tenant_id)
    
    def track_conversion_event(self, event_type: str, data: dict):
        """
        Track conversion-related events untuk optimization
        """
        
        event = ConversionEvent(
            tenant_id=self.tenant_id,
            event_type=event_type,
            event_data=json.dumps(data),
            timestamp=datetime.now(),
            user_agent=data.get('user_agent'),
            ip_address=data.get('ip_address')
        )
        
        self.db.add(event)
        self.db.commit()
        
        # Trigger real-time conversion logic
        self.evaluate_conversion_triggers(event_type, data)
    
    def evaluate_conversion_triggers(self, event_type: str, data: dict):
        """
        Evaluate if conversion triggers should be activated
        """
        
        triggers = CONVERSION_TRIGGERS.get(event_type, [])
        
        for trigger in triggers:
            if self.evaluate_trigger_conditions(trigger, data):
                self.execute_conversion_trigger(trigger, data)
    
    def evaluate_trigger_conditions(self, trigger: dict, data: dict) -> bool:
        """
        Evaluate if trigger conditions are met
        """
        
        conditions = trigger['conditions']
        
        # Time-based conditions
        if 'trial_day' in conditions:
            trial_day = self.get_trial_day()
            if trial_day != conditions['trial_day']:
                return False
        
        # Usage-based conditions
        if 'min_feature_usage' in conditions:
            usage = self.get_feature_usage(trigger['feature'])
            if usage < conditions['min_feature_usage']:
                return False
        
        # Event-based conditions
        if 'previous_event' in conditions:
            if not self.has_previous_event(conditions['previous_event']):
                return False
        
        # Emotion-based conditions
        if 'high_risk_detected' in conditions:
            if not self.has_recent_high_risk_alert():
                return False
        
        return True
    
    def execute_conversion_trigger(self, trigger: dict, data: dict):
        """
        Execute conversion trigger action
        """
        
        action = trigger['action']
        
        if action == 'show_upgrade_modal':
            self.show_personalized_upgrade_modal(trigger, data)
        elif action == 'send_conversion_email':
            self.send_conversion_email(trigger, data)
        elif action == 'display_banner':
            self.display_conversion_banner(trigger, data)
        elif action == 'create_urgency':
            self.create_urgency_element(trigger, data)
    
    def show_personalized_upgrade_modal(self, trigger: dict, data: dict):
        """
        Show personalized upgrade modal based on tenant behavior
        """
        
        # Get tenant-specific data
        tenant_stats = self.analytics.get_tenant_statistics()
        trial_progress = self.get_trial_progress()
        
        # Personalize messaging
        if trial_progress['days_remaining'] <= 3:
            urgency_message = f"⏰ Trial Anda berakhir dalam {trial_progress['days_remaining']} hari!"
            cta_text = "🛡️ Aktifkan Sekarang - Jangan Rugi Kesempatan!"
        else:
            urgency_message = f"🎊 {trial_progress['days_used']} hari trial tersisa"
            cta_text = "🚀 Lanjutkan Proteksi Premium"
        
        # Calculate personalized ROI
        prevented_losses = tenant_stats.get('prevented_losses', 0)
        if prevented_losses > 0:
            roi_message = f"💰 Anda sudah menghemat Rp {prevented_losses:,} dari fraud!"
        else:
            roi_message = f"📊 Potensi penghematan: Rp {tenant_stats.get('potential_savings', 0):,}/bulan"
        
        modal_content = f"""
        <div class="personalized-upgrade-modal">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h2>🛡️ {urgency_message}</h2>
                <div class="trial-progress">
                    <div class="progress-bar">
                        <div class="progress-fill" style="width: {trial_progress['progress_percentage']}%"></div>
                    </div>
                    <span>{trial_progress['days_used']}/{trial_progress['total_days']} hari digunakan</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="modal-body">
                <div class="personalized-stats">
                    <h3>📊 Performa Trial Anda:</h3>
                    <ul>
                        <li>✅ {tenant_stats.get('alerts_generated', 0)} alert keamanan</li>
                        <li>✅ {tenant_stats.get('mantri_monitored', 0)} mantri dipantau</li>
                        <li>✅ {tenant_stats.get('hours_saved', 0)} jam monitoring dihemat</li>
                        <li>✅ {roi_message}</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                
                <div class="upgrade-benefits">
                    <h3>🚀 Dengan Fraud Guard Pro Full Version:</h3>
                    <ul>
                        <li>🤖 AI-powered fraud detection (95% akurasi)</li>
                        <li>🔒 Auto-lock protection tanpa batas</li>
                        <li>📱 WhatsApp unlimited ke semua owner</li>
                        <li>📊 Advanced analytics & reporting</li>
                        <li>🛡️ Priority support 24/7</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                
                <div class="pricing-highlight">
                    <h4>💰 Investasi Kecil, Perlindungan Maksimal:</h4>
                    <div class="price-options">
                        <div class="price-option recommended">
                            <span class="price">Rp25.000</span>
                            <span class="period">/mantri/bulan</span>
                            <span class="badge">REKOMENDASI</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="price-option">
                            <span class="price">Rp200.000</span>
                            <span class="period">/bulan flat</span>
                            <span class="badge">HEMAT</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="modal-footer">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="this.closest('.personalized-upgrade-modal').remove()">
                    Nanti Saja
                </button>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="activateFraudGuardPro()">
                    {cta_text}
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
        """
        
        # Display modal
        self.display_modal(modal_content)
        
        # Track conversion event
        self.track_conversion_event('upgrade_modal_shown', {
            'trial_day': trial_progress['days_used'],
            'personalization_used': True,
            'urgency_level': 'high' if trial_progress['days_remaining'] <= 3 else 'medium'
        })
```

```python
# Revenue projection calculator
class RevenueProjectionCalculator:
    """
    Advanced revenue projection calculator untuk Fraud Guard Pro
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.base_assumptions = REVENUE_PROJECTION['base_assumptions']
        self.scenarios = REVENUE_PROJECTION['add_on_adoption_scenarios']
    
    def calculate_projection(self, months: int = 12, scenario: str = 'moderate') -> dict:
        """
        Calculate revenue projection untuk specified timeframe
        """
        
        scenario_config = self.scenarios[scenario]
        projections = []
        
        for month in range(1, months + 1):
            # Apply growth rate
            growth_multiplier = (1 + self.base_assumptions['annual_growth_rate']) ** (month / 12)
            
            # Calculate base transaction revenue
            base_revenue = self.calculate_base_revenue(month, growth_multiplier)
            
            # Calculate add-on revenue
            add_on_revenue = self.calculate_add_on_revenue(month, scenario_config, growth_multiplier)
            
            # Calculate total revenue
            total_revenue = base_revenue + add_on_revenue
            
            # Calculate costs
            costs = self.calculate_costs(month, total_revenue)
            
            # Calculate profit
            profit = total_revenue - costs['total']
            
            projections.append({
                'month': month,
                'base_revenue': base_revenue,
                'add_on_revenue': add_on_revenue,
                'total_revenue': total_revenue,
                'costs': costs,
                'profit': profit,
                'profit_margin': (profit / total_revenue) * 100 if total_revenue > 0 else 0,
                'add_on_percentage': (add_on_revenue / total_revenue) * 100 if total_revenue > 0 else 0
            })
        
        return {
            'scenario': scenario,
            'period_months': months,
            'projections': projections,
            'summary': self.calculate_summary(projections)
        }
    
    def calculate_base_revenue(self, month: int, growth_multiplier: float) -> int:
        """
        Calculate base transaction revenue
        """
        
        cooperatives = self.base_assumptions['total_cooperatives'] * growth_multiplier
        transactions_per_coop = self.base_assumptions['average_transactions_per_cooperative']
        transaction_fee = self.base_assumptions['base_transaction_fee']
        
        return int(cooperatives * transactions_per_coop * transaction_fee * 30)  # Monthly
    
    def calculate_add_on_revenue(self, month: int, scenario: dict, growth_multiplier: float) -> int:
        """
        Calculate Fraud Guard Pro add-on revenue
        """
        
        cooperatives = self.base_assumptions['total_cooperatives'] * growth_multiplier
        adoption_rate = scenario['adoption_rate']
        
        # Apply churn rate
        if month > 1:
            churn_multiplier = (1 - self.base_assumptions['monthly_churn_rate']) ** (month - 1)
        else:
            churn_multiplier = 1
        
        active_subscribers = int(cooperatives * adoption_rate * churn_multiplier)
        
        # Calculate revenue based on tier distribution
        tier_distribution = scenario['tier_distribution']
        revenue = 0
        
        # Starter tier (per-user model)
        starter_subscribers = int(active_subscribers * tier_distribution['starter'])
        starter_revenue = starter_subscribers * 25000  # Rp25,000 per user
        
        # Professional tier (per-user model)
        professional_subscribers = int(active_subscribers * tier_distribution['professional'])
        professional_revenue = professional_subscribers * 35000  # Rp35,000 per user
        
        # Enterprise tier (flat model)
        enterprise_subscribers = int(active_subscribers * tier_distribution['enterprise'])
        enterprise_revenue = enterprise_subscribers * 250000  # Rp250,000 flat
        
        revenue = starter_revenue + professional_revenue + enterprise_revenue
        
        # Add WhatsApp overage revenue (estimated)
        whatsapp_overage = active_subscribers * 50 * 500  # 50 overage messages per subscriber
        revenue += whatsapp_overage
        
        return revenue
    
    def calculate_costs(self, month: int, revenue: int) -> dict:
        """
        Calculate costs untuk given month
        """
        
        # Fixed costs
        fixed_costs = 45000000  # Rp45M total fixed costs per month
        
        # Variable costs (percentage of revenue)
        variable_costs = {
            'whatsapp_api': revenue * 0.02,    # 2% for WhatsApp API
            'infrastructure': revenue * 0.01, # 1% for infrastructure scaling
            'support': revenue * 0.03,       # 3% for support scaling
            'marketing': revenue * 0.05       # 5% for ongoing marketing
        }
        
        total_variable = sum(variable_costs.values())
        
        return {
            'fixed': fixed_costs,
            'variable': variable_costs,
            'total': fixed_costs + total_variable
        }
    
    def calculate_summary(self, projections: list) -> dict:
        """
        Calculate summary statistics dari projections
        """
        
        total_revenue = sum(p['total_revenue'] for p in projections)
        total_profit = sum(p['profit'] for p in projections)
        total_add_on_revenue = sum(p['add_on_revenue'] for p in projections)
        
        avg_monthly_revenue = total_revenue / len(projections)
        avg_monthly_profit = total_profit / len(projections)
        avg_profit_margin = sum(p['profit_margin'] for p in projections) / len(projections)
        
        return {
            'total_revenue': total_revenue,
            'total_profit': total_profit,
            'total_add_on_revenue': total_add_on_revenue,
            'add_on_revenue_percentage': (total_add_on_revenue / total_revenue) * 100,
            'average_monthly_revenue': avg_monthly_revenue,
            'average_monthly_profit': avg_monthly_profit,
            'average_profit_margin': avg_profit_margin,
            'total_months': len(projections)
        }
```

## 🔄 **Fallback Mechanism - Offline & Manual Payment Collection**

### 🎯 **Overview**
Sistem Fallback Mechanism yang memastikan aplikasi SaaS tetap berjalan optimal meskipun nasabah tidak memiliki HP, tidak membawa kartu QR, atau dalam kondisi offline. Fitur ini sangat penting untuk koperasi harian di daerah dengan penetrasi digital rendah, memastikan mantri tetap bisa menagih dengan aman dan akurat tanpa mengorbankan integritas data.

---

### 🎴 **1. Kartu Fisik QR Code (Cetak Mandiri)**

#### **1.1 Multi-Format Physical QR Cards**

```python
# QR code generation dengan multiple redundancy
class PhysicalQRGenerator:
    """
    Advanced QR code generation untuk physical cards dengan redundancy
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.qr_generator = qrcode.QRCode(
            version=1,
            error_correction=qrcode.constants.ERROR_CORRECT_H,  # High error correction
            box_size=10,
            border=4
        )
    
    def generate_member_qr(self, member_data: dict) -> dict:
        """
        Generate QR code dengan multiple data encoding untuk reliability
        """
        
        # Primary data structure
        qr_data = {
            'type': 'MEMBER_QR',
            'member_id': member_data['id'],
            'member_number': member_data['member_number'],
            'name': member_data['nama_lengkap'],
            'koperasi_id': member_data['koperasi_id'],
            'generated_at': datetime.now().isoformat(),
            'checksum': self.generate_checksum(member_data)
        }
        
        # Add backup data (human-readable)
        backup_data = f"ID:{member_data['member_number']}|NAMA:{member_data['nama_lengkap'][:20]}"
        
        # Generate QR codes
        primary_qr = self._generate_qr_image(json.dumps(qr_data))
        backup_qr = self._generate_qr_image(backup_data, error_correction='L')
        
        return {
            'primary_qr': primary_qr,
            'backup_qr': backup_qr,
            'qr_data': qr_data,
            'print_ready': True
        }
    
    def generate_batch_qrs(self, members: list) -> dict:
        """
        Generate QR codes untuk multiple members dengan batch optimization
        """
        
        batch_results = []
        
        for member in members:
            try:
                qr_result = self.generate_member_qr(member)
                batch_results.append({
                    'member_id': member['id'],
                    'status': 'success',
                    'qr_data': qr_result
                })
            except Exception as e:
                batch_results.append({
                    'member_id': member['id'],
                    'status': 'error',
                    'error': str(e)
                })
        
        return {
            'batch_id': str(uuid.uuid4()),
            'total_members': len(members),
            'successful': len([r for r in batch_results if r['status'] == 'success']),
            'failed': len([r for r in batch_results if r['status'] == 'error']),
            'results': batch_results,
            'generated_at': datetime.now().isoformat()
        }
    
    def _generate_qr_image(self, data: str, error_correction: str = 'H') -> bytes:
        """
        Generate QR image dengan specified error correction level
        """
        
        self.qr_generator.error_correction = getattr(
            qrcode.constants, f'ERROR_CORRECT_{error_correction}'
        )
        
        self.qr_generator.add_data(data)
        self.qr_generator.make(fit=True)
        
        img = self.qr_generator.make_image(fill_color="black", back_color="white")
        
        # Convert to bytes for printing
        img_buffer = io.BytesIO()
        img.save(img_buffer, format='PNG', dpi=300)
        
        return img_buffer.getvalue()

# Physical card printing system
class PhysicalCardPrinter:
    """
    Professional printing system untuk physical QR cards
    """
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.print_templates = self._load_print_templates()
    
    def generate_print_ready_file(self, qr_batch: dict, card_type: str) -> dict:
        """
        Generate print-ready file untuk professional printing
        """
        
        template = self.print_templates[card_type]
        
        if card_type == 'id_card':
            return self._generate_id_card_layout(qr_batch, template)
        elif card_type == 'sticker':
            return self._generate_sticker_layout(qr_batch, template)
        elif card_type == 'book_cover':
            return self._generate_book_cover_layout(qr_batch, template)
        
        return {'error': f'Unknown card type: {card_type}'}
    
    def _generate_id_card_layout(self, qr_batch: dict, template: dict) -> dict:
        """
        Generate ID card layout dengan professional design
        """
        
        from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas
        from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import creditcard
        from reportlab.lib.units import inch
        import io
        
        buffer = io.BytesIO()
        p = canvas.Canvas(buffer, pagesize=creditcard)
        
        # Card dimensions
        width, height = creditcard
        
        # Background design
        p.setFillColor(template['background_color'])
        p.rect(0, 0, width, height, fill=True, stroke=False)
        
        # Koperasi branding
        p.drawImage(template['logo_path'], 0.2*inch, height-0.8*inch, width=0.6*inch, height=0.4*inch)
        
        # Member information positioning
        y_position = height - 1.2*inch
        
        for member_data in qr_batch['results']:
            if member_data['status'] == 'success':
                # Name
                p.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 12)
                p.drawString(0.2*inch, y_position, member_data['qr_data']['name'][:25])
                
                # Member number
                p.setFont("Helvetica", 10)
                p.drawString(0.2*inch, y_position - 0.15*inch, f"No: {member_data['qr_data']['member_number']}")
                
                # QR Code positioning
                qr_image = Image.open(io.BytesIO(member_data['qr_data']['primary_qr']))
                p.drawImage(qr_image, width - 1.2*inch, y_position - 0.8*inch, width=1*inch, height=1*inch)
                
                # Address (truncated)
                p.setFont("Helvetica", 8)
                p.drawString(0.2*inch, y_position - 0.3*inch, member_data.get('address', '')[:30])
                
                break  # One member per card
        
        # Security features
        self._add_security_features(p, width, height)
        
        p.save()
        buffer.seek(0)
        
        return {
            'file_data': buffer.getvalue(),
            'file_type': 'pdf',
            'pages': len(qr_batch['results']),
            'print_specifications': {
                'paper_size': 'Credit Card (85.6 × 54 mm)',
                'paper_type': 'PVC Plastic 300gsm',
                'printing': 'Full color, double-sided',
                'finish': 'Matte laminate'
            }
        }
```

```python
# Advanced search system untuk manual member identification
MANUAL_SEARCH_SYSTEM = {
    'search_methods': {
        'name_search': {
            'features': [
                'Fuzzy name matching (typo tolerance)',
                'Phonetic search (sound-alike names)',
                'Partial name matching',

            }

        'address_search': {

                'Geographic proximity search',
                'Address pattern matching',
                'Landmark-based search',
                'Street name variations',
                'House number range search'
            ],

            }

            },

                'weekly_payers': 'Pembayar mingguan',

            },

            }
        }
    },
    
    'proximity_intelligence': {

            'search_radius': 'Adjustable (50m - 1km)',

        },

            'payment_pattern_weight': 30,  # 30% bobot pola pembayaran
            'relationship_weight': 20,  # 20% bobot relasi dengan mantri
            'urgency_weight': 10   # 10% bobot urgensi pembayaran
        },
        
        'location_validation': {
            'business_hours': 'Check if nasabah biasanya buka pada jam ini',
            'last_seen': 'Waktu terakhir mantri ketemu nasabah',

            'weather_impact': 'Pengaruh cuaca terhadap kemungkinan bertemu'
        }
    }
}

# Search implementation dengan advanced algorithms
class MemberSearchEngine:
    """
    Advanced member search engine dengan multiple search algorithms
    """
    
    def __init__(self, tenant_id: int):
        self.tenant_id = tenant_id
        self.db = get_db_session()
        self.fuzzy_matcher = fuzzywuzzy.process
        self.geocoder = geopy.geocoders.Nominatim(user_agent="koperasi_search")
    
    def search_members(self, query: str, search_type: str = 'all', filters: dict = None) -> dict:
        """
        Comprehensive member search dengan multiple algorithms
        """
        
        results = []
        
        # Name-based search
        if search_type in ['all', 'name']:
            name_results = self._search_by_name(query, filters)
            results.extend(name_results)
        
        # Address-based search
        if search_type in ['all', 'address']:
            address_results = self._search_by_address(query, filters)
            results.extend(address_results)
        
        # ID-based search
        if search_type in ['all', 'id']:
            id_results = self._search_by_id(query, filters)
            results.extend(id_results)
        
        # Remove duplicates and rank results
        unique_results = self._deduplicate_results(results)
        ranked_results = self._rank_search_results(unique_results, query)
        
        return {
            'query': query,
            'search_type': search_type,
            'total_results': len(ranked_results),
            'results': ranked_results[:50],  # Limit to 50 results
            'search_time': datetime.now().isoformat(),
            'filters_applied': filters or {}
        }
    
    def _search_by_name(self, query: str, filters: dict) -> list:
        """
        Search members by name dengan fuzzy matching
        """
        
        # Get all active members untuk tenant
        members = self.db.query(Member).filter(
            Member.tenant_id == self.tenant_id,
            Member.status_aktif == True
        ).all()
        
        results = []
        
        for member in members:
            # Calculate name similarity scores
            name_score = self.fuzzy_matcher.extractOne(
                query, 
                [member.nama_lengkap, member.nama_panggilan or ''],
                scorer=fuzzywuzzy.fuzz.token_set_ratio
            )
            
            if name_score and name_score[1] >= 70:  # 70% similarity threshold
                # Apply filters
                if self._passes_filters(member, filters):
                    results.append({
                        'member_id': member.id,
                        'name': member.nama_lengkap,
                        'nickname': member.nama_panggilan,
                        'match_score': name_score[1],
                        'match_type': 'name',
                        'member_data': self._serialize_member(member)
                    })
        
        return results
    
    def _search_by_address(self, query: str, filters: dict) -> list:
        """
        Search members by address dengan geographic intelligence
        """
        
        # Extract location keywords dari query
        location_keywords = self._extract_location_keywords(query)
        
        if not location_keywords:
            return []
        
        # Search members dengan address matching
        members = self.db.query(Member).filter(
            Member.tenant_id == self.tenant_id,
            Member.status_aktif == True,
            Member.alamat.ilike(f'%{keyword}%')
        ).all()
        
        results = []
        
        for member in members:
            # Calculate address similarity
            address_score = self._calculate_address_similarity(query, member.alamat)
            
            if address_score >= 60:  # 60% similarity threshold
                if self._passes_filters(member, filters):
                    results.append({
                        'member_id': member.id,
                        'name': member.nama_lengkap,
                        'address': member.alamat,
                        'match_score': address_score,
                        'match_type': 'address',
                        'member_data': self._serialize_member(member)
                    })
        
        return results
    
    def get_proximity_members(self, lat: float, lng: float, radius: int = 100, filters: dict = None) -> dict:
        """
        Get members within specified radius dari current location
        """
        
        # Get all members dengan known locations
        members = self.db.query(Member).join(MemberLocation).filter(
            Member.tenant_id == self.tenant_id,
            Member.status_aktif == True,
            MemberLocation.is_active == True
        ).all()
        
        nearby_members = []
        
        for member in members:
            # Calculate distance
            distance = self._calculate_distance(
                lat, lng, 
                member.locations[0].latitude, 
                member.locations[0].longitude
            )
            
            if distance <= radius:
                if self._passes_filters(member, filters):
                    nearby_members.append({
                        'member_id': member.id,
                        'name': member.nama_lengkap,
                        'address': member.alamat,
                        'distance': distance,
                        'location': {
                            'lat': member.locations[0].latitude,
                            'lng': member.locations[0].longitude,
                            'address': member.locations[0].formatted_address
                        },
                        'member_data': self._serialize_member(member)
                    })
        
        # Sort by distance
        nearby_members.sort(key=lambda x: x['distance'])
        
        return {
            'search_center': {'lat': lat, 'lng': lng},
            'search_radius': radius,
            'total_found': len(nearby_members),
            'members': nearby_members[:20]  # Limit to 20 nearest members
        }
    
    def _rank_search_results(self, results: list, query: str) -> list:
        """
        Rank search results berdasarkan multiple factors
        """
        
        for result in results:
            score = result['match_score']
            
            # Boost untuk exact matches
            if result['match_score'] == 100:
                score += 20
            
            # Boost untuk recent payment history
            if result['member_data'].get('last_payment_days_ago', 999) <= 7:
                score += 10
            
            # Boost untuk high-value members
            if result['member_data'].get('total_loan_amount', 0) > 1000000:
                score += 5
            
            # Penalty untuk problematic members
            if result['member_data'].get('is_problematic', False):
                score -= 15
            
            result['final_score'] = score
        
        # Sort by final score
        results.sort(key=lambda x: x['final_score'], reverse=True)
        
        return results
```

```html
<div class="member-search-container">

            <!-- Dynamic search results -->

</div>

<style>
.member-search-container {
    max-width: 100%;
    margin: 0 auto;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.search-header {
    padding: 1.5rem;
    background: #f8f9fa;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}

.search-input-group {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    background: white;
    border: 2px solid #e9ecef;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.search-icon {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: #6c757d;
    margin-right: 0.75rem;
}

.search-input {
    flex: 1;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    font-size: 1rem;
    padding: 0.25rem;
}

.search-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.btn-voice-search, .btn-camera-search {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 0.25rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    transition: background-color 0.2s;
}

.btn-voice-search:hover, .btn-camera-search:hover {
    background: #f8f9fa;
}

.quick-filters {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.filter-btn {
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 20px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.filter-btn.active {
    background: #007bff;
    color: white;
    border-color: #007bff;
}

.filter-btn:hover:not(.active) {
    background: #f8f9fa;
}

.results-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
}

.results-count {
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #495057;
}

.sort-options select {
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: white;
}

.member-result-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f3f4;
    transition: background-color 0.2s;
}

.member-result-item:hover {
    background: #f8f9fa;
}

.member-photo {
    position: relative;
    margin-right: 1rem;
}

.member-photo img {
    width: 50px;
    height: 50px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
}

.payment-status {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid white;
}

.payment-status.unpaid {
    background: #dc3545;
}

.payment-status.paid {
    background: #28a745;
}

.member-info {
    flex: 1;
}

.member-name {
    margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #212529;
}

.member-address {
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
    color: #6c757d;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.member-details {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: #868e96;
}

.member-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.proximity-map-container {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background: white;
    z-index: 1000;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.map-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}

.interactive-map {
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 400px;
}

.map-controls {
    padding: 1rem;
    border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
}

.radius-slider {
    flex: 1;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .quick-filters {
        overflow-x: auto;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }
    
    .member-result-item {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 1rem;
    }
    
    .member-actions {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: flex-end;
    }
}
</style>

<script>
// Advanced search functionality
class MemberSearch {
    constructor() {
        this.currentQuery = '';
        this.currentFilter = 'all';
        this.searchTimeout = null;
        this.currentLocation = null;
        
        this.initializeEventListeners();
        this.getCurrentLocation();
    }
    
    initializeEventListeners() {
        const searchInput = document.getElementById('memberSearchInput');
        const filterButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
        
        // Real-time search
        searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            clearTimeout(this.searchTimeout);
            this.searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                this.performSearch(e.target.value);
            }, 300);
        });
        
        // Filter buttons
        filterButtons.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                this.setActiveFilter(e.target.dataset.filter);
            });
        });
        
        // Voice search support
        if ('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window) {
            this.initializeVoiceSearch();
        }
    }
    
    async performSearch(query) {
        if (query.length < 2) {
            this.clearResults();
            return;
        }
        
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/members/search', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'Authorization': `Bearer ${getAuthToken()}`
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    query: query,
                    search_type: 'all',
                    filters: {
                        payment_status: this.getPaymentStatusFilter(),
                        location: this.currentLocation ? {
                            lat: this.currentLocation.lat,
                            lng: this.currentLocation.lng,
                            radius: 100
                        } : null
                    }
                })
            });
            
            const data = await response.json();
            this.displaySearchResults(data.results);
            
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Search failed:', error);
            this.showSearchError();
        }
    }
    
    displaySearchResults(results) {
        const resultsList = document.getElementById('searchResultsList');
        const resultsCount = document.querySelector('.results-count');
        
        resultsCount.textContent = `${results.length} nasabah ditemukan`;
        
        resultsList.innerHTML = results.map(member => `
            <div class="member-result-item">
                <div class="member-photo">
                    <img src="/api/member-photo/${member.member_id}" alt="${member.name}">
                    <div class="payment-status ${member.member_data.last_payment_days_ago > 0 ? 'unpaid' : 'paid'}"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="member-info">
                    <h4 class="member-name">${member.name}</h4>
                    <p class="member-address">${member.member_data.address}</p>
                    <div class="member-details">
                        <span class="member-id">ID: ${member.member_data.member_number}</span>
                        <span class="last-payment">Terakhir bayar: ${member.member_data.last_payment_days_ago} hari lalu</span>
                        ${member.distance ? `<span class="distance">${member.distance}m</span>` : ''}
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="member-actions">
                    <button class="btn-primary" onclick="selectMember(${member.member_id})">
                        Pilih
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="showMemberDetails(${member.member_id})">
                        Detail
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        `).join('');
    }
    
    async getCurrentLocation() {
        if ('geolocation' in navigator) {
            navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
                (position) => {
                    this.currentLocation = {
                        lat: position.coords.latitude,
                        lng: position.coords.longitude
                    };
                },
                (error) => {
                    console.log('Location access denied');
                }
            );
        }
    }
    
    setActiveFilter(filter) {
        // Update UI
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
            btn.classList.remove('active');
        });
        document.querySelector(`[data-filter="${filter}"]`).classList.add('active');
        
        this.currentFilter = filter;
        
        // Re-run search dengan new filter
        if (this.currentQuery) {
            this.performSearch(this.currentQuery);
        }
        
        // Show proximity map jika filter 'nearby'
        if (filter === 'nearby' && this.currentLocation) {
            this.showProximityMap();
        }
    }
    
    showProximityMap() {
        const mapContainer = document.getElementById('proximityMap');
        mapContainer.style.display = 'block';
        
        // Initialize map
        this.initializeMap();
        
        // Load nearby members
        this.loadNearbyMembers();
    }
    
    async loadNearbyMembers() {
        if (!this.currentLocation) return;
        
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/members/proximity', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'Authorization': `Bearer ${getAuthToken()}`
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    lat: this.currentLocation.lat,
                    lng: this.currentLocation.lng,
                    radius: parseInt(document.getElementById('radiusSlider').value),
                    filters: {
                        payment_status: 'unpaid_today'
                    }
                })
            });
            
            const data = await response.json();
            this.displayNearbyMembersOnMap(data.members);
            
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Failed to load nearby members:', error);
        }
    }
}

// Initialize search
const memberSearch = new MemberSearch();
</script>
```

#### **3.1 Photo Verification System**

```python
# Advanced photo verification system untuk transaction validation
PHOTO_VERIFICATION_SYSTEM = {

                'Uang pembayaran terlihat (jika tunai)',
                'Lokasi bisnis teridentifikasi',
                'Kondisi pencahayaan cukup',
                'Tidak blur atau noise berlebih'
            ],
            'validation_checks': [
                'Face detection confidence > 80%',
                'Location verification via GPS metadata',
                'Timestamp validation (±5 menit)',
                'Image quality assessment',
                'Duplicate detection'
            ]
        },
        
        'business_premises': {
            'description': 'Foto tempat usaha nasabah',
            'requirements': [
                'Identitas toko/rumah jelas',
                'Nama usaha terlihat',
                'Landmark terdekat teridentifikasi',
                'Kondisi aktual bisnis',
                'Jam operasional sesuai'
            ],
            'validation_checks': [
                'Business name matching',
                'Address verification',
                'Operating hours validation',
                'Premise type classification',
                'Historical location consistency'
            ]
        },
        
        'customer_interaction': {
```
